authors_text: Xiaokai Liu,Menghua Zhang
title: MATT: A Multiple-instance Attention Mechanism for Long-tail Music Genre Classification
title_zh: MATT：一种用于长尾音乐流派分类的多实例注意力机制
abstract: Imbalanced music genre classification is a crucial task in the Music Information Retrieval (MIR) field for identifying the long-tail, data-poor genre based on the related music audio segments, which is very prevalent in real-world scenarios. Most of the existing models are designed for class-balanced music datasets, resulting in poor performance in accuracy and generalization when identifying the music genres at the tail of the distribution. Inspired by the success of introducing Multi-instance Learning (MIL) in various classification tasks, we propose a novel mechanism named Multi-instance Attention (MATT) to boost the performance for identifying tail classes. Specifically, we first construct the bag-level datasets by generating the album-artist pair bags. Second, we leverage neural networks to encode the music audio segments. Finally, under the guidance of a multi-instance attention mechanism, the neural network-based models could select the most informative genre to match the given music segment. Comprehensive experimental results on a large-scale music genre benchmark dataset with long-tail distribution demonstrate MATT significantly outperforms other state-of-the-art baselines.
summary: Imbalanced music genre classification is a crucial task in the Music Information Retrieval (MIR) field for identifying the long-tail, data-poor genre based on the related music audio segments, which is very prevalent in real-world scenarios. Most of the existing models are designed for class-balanced music datasets, resulting in poor performance in accuracy and generalization when identifying the music genres at the tail of the distribution. Inspired by the success of introducing Multi-instance Learning (MIL) in various classification tasks, we propose a novel mechanism named Multi-instance Attention (MATT) to boost the performance for identifying tail classes. Specifically, we first construct the bag-level datasets by generating the album-artist pair bags. Second, we leverage neural networks to encode the music audio segments. Finally, under the guidance of a multi-instance attention mechanism, the neural network-based models could select the most informative genre to match the given music segment. Comprehensive experimental results on a large-scale music genre benchmark dataset with long-tail distribution demonstrate MATT significantly outperforms other state-of-the-art baselines.
abstract_zh: 不平衡音乐流派分类是音乐信息检索（MIR）领域的一项关键任务，用于根据相关音乐音频片段识别长尾、数据匮乏的流派，这在现实场景中非常普遍。大多数现有模型都是针对类别平衡的音乐数据集而设计的，导致在识别分布尾部的音乐流派时，准确性和泛化性表现不佳。受到在各种分类任务中引入多实例学习（MIL）成功的启发，我们提出了一种名为多实例注意（MATT）的新机制来提高识别尾类的性能。具体来说，我们首先通过生成专辑-艺术家对包来构建包级数据集。其次，我们利用神经网络对音乐音频片段进行编码。最后，在多实例注意力机制的指导下，基于神经网络的模型可以选择信息最丰富的流派来匹配给定的音乐片段。在具有长尾分布的大规模音乐流派基准数据集上的综合实验结果表明，MATT 显着优于其他最先进的基线。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MATT机制，通过多实例注意力机制解决长尾音乐流派分类中的数据不平衡问题。
AI.motivation: 现有模型在平衡数据集表现良好，但面对现实场景中长尾分布的音乐流派（数据稀缺的尾部类别）时准确率和泛化能力不足。
AI.method: 构建基于专辑-艺术家配对的包级数据集，利用神经网络编码音频片段，并通过多实例注意力机制筛选最具信息量的流派进行匹配。
AI.result: 在大规模长尾分布音乐数据集上的实验表明，MATT显著优于其他先进基线方法。
AI.conclusion: MATT通过关注信息量最大的实例，有效提升了长尾音乐流派分类的性能，为处理数据不平衡问题提供了新思路。

authors_text: Xianqi Zhang,Xingtao Wang,Xu Liu,Wenrui Wang,Xiaopeng Fan,Debin Zhao
title: Task-Agnostic Learning to Accomplish New Tasks
title_zh: 与任务无关的学习来完成新任务
comment: 14 pages, 10 figures, Accepted by IEEE-TCDS
comments: 14 pages, 10 figures, Accepted by IEEE-TCDS
abstract: Reinforcement Learning (RL) and Imitation Learning (IL) have made great progress in robotic decision-making in recent years. However, these methods show obvious deterioration for new tasks that need to be completed through new combinations of actions. RL methods suffer from reward functions and distribution shifts, while IL methods are limited by expert demonstrations which do not cover new tasks. In contrast, humans can easily complete these tasks with the fragmented knowledge learned from task-agnostic experience. Inspired by this observation, this paper proposes a task-agnostic learning method (TAL for short) that can learn fragmented knowledge only from task-agnostic data to accomplish new tasks. TAL consists of four stages. First, the task-agnostic exploration is performed to collect data from interactions with the environment. The collected data is organized via a knowledge graph. Second, an action feature extractor is proposed and trained using the collected knowledge graph data for task-agnostic fragmented knowledge learning. Third, a candidate action generator is designed, which applies the action feature extractor on a new task to generate multiple candidate action sets. Finally, an action proposal network is designed to produce the probabilities for actions in a new task according to the environmental information. The probabilities are then used to generate order information for selecting actions to be executed from multiple candidate action sets to form the plan. Experiments on a virtual indoor scene show that the proposed method outperforms the state-of-the-art offline RL methods and IL methods by more than 20%.

However, these methods show obvious deterioration for new tasks that need to be completed through new combinations of actions. TAL consists of four stages. First, the task-agnostic exploration is performed to collect data from interactions with the environment. The collected data is organized via a knowledge graph. Second, an action feature extractor is proposed and trained using the collected knowledge graph data for task-agnostic fragmented knowledge learning. Finally, an action proposal network is designed to produce the probabilities for actions in a new task according to the environmental information. The probabilities are then used to generate order information for selecting actions to be executed from multiple candidate action sets to form the plan. Experiments on a virtual indoor scene show that the proposed method outperforms the state-of-the-art offline RL methods and IL methods by more than 20%.
abstract_zh: 近年来，强化学习（RL）和模仿学习（IL）在机器人决策方面取得了巨大进展。然而，这些方法对于需要通过新的动作组合来完成的新任务表现出明显的恶化。 RL 方法受到奖励函数和分布变化的影响，而 IL 方法则受到不涵盖新任务的专家演示的限制。相比之下，人类可以利用从与任务无关的经验中学到的碎片化知识轻松完成这些任务。受这一观察的启发，本文提出了一种任务无关的学习方法（简称TAL），该方法只能从任务无关的数据中学习碎片知识来完成新任务。 TAL 分为四个阶段。首先，执行与任务无关的探索，以从与环境的交互中收集数据。收集到的数据通过知识图进行组织。其次，提出了一种动作特征提取器，并使用收集的知识图数据进行训练，以进行与任务无关的碎片知识学习。第三，设计了候选动作生成器，它将动作特征提取器应用于新任务以生成多个候选动作集。最后，设计一个行动建议网络，根据环境信息产生新任务中行动的概率。然后使用概率生成顺序信息，用于从多个候选动作集中选择要执行的动作以形成计划。虚拟室内场景的实验表明，所提出的方法比最先进的离线 RL 方法和 IL 方法优于 20% 以上。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种任务无关的学习方法（TAL），通过碎片化知识学习完成新任务。
AI.motivation: 现有强化学习和模仿学习方法在处理需要新动作组合的任务时表现不佳，而人类能通过碎片化知识完成此类任务。
AI.method: TAL包含四个阶段：任务无关探索、知识图谱构建、动作特征提取、候选动作生成与动作提议网络。
AI.result: 在虚拟室内场景实验中，TAL性能优于最新离线RL和IL方法超过20%。
AI.conclusion: TAL验证了任务无关学习在解决新任务中的有效性，展示了碎片化知识学习的潜力。

authors_text: Shailesh Nirgudkar,Michael DeFilippo,Michael Sacarny,Michael Benjamin,Paul Robinette
title: MassMIND: Massachusetts Maritime INfrared Dataset
title_zh: MassMIND：马萨诸塞州海事红外数据集
comment: 10 pages, 10 figures, submitted to IJRR for review
comments: 10 pages, 10 figures, submitted to IJRR for review
abstract: Recent advances in deep learning technology have triggered radical progress in the autonomy of ground vehicles. Marine coastal Autonomous Surface Vehicles (ASVs) that are regularly used for surveillance, monitoring and other routine tasks can benefit from this autonomy. Long haul deep sea transportation activities are additional opportunities. These two use cases present very different terrains -- the first being coastal waters -- with many obstacles, structures and human presence while the latter is mostly devoid of such obstacles. Variations in environmental conditions are common to both terrains. Robust labeled datasets mapping such terrains are crucial in improving the situational awareness that can drive autonomy. However, there are only limited such maritime datasets available and these primarily consist of optical images. Although, Long Wave Infrared (LWIR) is a strong complement to the optical spectrum that helps in extreme light conditions, a labeled public dataset with LWIR images does not currently exist. In this paper, we fill this gap by presenting a labeled dataset of over 2,900 LWIR segmented images captured in coastal maritime environment under diverse conditions. The images are labeled using instance segmentation and classified in seven categories -- sky, water, obstacle, living obstacle, bridge, self and background. We also evaluate this dataset across three deep learning architectures (UNet, PSPNet, DeepLabv3) and provide detailed analysis of its efficacy. While the dataset focuses on the coastal terrain it can equally help deep sea use cases. Such terrain would have less traffic, and the classifier trained on cluttered environment would be able to handle sparse scenes effectively. We share this dataset with the research community with the hope that it spurs new scene understanding capabilities in the maritime environment.
summary: Recent advances in deep learning technology have triggered radical progress in the autonomy of ground vehicles. Marine coastal Autonomous Surface Vehicles (ASVs) that are regularly used for surveillance, monitoring and other routine tasks can benefit from this autonomy. Long haul deep sea transportation activities are additional opportunities. These two use cases present very different terrains -- the first being coastal waters -- with many obstacles, structures and human presence while the latter is mostly devoid of such obstacles. Variations in environmental conditions are common to both terrains. Robust labeled datasets mapping such terrains are crucial in improving the situational awareness that can drive autonomy. However, there are only limited such maritime datasets available and these primarily consist of optical images. Although, Long Wave Infrared (LWIR) is a strong complement to the optical spectrum that helps in extreme light conditions, a labeled public dataset with LWIR images does not currently exist. In this paper, we fill this gap by presenting a labeled dataset of over 2,900 LWIR segmented images captured in coastal maritime environment under diverse conditions. The images are labeled using instance segmentation and classified in seven categories -- sky, water, obstacle, living obstacle, bridge, self and background. We also evaluate this dataset across three deep learning architectures (UNet, PSPNet, DeepLabv3) and provide detailed analysis of its efficacy. While the dataset focuses on the coastal terrain it can equally help deep sea use cases. Such terrain would have less traffic, and the classifier trained on cluttered environment would be able to handle sparse scenes effectively. We share this dataset with the research community with the hope that it spurs new scene understanding capabilities in the maritime environment.
abstract_zh: 深度学习技术的最新进展引发了地面车辆自主化的根本性进展。经常用于监视、监测和其他日常任务的沿海自主水面车辆（ASV）可以从这种自主性中受益。长途深海运输活动是额外的机会。这两个用例呈现出非常不同的地形（第一个是沿海水域），有许多障碍物、建筑物和人类存在，而后者则大多没有此类障碍。环境条件的变化对于这两个地形来说是常见的。绘制此类地形的可靠标记数据集对于提高可驱动自主性的态势感知至关重要。然而，可用的此类海事数据集非常有限，并且主要由光学图像组成。尽管长波红外 (LWIR) 是对光谱的有力补充，有助于应对极端光照条件，但目前不存在带有 LWIR 图像的标记公共数据集。在本文中，我们通过提供一个标记数据集来填补这一空白，该数据集包含在不同条件下沿海海洋环境中捕获的 2,900 多张长波红外分段图像。这些图像使用实例分割进行标记，并分为七类：天空、水、障碍物、生活障碍物、桥梁、自身和背景。我们还跨三种深度学习架构（UNet、PSPNet、DeepLabv3）评估该数据集，并对其功效进行详细分析。虽然该数据集侧重于沿海地形，但它同样可以帮助深海用例。这样的地形流量较少，在杂乱环境中训练的分类器将能够有效处理稀疏场景。我们与研究界分享这个数据集，希望它能激发海洋环境中新的场景理解能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MassMIND数据集，包含2900多张沿海海事环境下的长波红外（LWIR）分割图像，并进行实例分割标注，用于提升自主水面船舶的环境感知能力。
AI.motivation: 现有海事数据集多为光学图像且缺乏标注，而LWIR在极端光照条件下具有优势，但尚未有公开的带标注LWIR数据集，限制了自主船舶在复杂海况下的应用。
AI.method: 在沿海环境采集LWIR图像，采用实例分割标注七类目标（天空、水面、障碍物等），并使用UNet、PSPNet、DeepLabv3三种模型验证数据集有效性。
AI.result: 构建了包含2900+张LWIR图像的标注数据集，验证了其在复杂场景下的分类效果，并指出该数据集同样适用于深海稀疏场景的模型训练。
AI.conclusion: 通过公开该数据集，可推动海事环境下的场景理解技术发展，提升自主船舶在不同水域的适应性与安全性。

search_text: MassMIND: Massachusetts Maritime INfrared Dataset MassMIND：马萨诸塞州海事红外数据集 Recent advances in deep learning technology have triggered radical progress in the autonomy of ground vehicles. Marine coastal Autonomous Surface Vehicles (ASVs) that are regularly used for surveillance, monitoring and other routine tasks can benefit from this autonomy. Long haul deep sea transportation activities are additional opportunities. These two use cases present very different terrains -- the first being coastal waters -- with many obstacles, structures and human presence while the latter is mostly devoid of such obstacles. Variations in environmental conditions are common to both terrains. Robust labeled datasets mapping such terrains are crucial in improving the situational awareness that can drive autonomy. However, there are only limited such maritime datasets available and these primarily consist of optical images. Although, Long Wave Infrared (LWIR) is a strong complement to the optical spectrum that helps in extreme light conditions, a labeled public dataset with LWIR images does not currently exist. In this paper, we fill this gap by presenting a labeled dataset of over 2,900 LWIR segmented images captured in coastal maritime environment under diverse conditions. The images are labeled using instance segmentation and classified in seven categories -- sky, water, obstacle, living obstacle, bridge, self and background. We also evaluate this dataset across three deep learning architectures (UNet, PSPNet, DeepLabv3) and provide detailed analysis of its efficacy. While the dataset focuses on the coastal terrain it can equally help deep sea use cases. Such terrain would have less traffic, and the classifier trained on cluttered environment would be able to handle sparse scenes effectively. We share this dataset with the research community with the hope that it spurs new scene understanding capabilities in the maritime environment. 深度学习技术的最新进展引发了地面车辆自主化的根本性进展。经常用于监视、监测和其他日常任务的沿海自主水面车辆（ASV）可以从这种自主性中受益。长途深海运输活动是额外的机会。这两个用例呈现出非常不同的地形（第一个是沿海水域），有许多障碍物、建筑物和人类存在，而后者则大多没有此类障碍。环境条件的变化对于这两个地形来说是常见的。绘制此类地形的可靠标记数据集对于提高可驱动自主性的态势感知至关重要。然而，可用的此类海事数据集非常有限，并且主要由光学图像组成。尽管长波红外 (LWIR) 是对光谱的有力补充，有助于应对极端光照条件，但目前不存在带有 LWIR 图像的标记公共数据集。在本文中，我们通过提供一个标记数据集来填补这一空白，该数据集包含在不同条件下沿海海洋环境中捕获的 2,900 多张长波红外分段图像。这些图像使用实例分割进行标记，并分为七类：天空、水、障碍物、生活障碍物、桥梁、自身和背景。我们还跨三种深度学习架构（UNet、PSPNet、DeepLabv3）评估该数据集，并对其功效进行详细分析。虽然该数据集侧重于沿海地形，但它同样可以帮助深海用例。这样的地形流量较少，在杂乱环境中训练的分类器将能够有效处理稀疏场景。我们与研究界分享这个数据集，希望它能激发海洋环境中新的场景理解能力。 本文提出MassMIND数据集，包含2900多张沿海海事环境下的长波红外（LWIR）分割图像，并进行实例分割标注，用于提升自主水面船舶的环境感知能力。 Shailesh Nirgudkar,Michael DeFilippo,Michael Sacarny,Michael Benjamin,Paul Robinette cs.CV,cs.RO

authors_text: Peiwen Sun,Shanshan Zhang,Zishan Liu,Yougen Yuan,Taotao Zhang,Honggang Zhang,Pengfei Hu
title: Learning Audio-Visual embedding for Person Verification in the Wild
title_zh: 学习用于野外人员验证的视听嵌入
abstract: It has already been observed that audio-visual embedding is more robust than uni-modality embedding for person verification. Here, we proposed a novel audio-visual strategy that considers aggregators from a fusion perspective. First, we introduced weight-enhanced attentive statistics pooling for the first time in face verification. We find that a strong correlation exists between modalities during pooling, so joint attentive pooling is proposed which contains cycle consistency to learn the implicit inter-frame weight. Finally, each modality is fused with a gated attention mechanism to gain robust audio-visual embedding. All the proposed models are trained on the VoxCeleb2 dev dataset and the best system obtains 0.18%, 0.27%, and 0.49% EER on three official trial lists of VoxCeleb1 respectively, which is to our knowledge the best-published results for person verification.
summary: It has already been observed that audio-visual embedding is more robust than uni-modality embedding for person verification. Here, we proposed a novel audio-visual strategy that considers aggregators from a fusion perspective. First, we introduced weight-enhanced attentive statistics pooling for the first time in face verification. We find that a strong correlation exists between modalities during pooling, so joint attentive pooling is proposed which contains cycle consistency to learn the implicit inter-frame weight. Finally, each modality is fused with a gated attention mechanism to gain robust audio-visual embedding. All the proposed models are trained on the VoxCeleb2 dev dataset and the best system obtains 0.18%, 0.27%, and 0.49% EER on three official trial lists of VoxCeleb1 respectively, which is to our knowledge the best-published results for person verification.
abstract_zh: 已经观察到，对于人员验证来说，视听嵌入比单模态嵌入更稳健。在这里，我们提出了一种新颖的视听策略，从融合的角度考虑聚合器。首先，我们在人脸验证中首次引入了权重增强的注意力统计池。我们发现池化期间模态之间存在很强的相关性，因此提出了联合注意池化，其中包含循环一致性来学习隐式帧间权重。最后，每种模态都与门控注意力机制融合，以获得强大的视听嵌入。所有提出的模型均在 VoxCeleb2 开发数据集上进行训练，最佳系统在 VoxCeleb1 的三个官方试验列表上分别获得 0.18%、0.27% 和 0.49% EER，据我们所知，这是人员验证的最佳发布结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新的音频-视觉嵌入方法，用于真实环境下的人员验证任务。
AI.motivation: 单模态嵌入在人员验证中存在鲁棒性不足的问题，多模态融合能提升跨模态特征关联性与表征能力。
AI.method: 提出权重增强注意力统计池化、联合注意力池化（含循环一致性约束）及门控注意力机制，从特征级与决策级融合音频视觉模态信息。
AI.result: 在VoxCeleb1官方测试集上分别达到0.18%、0.27%、0.49%的EER，刷新当时最佳公开结果。
AI.conclusion: 多模态融合策略显著提升人员验证性能，提出的联合注意力机制与门控融合方法对复杂场景具有更强鲁棒性。

authors_text: Heng-Sheng Chang,Udit Halder,Chia-Hsien Shih,Noel Naughton,Mattia Gazzola,Prashant G. Mehta
title: Energy Shaping Control of a Muscular Octopus Arm Moving in Three Dimensions
title_zh: 肌肉章鱼臂三维运动的能量整形控制
abstract: Flexible octopus arms exhibit an exceptional ability to coordinate large numbers of degrees of freedom and perform complex manipulation tasks. As a consequence, these systems continue to attract the attention of biologists and roboticists alike. In this paper, we develop a three-dimensional model of a soft octopus arm, equipped with biomechanically realistic muscle actuation. Internal forces and couples exerted by all major muscle groups are considered. An energy shaping control method is described to coordinate muscle activity so as to grasp and reach in 3D space. Key contributions of this paper are: (i) modeling of major muscle groups to elicit three-dimensional movements; (ii) a mathematical formulation for muscle activations based on a stored energy function; and (iii) a computationally efficient procedure to design task-specific equilibrium configurations, obtained by solving an optimization problem in the Special Euclidean group SE(3). Muscle controls are then iteratively computed based on the co-state variable arising from the solution of the optimization problem. The approach is numerically demonstrated in the physically accurate software environment Elastica. Results of numerical experiments mimicking observed octopus behaviors are reported.
summary: Flexible octopus arms exhibit an exceptional ability to coordinate large numbers of degrees of freedom and perform complex manipulation tasks. As a consequence, these systems continue to attract the attention of biologists and roboticists alike. In this paper, we develop a three-dimensional model of a soft octopus arm, equipped with biomechanically realistic muscle actuation. Internal forces and couples exerted by all major muscle groups are considered. An energy shaping control method is described to coordinate muscle activity so as to grasp and reach in 3D space. Key contributions of this paper are: (i) modeling of major muscle groups to elicit three-dimensional movements; (ii) a mathematical formulation for muscle activations based on a stored energy function; and (iii) a computationally efficient procedure to design task-specific equilibrium configurations, obtained by solving an optimization problem in the Special Euclidean group SE(3). Muscle controls are then iteratively computed based on the co-state variable arising from the solution of the optimization problem. The approach is numerically demonstrated in the physically accurate software environment Elastica. Results of numerical experiments mimicking observed octopus behaviors are reported.
abstract_zh: 灵活的章鱼臂表现出协调大量自由度和执行复杂操作任务的卓越能力。因此，这些系统继续吸引生物学家和机器人学家的关注。在本文中，我们开发了一个软章鱼手臂的三维模型，配备了生物力学上真实的肌肉驱动。考虑所有主要肌肉群施加的内力和力偶。描述了一种能量整形控制方法来协调肌肉活动，以便在 3D 空间中抓取和到达。本文的主要贡献是：（i）对主要肌肉群进行建模以引发三维运动； (ii) 基于储存能量函数的肌肉激活数学公式； (iii) 设计特定任务平衡配置的计算高效程序，通过解决特殊欧几里得群 SE(3) 中的优化问题获得。然后根据优化问题的解决方案产生的共状态变量迭代计算肌肉控制。该方法在物理精确的软件环境 Elastica 中进行了数值演示。报告了模拟观察到的章鱼行为的数值实验结果。

AI.tldr: 本文开发了一种三维软体章鱼臂模型及能量塑形控制方法，用于模拟其复杂运动与抓取行为。
AI.motivation: 章鱼臂具有协调多自由度和复杂操作能力，其生物力学机制对仿生机器人研究具有重要启发意义。
AI.method: 基于生物力学肌肉模型构建三维软体臂，通过能量函数定义肌肉激活，并在SE(3)群中求解优化问题生成任务特定平衡态，迭代计算肌肉控制信号。
AI.result: 在Elastica仿真环境中验证了方法有效性，成功模拟了章鱼臂的抓取、移动等典型行为。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为软体机器人三维运动控制提供了新思路，展示了能量塑形方法在复杂生物系统建模中的潜力。

ai_content.tldr: 本文开发了一种三维软体章鱼臂模型及能量塑形控制方法，用于模拟其复杂运动与抓取行为。
ai_content.motivation: 章鱼臂具有协调多自由度和复杂操作能力，其生物力学机制对仿生机器人研究具有重要启发意义。
ai_content.method: 基于生物力学肌肉模型构建三维软体臂，通过能量函数定义肌肉激活，并在SE(3)群中求解优化问题生成任务特定平衡态，迭代计算肌肉控制信号。
ai_content.result: 在Elastica仿真环境中验证了方法有效性，成功模拟了章鱼臂的抓取、移动等典型行为。
ai_content.conclusion: 该方法为软体机器人三维运动控制提供了新思路，展示了能量塑形方法在复杂生物系统建模中的潜力。

motivation: 章鱼臂具有协调多自由度和复杂操作能力，其生物力学机制对仿生机器人研究具有重要启发意义。

search_text: Energy Shaping Control of a Muscular Octopus Arm Moving in Three Dimensions 肌肉章鱼臂三维运动的能量整形控制 Flexible octopus arms exhibit an exceptional ability to coordinate large numbers of degrees of freedom and perform complex manipulation tasks. As a consequence, these systems continue to attract the attention of biologists and roboticists alike. In this paper, we develop a three-dimensional model of a soft octopus arm, equipped with biomechanically realistic muscle actuation. Internal forces and couples exerted by all major muscle groups are considered. An energy shaping control method is described to coordinate muscle activity so as to grasp and reach in 3D space. Key contributions of this paper are: (i) modeling of major muscle groups to elicit three-dimensional movements; (ii) a mathematical formulation for muscle activations based on a stored energy function; and (iii) a computationally efficient procedure to design task-specific equilibrium configurations, obtained by solving an optimization problem in the Special Euclidean group SE(3). Muscle controls are then iteratively computed based on the co-state variable arising from the solution of the optimization problem. The approach is numerically demonstrated in the physically accurate software environment Elastica. Results of numerical experiments mimicking observed octopus behaviors are reported. 灵活的章鱼臂表现出协调大量自由度和执行复杂操作任务的卓越能力。因此，这些系统继续吸引生物学家和机器人学家的关注。在本文中，我们开发了一个软章鱼手臂的三维模型，配备了生物力学上真实的肌肉驱动。考虑所有主要肌肉群施加的内力和力偶。描述了一种能量整形控制方法来协调肌肉活动，以便在 3D 空间中抓取和到达。本文的主要贡献是：（i）对主要肌肉群进行建模以引发三维运动； (ii) 基于储存能量函数的肌肉激活数学公式； (iii) 设计特定任务平衡配置的计算高效程序，通过解决特殊欧几里得群 SE(3) 中的优化问题获得。然后根据优化问题的解决方案产生的共状态变量迭代计算肌肉控制。该方法在物理精确的软件环境 Elastica 中进行了数值演示。报告了模拟观察到的章鱼行为的数值实验结果。 本文开发了一种三维软体章鱼臂模型及能量塑形控制方法，用于模拟其复杂运动与抓取行为。 Heng-Sheng Chang,Udit Halder,Chia-Hsien Shih,Noel Naughton,Mattia Gazzola,Prashant G. Mehta eess.SY,cs.RO,physics.bio-ph

authors_text: Alianna J. Maren
title: A Variational Approach to Parameter Estimation for Characterizing 2-D Cluster Variation Method Topographies
title_zh: 用于表征二维聚类变分方法拓扑的参数估计变分方法
comment: 56 pp., 5 figures, 39 references. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:1909.09366
comments: 56 pp., 5 figures, 39 references. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:1909.09366
abstract: One of the biggest challenges in characterizing 2-D topographies is succinctly communicating the dominant nature of local configurations. In a 2-D grid composed of bistate units, this could be expressed as finding the characteristic configuration variables such as nearest-neighbor pairs and triplet combinations. The 2-D cluster variation method (CVM) provides a theoretical framework for associating a set of configuration variables with only two parameters, for a system that is at free energy equilibrium. This work presents a method for determining which of many possible two-parameter sets provides the ``most suitable'' match for a given 2-D topography, drawing from methods used for variational inference. This particular work focuses exclusively on topographies for which the activation enthalpy parameter (epsilon_0) is zero, so that the distribution between two states is equiprobable. This condition is used since, when the two states are equiprobable, there is an analytic solution giving the configuration variable values as functions of the h-value, where we define h in terms of the interaction enthalpy parameter (epsilon_1) as h = exp(2*epsilon_1). This allows the computationally-achieved configuration variable values to be compared with the analytically-predicted values for a given h-value. The method is illustrated using four patterns derived from three different naturally-occurring black-and-white topographies, where each pattern meets the equiprobability criterion. We achieve expected results, that is, as the patterns progress from having relatively low numbers of like-near-like nodes to increasing like-near-like masses, the h-values for each corresponding free energy-minimized model also increase. Further, the corresponding configuration variable values for the (free energy-minimized) model patterns are in approximate alignment with the analytically-predicted values.

In a 2-D grid composed of bistate units, this could be expressed as finding the characteristic configuration variables such as nearest-neighbor pairs and triplet combinations. The 2-D cluster variation method (CVM) provides a theoretical framework for associating a set of configuration variables with only two parameters, for a system that is at free energy equilibrium. This work presents a method for determining which of many possible two-parameter sets provides the ``most suitable'' match for a given 2-D topography, drawing from methods used for variational inference. This particular work focuses exclusively on topographies for which the activation enthalpy parameter (epsilon_0) is zero, so that the distribution between two states is equiprobable. This condition is used since, when the two states are equiprobable, there is an analytic solution giving the configuration variable values as functions of the h-value, where we define h in terms of the interaction enthalpy parameter (epsilon_1) as h = exp(2*epsilon_1). This allows the computationally-achieved configuration variable values to be compared with the analytically-predicted values for a given h-value. The method is illustrated using four patterns derived from three different naturally-occurring black-and-white topographies, where each pattern meets the equiprobability criterion. We achieve expected results, that is, as the patterns progress from having relatively low numbers of like-near-like nodes to increasing like-near-like masses, the h-values for each corresponding free energy-minimized model also increase. Further, the corresponding configuration variable values for the (free energy-minimized) model patterns are in approximate alignment with the analytically-predicted values.
abstract_zh: 表征二维地形的最大挑战之一是简洁地传达局部配置的主导性质。在由双态单元组成的二维网格中，这可以表示为寻找特征配置变量，例如最近邻对和三元组组合。二维簇变分法 (CVM) 提供了一个理论框架，用于将一组配置变量与仅两个参数相关联，用于处于自由能平衡的系统。这项工作提出了一种方法，用于确定许多可能的双参数集中的哪一个为给定的二维地形提供“最合适”的匹配，借鉴用于变分推理的方法。这项特别的工作专门关注激活焓参数 (epsilon_0) 为零的拓扑，因此两种状态之间的分布是等概率的。使用此条件是因为，当两个状态等概率时，存在一个解析解，将配置变量值给出为 h 值的函数，其中我们根据相互作用焓参数 (epsilon_1) 将 h 定义为 h = exp(2*epsilon_1)。这允许将计算获得的配置变量值与给定 h 值的分析预测值进行比较。该方法使用从三种不同的自然发生的黑白地形导出的四种图案进行说明，其中每种图案都满足等概率标准。我们达到了预期的结果，即，随着模式从具有相对较少数量的类近类节点发展到增加类近类质量，每个相应的自由能最小化模型的 h 值也会增加。此外，（自由能最小化）模型模式的相应配置变量值与分析预测值大致一致。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于变分推断的方法，用于确定最适合描述给定二维拓扑结构的双参数集，以表征二维集群变化方法（CVM）的拓扑特征。
AI.motivation: 在二维网格中，表征局部构型的主导特征面临挑战，需通过简洁的配置变量（如最近邻对和三元组）进行描述。CVM框架可通过双参数关联配置变量，但需确定最佳参数匹配。
AI.method: 利用变分推断方法，针对激活焓参数为零的等概率状态，通过计算配置变量并与解析解对比，确定最优双参数集。方法基于h值（由相互作用焓参数定义）与拓扑模式的对应关系进行验证。
AI.result: 实验显示，随着拓扑模式中同类邻近节点比例增加，对应自由能最小化模型的h值逐渐增大，且计算得到的配置变量值与解析预测值基本吻合。
AI.conclusion: 该方法能有效匹配自由能最小化模型与等概率二维拓扑结构，验证了变分推断在参数估计中的适用性。

authors_text: Yusuke Ono,Sunao Hara,Masanobu Abe
title: Prediction method of Soundscape Impressions using Environmental Sounds and Aerial Photographs
title_zh: 利用环境声音和航空照片预测声景印象的方法
comment: Submitted APSIPA ASC 2022
comments: Submitted APSIPA ASC 2022
abstract: We investigate an method for quantifying city characteristics based on impressions of a sound environment. The quantification of the city characteristics will be beneficial to government policy planning, tourism projects, etc. In this study, we try to predict two soundscape impressions, meaning pleasantness and eventfulness, using sound data collected by the cloud-sensing method. The collected sounds comprise meta information of recording location using Global Positioning System. Furthermore, the soundscape impressions and sound-source features are separately assigned to the cloud-sensing sounds by assessments defined using Swedish Soundscape-Quality Protocol, assessing the quality of the acoustic environment. The prediction models are built using deep neural networks with multi-layer perceptron for the input of 10-second sound and the aerial photographs of its location. An acoustic feature comprises equivalent noise level and outputs of octave-band filters every second, and statistics of them in 10~s. An image feature is extracted from an aerial photograph using ResNet-50 and autoencoder architecture. We perform comparison experiments to demonstrate the benefit of each feature. As a result of the comparison, aerial photographs and sound-source features are efficient to predict impression information. Additionally, even if the sound-source features are predicted using acoustic and image features, the features also show fine results to predict the soundscape impression close to the result of oracle sound-source features.
summary: We investigate an method for quantifying city characteristics based on impressions of a sound environment. The quantification of the city characteristics will be beneficial to government policy planning, tourism projects, etc. In this study, we try to predict two soundscape impressions, meaning pleasantness and eventfulness, using sound data collected by the cloud-sensing method. The collected sounds comprise meta information of recording location using Global Positioning System. Furthermore, the soundscape impressions and sound-source features are separately assigned to the cloud-sensing sounds by assessments defined using Swedish Soundscape-Quality Protocol, assessing the quality of the acoustic environment. The prediction models are built using deep neural networks with multi-layer perceptron for the input of 10-second sound and the aerial photographs of its location. An acoustic feature comprises equivalent noise level and outputs of octave-band filters every second, and statistics of them in 10~s. An image feature is extracted from an aerial photograph using ResNet-50 and autoencoder architecture. We perform comparison experiments to demonstrate the benefit of each feature. As a result of the comparison, aerial photographs and sound-source features are efficient to predict impression information. Additionally, even if the sound-source features are predicted using acoustic and image features, the features also show fine results to predict the soundscape impression close to the result of oracle sound-source features.
abstract_zh: 我们研究了一种基于声音环境印象来量化城市特征的方法。城市特征的量化将有利于政府政策规划、旅游项目等。在本研究中，我们尝试利用云感知方法收集的声音数据来预测两种声景印象，即愉悦感和多事性。收集的声音包括使用全球定位系统记录位置的元信息。此外，通过使用瑞典声景质量协议定义的评估，将声景印象和声源特征分别分配给云感知声音，从而评估声学环境的质量。预测模型是使用具有多层感知器的深度神经网络构建的，用于输入 10 秒的声音及其位置的航空照片。声学特征包括等效噪声水平和每秒倍频程滤波器的输出，以及10~s内的统计。使用 ResNet-50 和自动编码器架构从航空照片中提取图像特征。我们进行比较实验来展示每个功能的好处。比较的结果是，航空照片和声源特征可以有效地预测印象信息。此外，即使使用声学和图像特征来预测声源特征，这些特征也显示出与预言机声源特征的结果相近的良好结果来预测音景印象。

AI.tldr: 开发一种结合环境声音和航拍照片预测城市声景印象（愉悦感与事件性）的方法。
AI.motivation: 量化城市声景特征可辅助政府规划与旅游开发，但传统方法依赖人工评估效率低，需自动化预测技术。
AI.method: 采用云传感收集10秒环境声音及GPS定位数据，结合航拍照片；提取声学特征（等效噪声级、频段滤波统计）与图像特征（ResNet-50+自编码器），通过多层感知器深度神经网络建模预测。
AI.result: 航拍图像与声源特征对预测声景印象效果显著，且通过声学与图像特征预测的声源特征亦能接近真实声源特征的预测精度。
AI.conclusion: 融合多模态数据（声音+图像）可有效预测声景印象，为城市声环境智能化评估提供新方法。

ai_content.tldr: 开发一种结合环境声音和航拍照片预测城市声景印象（愉悦感与事件性）的方法。
ai_content.motivation: 量化城市声景特征可辅助政府规划与旅游开发，但传统方法依赖人工评估效率低，需自动化预测技术。
ai_content.method: 采用云传感收集10秒环境声音及GPS定位数据，结合航拍照片；提取声学特征（等效噪声级、频段滤波统计）与图像特征（ResNet-50+自编码器），通过多层感知器深度神经网络建模预测。
ai_content.result: 航拍图像与声源特征对预测声景印象效果显著，且通过声学与图像特征预测的声源特征亦能接近真实声源特征的预测精度。
ai_content.conclusion: 融合多模态数据（声音+图像）可有效预测声景印象，为城市声环境智能化评估提供新方法。

search_text: Prediction method of Soundscape Impressions using Environmental Sounds and Aerial Photographs 利用环境声音和航空照片预测声景印象的方法 We investigate an method for quantifying city characteristics based on impressions of a sound environment. The quantification of the city characteristics will be beneficial to government policy planning, tourism projects, etc. In this study, we try to predict two soundscape impressions, meaning pleasantness and eventfulness, using sound data collected by the cloud-sensing method. The collected sounds comprise meta information of recording location using Global Positioning System. Furthermore, the soundscape impressions and sound-source features are separately assigned to the cloud-sensing sounds by assessments defined using Swedish Soundscape-Quality Protocol, assessing the quality of the acoustic environment. The prediction models are built using deep neural networks with multi-layer perceptron for the input of 10-second sound and the aerial photographs of its location. An acoustic feature comprises equivalent noise level and outputs of octave-band filters every second, and statistics of them in 10~s. An image feature is extracted from an aerial photograph using ResNet-50 and autoencoder architecture. We perform comparison experiments to demonstrate the benefit of each feature. As a result of the comparison, aerial photographs and sound-source features are efficient to predict impression information. Additionally, even if the sound-source features are predicted using acoustic and image features, the features also show fine results to predict the soundscape impression close to the result of oracle sound-source features. 我们研究了一种基于声音环境印象来量化城市特征的方法。城市特征的量化将有利于政府政策规划、旅游项目等。在本研究中，我们尝试利用云感知方法收集的声音数据来预测两种声景印象，即愉悦感和多事性。收集的声音包括使用全球定位系统记录位置的元信息。此外，通过使用瑞典声景质量协议定义的评估，将声景印象和声源特征分别分配给云感知声音，从而评估声学环境的质量。预测模型是使用具有多层感知器的深度神经网络构建的，用于输入 10 秒的声音及其位置的航空照片。声学特征包括等效噪声水平和每秒倍频程滤波器的输出，以及10~s内的统计。使用 ResNet-50 和自动编码器架构从航空照片中提取图像特征。我们进行比较实验来展示每个功能的好处。比较的结果是，航空照片和声源特征可以有效地预测印象信息。此外，即使使用声学和图像特征来预测声源特征，这些特征也显示出与预言机声源特征的结果相近的良好结果来预测音景印象。 开发一种结合环境声音和航拍照片预测城市声景印象（愉悦感与事件性）的方法。 Yusuke Ono,Sunao Hara,Masanobu Abe cs.SD,cs.MM,eess.AS

authors_text: Finley Walden,Sagar Dasgupta,Mizanur Rahman,Mhafuzul Islam
title: Improving the Environmental Perception of Autonomous Vehicles using Deep Learning-based Audio Classification
title_zh: 使用基于深度学习的音频分类提高自动驾驶汽车的环境感知
abstract: Sense of hearing is crucial for autonomous vehicles (AVs) to better perceive its surrounding environment. Although visual sensors of an AV, such as camera, lidar, and radar, help to see its surrounding environment, an AV cannot see beyond those sensors line of sight. On the other hand, an AV s sense of hearing cannot be obstructed by line of sight. For example, an AV can identify an emergency vehicle s siren through audio classification even though the emergency vehicle is not within the line of sight of the AV. Thus, auditory perception is complementary to the camera, lidar, and radar-based perception systems. This paper presents a deep learning-based robust audio classification framework aiming to achieve improved environmental perception for AVs. The presented framework leverages a deep Convolution Neural Network (CNN) to classify different audio classes. UrbanSound8k, an urban environment dataset, is used to train and test the developed framework. Seven audio classes i.e., air conditioner, car horn, children playing, dog bark, engine idling, gunshot, and siren, are identified from the UrbanSound8k dataset because of their relevancy related to AVs. Our framework can classify different audio classes with 97.82% accuracy. Moreover, the audio classification accuracies with all ten classes are presented, which proves that our framework performed better in the case of AV-related sounds compared to the existing audio classification frameworks.

Although visual sensors of an AV, such as camera, lidar, and radar, help to see its surrounding environment, an AV cannot see beyond those sensors line of sight. On the other hand, an AV s sense of hearing cannot be obstructed by line of sight. For example, an AV can identify an emergency vehicle s siren through audio classification even though the emergency vehicle is not within the line of sight of the AV. Thus, auditory perception is complementary to the camera, lidar, and radar-based perception systems. This paper presents a deep learning-based robust audio classification framework aiming to achieve improved environmental perception for AVs. The presented framework leverages a deep Convolution Neural Network (CNN) to classify different audio classes. UrbanSound8k, an urban environment dataset, is used to train and test the developed framework. Seven audio classes i.e., air conditioner, car horn, children playing, dog bark, engine idling, gunshot, and siren, are identified from the UrbanSound8k dataset because of their relevancy related to AVs. Our framework can classify different audio classes with 97.82% accuracy. Moreover, the audio classification accuracies with all ten classes are presented, which proves that our framework performed better in the case of AV-related sounds compared to the existing audio classification frameworks.
abstract_zh: 听觉对于自动驾驶汽车（AV）更好地感知周围环境至关重要。尽管自动驾驶汽车的视觉传感器（例如摄像头、激光雷达和雷达）有助于查看周围环境，但自动驾驶汽车无法看到这些传感器视线之外的情况。另一方面，AV的听觉不能被视线阻挡。例如，即使紧急车辆不在自动驾驶汽车的视线范围内，自动驾驶汽车也可以通过音频分类识别紧急车辆的警报器。因此，听觉感知是对摄像头、激光雷达和雷达感知系统的补充。本文提出了一种基于深度学习的鲁棒音频分类框架，旨在改善自动驾驶汽车的环境感知。所提出的框架利用深度卷积神经网络（CNN）对不同的音频类别进行分类。 UrbanSound8k是一个城市环境数据集，用于训练和测试开发的框架。从 UrbanSound8k 数据集中识别出七个音频类，即空调、汽车喇叭、儿童玩耍、狗吠、发动机空转、枪声和警报器，因为它们与 AV 相关。我们的框架可以以 97.82% 的准确率对不同的音频类别进行分类。此外，还给出了所有十个类别的音频分类精度，这证明与现有的音频分类框架相比，我们的框架在 AV 相关声音的情况下表现更好。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于深度学习的音频分类框架，旨在通过听觉感知提升自动驾驶车辆（AV）的环境感知能力。
AI.motivation: 视觉传感器（如摄像头、激光雷达）存在视线遮挡限制，而听觉感知不受视线影响，可识别如警报声等关键环境信息，从而弥补视觉系统的不足。
AI.method: 采用卷积神经网络（CNN）模型，使用UrbanSound8k数据集中的七类与AV相关的音频（如警笛、汽车喇叭等）进行训练和测试。
AI.result: 框架在七类音频分类中达到97.82%的准确率，且在全部十类音频分类中表现优于现有分类方法。
AI.conclusion: 该音频分类框架有效提升了AV对环境的感知能力，尤其在与车辆安全相关的音频检测上具有显著优势。

authors_text: Sagar Dasgupta,Kazi Shakib,Mizanur Rahman,Silvana V Croope,Steven Jones
title: Audio Analytics-based Human Trafficking Detection Framework for Autonomous Vehicles
title_zh: 基于音频分析的自动驾驶汽车人口贩卖检测框架
abstract: Human trafficking is a universal problem, persistent despite numerous efforts to combat it globally. Individuals of any age, race, ethnicity, sex, gender identity, sexual orientation, nationality, immigration status, cultural background, religion, socioeconomic class, and education can be a victim of human trafficking. With the advancements in technology and the introduction of autonomous vehicles (AVs), human traffickers will adopt new ways to transport victims, which could accelerate the growth of organized human trafficking networks, which can make the detection of trafficking in persons more challenging for law enforcement agencies. The objective of this study is to develop an innovative audio analytics-based human trafficking detection framework for autonomous vehicles. The primary contributions of this study are to: (i) define four non-trivial, feasible, and realistic human trafficking scenarios for AVs; (ii) create a new and comprehensive audio dataset related to human trafficking with five classes i.e., crying, screaming, car door banging, car noise, and conversation; and (iii) develop a deep 1-D Convolution Neural Network (CNN) architecture for audio data classification related to human trafficking. We have also conducted a case study using the new audio dataset and evaluated the audio classification performance of the deep 1-D CNN. Our analyses reveal that the deep 1-D CNN can distinguish sound coming from a human trafficking victim from a non-human trafficking sound with an accuracy of 95%, which proves the efficacy of our framework.
summary: Human trafficking is a universal problem, persistent despite numerous efforts to combat it globally. Individuals of any age, race, ethnicity, sex, gender identity, sexual orientation, nationality, immigration status, cultural background, religion, socioeconomic class, and education can be a victim of human trafficking. With the advancements in technology and the introduction of autonomous vehicles (AVs), human traffickers will adopt new ways to transport victims, which could accelerate the growth of organized human trafficking networks, which can make the detection of trafficking in persons more challenging for law enforcement agencies. The objective of this study is to develop an innovative audio analytics-based human trafficking detection framework for autonomous vehicles. The primary contributions of this study are to: (i) define four non-trivial, feasible, and realistic human trafficking scenarios for AVs; (ii) create a new and comprehensive audio dataset related to human trafficking with five classes i.e., crying, screaming, car door banging, car noise, and conversation; and (iii) develop a deep 1-D Convolution Neural Network (CNN) architecture for audio data classification related to human trafficking. We have also conducted a case study using the new audio dataset and evaluated the audio classification performance of the deep 1-D CNN. Our analyses reveal that the deep 1-D CNN can distinguish sound coming from a human trafficking victim from a non-human trafficking sound with an accuracy of 95%, which proves the efficacy of our framework.
abstract_zh: 人口贩运是一个普遍问题，尽管全球为打击人口贩运做出了许多努力，但该问题仍然持续存在。任何年龄、种族、民族、性别、性别认同、性取向、国籍、移民身份、文化背景、宗教、社会经济阶层和教育程度的个人都可能成为人口贩运的受害者。随着技术的进步和自动驾驶车辆（AV）的引入，人口贩运者将采用新的方式来运输受害者，这可能会加速有组织的人口贩运网络的发展，从而使执法机构侦查人口贩运活动更具挑战性。本研究的目的是为自动驾驶汽车开发一种基于音频分析的创新型人口贩运检测框架。这项研究的主要贡献是：（i）为自动驾驶汽车定义了四种重要、可行且现实的人口贩运场景； (ii) 创建一个与人口贩运相关的新的综合音频数据集，分为五个类别，即哭泣、尖叫、车门撞击、汽车噪音和对话； (iii) 开发用于与人口贩运相关的音频数据分类的深度一维卷积神经网络 (CNN) 架构。我们还使用新的音频数据集进行了案例研究，并评估了深度一维 CNN 的音频分类性能。我们的分析表明，深度一维 CNN 可以区分来自人口贩运受害者的声音和非人口贩运的声音，准确率达到 95%，这证明了我们框架的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于音频分析的人口贩卖检测框架，用于自动驾驶车辆，通过分类音频数据识别潜在的人口贩卖活动。
AI.motivation: 人口贩卖问题持续存在，而自动驾驶车辆的普及可能使犯罪分子采用新手段运输受害者，增加执法难度，亟需创新检测技术。
AI.method: 定义四种现实场景，构建包含哭泣、尖叫、车门撞击等五类音频的专用数据集，并设计深度1-D CNN模型进行音频分类。
AI.result: 实验表明，该模型可将人口贩卖相关音频与非相关音频区分，准确率达95%。
AI.conclusion: 该框架验证了音频分析在自动驾驶车辆中检测人口贩卖的有效性，为执法机构提供可行技术方案。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于音频分析的人口贩卖检测框架，用于自动驾驶车辆，通过分类音频数据识别潜在的人口贩卖活动。
ai_content.motivation: 人口贩卖问题持续存在，而自动驾驶车辆的普及可能使犯罪分子采用新手段运输受害者，增加执法难度，亟需创新检测技术。
ai_content.method: 定义四种现实场景，构建包含哭泣、尖叫、车门撞击等五类音频的专用数据集，并设计深度1-D CNN模型进行音频分类。
ai_content.result: 实验表明，该模型可将人口贩卖相关音频与非相关音频区分，准确率达95%。
ai_content.conclusion: 该框架验证了音频分析在自动驾驶车辆中检测人口贩卖的有效性，为执法机构提供可行技术方案。

search_text: Audio Analytics-based Human Trafficking Detection Framework for Autonomous Vehicles 基于音频分析的自动驾驶汽车人口贩卖检测框架 Human trafficking is a universal problem, persistent despite numerous efforts to combat it globally. Individuals of any age, race, ethnicity, sex, gender identity, sexual orientation, nationality, immigration status, cultural background, religion, socioeconomic class, and education can be a victim of human trafficking. With the advancements in technology and the introduction of autonomous vehicles (AVs), human traffickers will adopt new ways to transport victims, which could accelerate the growth of organized human trafficking networks, which can make the detection of trafficking in persons more challenging for law enforcement agencies. The objective of this study is to develop an innovative audio analytics-based human trafficking detection framework for autonomous vehicles. The primary contributions of this study are to: (i) define four non-trivial, feasible, and realistic human trafficking scenarios for AVs; (ii) create a new and comprehensive audio dataset related to human trafficking with five classes i.e., crying, screaming, car door banging, car noise, and conversation; and (iii) develop a deep 1-D Convolution Neural Network (CNN) architecture for audio data classification related to human trafficking. We have also conducted a case study using the new audio dataset and evaluated the audio classification performance of the deep 1-D CNN. Our analyses reveal that the deep 1-D CNN can distinguish sound coming from a human trafficking victim from a non-human trafficking sound with an accuracy of 95%, which proves the efficacy of our framework. 人口贩运是一个普遍问题，尽管全球为打击人口贩运做出了许多努力，但该问题仍然持续存在。任何年龄、种族、民族、性别、性别认同、性取向、国籍、移民身份、文化背景、宗教、社会经济阶层和教育程度的个人都可能成为人口贩运的受害者。随着技术的进步和自动驾驶车辆（AV）的引入，人口贩运者将采用新的方式来运输受害者，这可能会加速有组织的人口贩运网络的发展，从而使执法机构侦查人口贩运活动更具挑战性。本研究的目的是为自动驾驶汽车开发一种基于音频分析的创新型人口贩运检测框架。这项研究的主要贡献是：（i）为自动驾驶汽车定义了四种重要、可行且现实的人口贩运场景； (ii) 创建一个与人口贩运相关的新的综合音频数据集，分为五个类别，即哭泣、尖叫、车门撞击、汽车噪音和对话； (iii) 开发用于与人口贩运相关的音频数据分类的深度一维卷积神经网络 (CNN) 架构。我们还使用新的音频数据集进行了案例研究，并评估了深度一维 CNN 的音频分类性能。我们的分析表明，深度一维 CNN 可以区分来自人口贩运受害者的声音和非人口贩运的声音，准确率达到 95%，这证明了我们框架的有效性。 本文提出了一种基于音频分析的人口贩卖检测框架，用于自动驾驶车辆，通过分类音频数据识别潜在的人口贩卖活动。 Sagar Dasgupta,Kazi Shakib,Mizanur Rahman,Silvana V Croope,Steven Jones cs.AI,cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Jia Lin Hau,Marek Petrik,Mohammad Ghavamzadeh,Reazul Russel
title: RASR: Risk-Averse Soft-Robust MDPs with EVaR and Entropic Risk
title_zh: RASR：具有 EVaR 和熵风险的风险规避软鲁棒 MDP
comment: ef:Artificial Intelligence and Statistics (AISTATS), 2023
comments: ef:Artificial Intelligence and Statistics (AISTATS), 2023
abstract: Prior work on safe Reinforcement Learning (RL) has studied risk-aversion to randomness in dynamics (aleatory) and to model uncertainty (epistemic) in isolation. We propose and analyze a new framework to jointly model the risk associated with epistemic and aleatory uncertainties in finite-horizon and discounted infinite-horizon MDPs. We call this framework that combines Risk-Averse and Soft-Robust methods RASR. We show that when the risk-aversion is defined using either EVaR or the entropic risk, the optimal policy in RASR can be computed efficiently using a new dynamic program formulation with a time-dependent risk level. As a result, the optimal risk-averse policies are deterministic but time-dependent, even in the infinite-horizon discounted setting. We also show that particular RASR objectives reduce to risk-averse RL with mean posterior transition probabilities. Our empirical results show that our new algorithms consistently mitigate uncertainty as measured by EVaR and other standard risk measures.
summary: Prior work on safe Reinforcement Learning (RL) has studied risk-aversion to randomness in dynamics (aleatory) and to model uncertainty (epistemic) in isolation. We propose and analyze a new framework to jointly model the risk associated with epistemic and aleatory uncertainties in finite-horizon and discounted infinite-horizon MDPs. We call this framework that combines Risk-Averse and Soft-Robust methods RASR. We show that when the risk-aversion is defined using either EVaR or the entropic risk, the optimal policy in RASR can be computed efficiently using a new dynamic program formulation with a time-dependent risk level. As a result, the optimal risk-averse policies are deterministic but time-dependent, even in the infinite-horizon discounted setting. We also show that particular RASR objectives reduce to risk-averse RL with mean posterior transition probabilities. Our empirical results show that our new algorithms consistently mitigate uncertainty as measured by EVaR and other standard risk measures.
abstract_zh: 先前有关安全强化学习 (RL) 的工作研究了对动态随机性（偶然性）的风险厌恶以及孤立地对不确定性（认知性）进行建模。我们提出并分析了一个新框架，以联合建模与有限范围和贴现无限范围 MDP 中的认知和偶然不确定性相关的风险。我们将这个结合了风险规避和软鲁棒方法的框架称为 RASR。我们表明，当使用 EVaR 或熵风险定义风险规避时，可以使用具有时间依赖性风险水平的新动态程序公式来有效计算 RASR 中的最优策略。因此，即使在无限期贴现环境下，最优的风险规避政策也是确定性的，但与时间相关。我们还表明，特定的 RASR 目标可简化为具有平均后验转移概率的风险规避 RL。我们的实证结果表明，我们的新算法始终如一地减轻了 EVaR 和其他标准风险衡量指标所衡量的不确定性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出RASR框架，结合风险厌恶与软鲁棒方法，联合建模有限时域和无限时域MDP中的认知与偶然不确定性风险。
AI.motivation: 现有安全强化学习工作分别独立处理动态随机性（偶然不确定性）和模型不确定性（认知不确定性），缺乏联合建模方法。
AI.method: 通过EVaR和熵风险定义风险厌恶，提出时间依赖风险水平的动态规划算法，得到确定性但时变的最优策略。
AI.result: 实验表明新算法有效降低EVaR等风险度量值，且特定目标可退化为基于后验均值转移概率的风险厌恶RL。
AI.conclusion: RASR框架在无限时域折扣设置下仍能高效计算确定性策略，且包含传统风险厌恶RL作为特例。

authors_text: Nikos Athanasiou,Mathis Petrovich,Michael J. Black,Gül Varol
title: TEACH: Temporal Action Composition for 3D Humans
title_zh: TEACH：3D 人类的时间动作组合
comment: 3DV 2022 Camera Ready, Affiliations corrected
comments: 3DV 2022 Camera Ready, Affiliations corrected
abstract: Given a series of natural language descriptions, our task is to generate 3D human motions that correspond semantically to the text, and follow the temporal order of the instructions. In particular, our goal is to enable the synthesis of a series of actions, which we refer to as temporal action composition. The current state of the art in text-conditioned motion synthesis only takes a single action or a single sentence as input. This is partially due to lack of suitable training data containing action sequences, but also due to the computational complexity of their non-autoregressive model formulation, which does not scale well to long sequences. In this work, we address both issues. First, we exploit the recent BABEL motion-text collection, which has a wide range of labeled actions, many of which occur in a sequence with transitions between them. Next, we design a Transformer-based approach that operates non-autoregressively within an action, but autoregressively within the sequence of actions. This hierarchical formulation proves effective in our experiments when compared with multiple baselines. Our approach, called TEACH for "TEmporal Action Compositions for Human motions", produces realistic human motions for a wide variety of actions and temporal compositions from language descriptions. To encourage work on this new task, we make our code available for research purposes at our $\href{teach.is.tue.mpg.de}{\text{website}}$.
summary: Given a series of natural language descriptions, our task is to generate 3D human motions that correspond semantically to the text, and follow the temporal order of the instructions. In particular, our goal is to enable the synthesis of a series of actions, which we refer to as temporal action composition. The current state of the art in text-conditioned motion synthesis only takes a single action or a single sentence as input. This is partially due to lack of suitable training data containing action sequences, but also due to the computational complexity of their non-autoregressive model formulation, which does not scale well to long sequences. In this work, we address both issues. First, we exploit the recent BABEL motion-text collection, which has a wide range of labeled actions, many of which occur in a sequence with transitions between them. Next, we design a Transformer-based approach that operates non-autoregressively within an action, but autoregressively within the sequence of actions. This hierarchical formulation proves effective in our experiments when compared with multiple baselines. Our approach, called TEACH for "TEmporal Action Compositions for Human motions", produces realistic human motions for a wide variety of actions and temporal compositions from language descriptions. To encourage work on this new task, we make our code available for research purposes at our $\href{teach.is.tue.mpg.de}{\text{website}}$.
abstract_zh: 给定一系列自然语言描述，我们的任务是生成与文本语义对应的 3D 人体动作，并遵循指令的时间顺序。特别是，我们的目标是实现一系列动作的合成，我们将其称为时间动作合成。文本条件运动合成的当前技术水平仅采用单个动作或单个句子作为输入。这部分是由于缺乏包含动作序列的合适训练数据，但也由于其非自回归模型公式的计算复杂性，它不能很好地扩展到长序列。在这项工作中，我们解决了这两个问题。首先，我们利用最近的 BABEL 运动文本集合，它具有广泛的标记动作，其中许多动作发生在它们之间有转换的序列中。接下来，我们设计了一种基于 Transformer 的方法，该方法在动作中以非自回归方式运行，但在动作序列中以自回归方式运行。与多个基线相比，这种分层公式在我们的实验中被证明是有效的。我们的方法称为“TEACH”（“人类运动的时间动作组合”），可以根据语言描述为各种动作和时间组合生成逼真的人体动作。为了鼓励这项新任务的工作，我们在 $\href{teach.is.tue.mpg.de}{\text{website}}$ 上提供了用于研究目的的代码。

AI.tldr: 本文提出TEACH方法，通过自然语言描述生成符合时间顺序的3D人体动作序列。
AI.motivation: 现有文本条件动作生成方法仅支持单个动作或句子输入，受限于缺乏动作序列训练数据及非自回归模型的计算复杂度。
AI.method: 利用BABEL数据集构建动作序列，并设计分层Transformer模型：在单个动作内采用非自回归生成，动作序列间采用自回归处理。
AI.result: TEACH在多种动作及时间组合场景下生成真实人体运动，实验优于多个基线方法，开源代码促进相关研究。
AI.conclusion: 通过数据与模型创新，解决了动作序列生成难题，为文本到3D人体运动的时序合成提供有效方案。

This is partially due to lack of suitable training data containing action sequences, but also due to the computational complexity of their non-autoregressive model formulation, which does not scale well to long sequences. In this work, we address both issues. First, we exploit the recent BABEL motion-text collection, which has a wide range of labeled actions, many of which occur in a sequence with transitions between them. Next, we design a Transformer-based approach that operates non-autoregressively within an action, but autoregressively within the sequence of actions. This hierarchical formulation proves effective in our experiments when compared with multiple baselines. Our approach, called TEACH for "TEmporal Action Compositions for Human motions", produces realistic human motions for a wide variety of actions and temporal compositions from language descriptions. To encourage work on this new task, we make our code available for research purposes at our $\href{teach.is.tue.mpg.de}{\text{website}}$. 给定一系列自然语言描述，我们的任务是生成与文本语义对应的 3D 人体动作，并遵循指令的时间顺序。特别是，我们的目标是实现一系列动作的合成，我们将其称为时间动作合成。文本条件运动合成的当前技术水平仅采用单个动作或单个句子作为输入。这部分是由于缺乏包含动作序列的合适训练数据，但也由于其非自回归模型公式的计算复杂性，它不能很好地扩展到长序列。在这项工作中，我们解决了这两个问题。首先，我们利用最近的 BABEL 运动文本集合，它具有广泛的标记动作，其中许多动作发生在它们之间有转换的序列中。接下来，我们设计了一种基于 Transformer 的方法，该方法在动作中以非自回归方式运行，但在动作序列中以自回归方式运行。与多个基线相比，这种分层公式在我们的实验中被证明是有效的。我们的方法称为“TEACH”（“人类运动的时间动作组合”），可以根据语言描述为各种动作和时间组合生成逼真的人体动作。为了鼓励这项新任务的工作，我们在 $\href{teach.is.tue.mpg.de}{\text{website}}$ 上提供了用于研究目的的代码。 本文提出TEACH方法，通过自然语言描述生成符合时间顺序的3D人体动作序列。 Nikos Athanasiou,Mathis Petrovich,Michael J. Black,Gül Varol cs.CV

authors_text: Hayato Futami,Hirofumi Inaguma,Sei Ueno,Masato Mimura,Shinsuke Sakai,Tatsuya Kawahara
title: Non-autoregressive Error Correction for CTC-based ASR with Phone-conditioned Masked LM
title_zh: 使用电话条件屏蔽 LM 对基于 CTC 的 ASR 进行非自回归纠错
comment: Accepted in Interspeech2022
comments: Accepted in Interspeech2022
abstract: Connectionist temporal classification (CTC) -based models are attractive in automatic speech recognition (ASR) because of their non-autoregressive nature. To take advantage of text-only data, language model (LM) integration approaches such as rescoring and shallow fusion have been widely used for CTC. However, they lose CTC's non-autoregressive nature because of the need for beam search, which slows down the inference speed. In this study, we propose an error correction method with phone-conditioned masked LM (PC-MLM). In the proposed method, less confident word tokens in a greedy decoded output from CTC are masked. PC-MLM then predicts these masked word tokens given unmasked words and phones supplementally predicted from CTC. We further extend it to Deletable PC-MLM in order to address insertion errors. Since both CTC and PC-MLM are non-autoregressive models, the method enables fast LM integration. Experimental evaluations on the Corpus of Spontaneous Japanese (CSJ) and TED-LIUM2 in domain adaptation setting shows that our proposed method outperformed rescoring and shallow fusion in terms of inference speed, and also in terms of recognition accuracy on CSJ.
summary: Connectionist temporal classification (CTC) -based models are attractive in automatic speech recognition (ASR) because of their non-autoregressive nature. To take advantage of text-only data, language model (LM) integration approaches such as rescoring and shallow fusion have been widely used for CTC. However, they lose CTC's non-autoregressive nature because of the need for beam search, which slows down the inference speed. In this study, we propose an error correction method with phone-conditioned masked LM (PC-MLM). In the proposed method, less confident word tokens in a greedy decoded output from CTC are masked. PC-MLM then predicts these masked word tokens given unmasked words and phones supplementally predicted from CTC. We further extend it to Deletable PC-MLM in order to address insertion errors. Since both CTC and PC-MLM are non-autoregressive models, the method enables fast LM integration. Experimental evaluations on the Corpus of Spontaneous Japanese (CSJ) and TED-LIUM2 in domain adaptation setting shows that our proposed method outperformed rescoring and shallow fusion in terms of inference speed, and also in terms of recognition accuracy on CSJ.
abstract_zh: 基于联结时间分类 (CTC) 的模型由于其非自回归性质而在自动语音识别 (ASR) 中很有吸引力。为了利用纯文本数据，重新评分和浅层融合等语言模型 (LM) 集成方法已广泛用于 CTC。然而，由于需要波束搜索，它们失去了 CTC 的非自回归性质，从而减慢了推理速度。在这项研究中，我们提出了一种电话条件屏蔽 LM (PC-MLM) 的纠错方法。在所提出的方法中，CTC 的贪婪解码输出中不太自信的单词标记被屏蔽。然后，PC-MLM 根据 CTC 补充预测的未屏蔽单词和音素来预测这些屏蔽单词标记。我们进一步将其扩展到可删除 PC-MLM 以解决插入错误。由于 CTC 和 PC-MLM 都是非自回归模型，因此该方法可以实现快速 LM 集成。在域适应设置中对自发日语语料库（CSJ）和 TED-LIUM2 的实验评估表明，我们提出的方法在推理速度以及 CSJ 上的识别精度方面优于重新评分和浅层融合。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于电话条件掩码语言模型（PC-MLM）的非自回归错误校正方法，用于改进CTC-based语音识别系统的准确性，同时保持其非自回归的快速推理特性。
AI.motivation: CTC模型虽具有非自回归的快速推理优势，但传统语言模型融合方法（如重打分、浅层融合）需依赖束搜索，导致推理速度下降。本文旨在开发无需束搜索的快速语言模型集成方案。
AI.method: 通过掩码CTC贪婪解码输出中置信度较低的词元，利用电话信息和未掩码词元，采用PC-MLM进行预测。进一步扩展为可删除PC-MLM以解决插入错误。
AI.result: 在CSJ和TED-LIUM2数据集上，该方法在推理速度和识别准确率上均优于重打分和浅层融合，尤其在CSJ数据集上表现显著。
AI.conclusion: PC-MLM实现了与CTC非自回归特性的兼容，为快速且准确的语言模型集成提供了新思路，有效解决了传统方法的速度与精度平衡问题。

authors_text: Lu Mi,Abhijit Kundu,David Ross,Frank Dellaert,Noah Snavely,Alireza Fathi
title: im2nerf: Image to Neural Radiance Field in the Wild
title_zh: im2nerf：野外图像到神经辐射场
comment: 12 pages, 8 figures, 4 tables
comments: 12 pages, 8 figures, 4 tables
abstract: We propose im2nerf, a learning framework that predicts a continuous neural object representation given a single input image in the wild, supervised by only segmentation output from off-the-shelf recognition methods. The standard approach to constructing neural radiance fields takes advantage of multi-view consistency and requires many calibrated views of a scene, a requirement that cannot be satisfied when learning on large-scale image data in the wild. We take a step towards addressing this shortcoming by introducing a model that encodes the input image into a disentangled object representation that contains a code for object shape, a code for object appearance, and an estimated camera pose from which the object image is captured. Our model conditions a NeRF on the predicted object representation and uses volume rendering to generate images from novel views. We train the model end-to-end on a large collection of input images. As the model is only provided with single-view images, the problem is highly under-constrained. Therefore, in addition to using a reconstruction loss on the synthesized input view, we use an auxiliary adversarial loss on the novel rendered views. Furthermore, we leverage object symmetry and cycle camera pose consistency. We conduct extensive quantitative and qualitative experiments on the ShapeNet dataset as well as qualitative experiments on Open Images dataset. We show that in all cases, im2nerf achieves the state-of-the-art performance for novel view synthesis from a single-view unposed image in the wild.
summary: We propose im2nerf, a learning framework that predicts a continuous neural object representation given a single input image in the wild, supervised by only segmentation output from off-the-shelf recognition methods. The standard approach to constructing neural radiance fields takes advantage of multi-view consistency and requires many calibrated views of a scene, a requirement that cannot be satisfied when learning on large-scale image data in the wild. We take a step towards addressing this shortcoming by introducing a model that encodes the input image into a disentangled object representation that contains a code for object shape, a code for object appearance, and an estimated camera pose from which the object image is captured. Our model conditions a NeRF on the predicted object representation and uses volume rendering to generate images from novel views. We train the model end-to-end on a large collection of input images. As the model is only provided with single-view images, the problem is highly under-constrained. Therefore, in addition to using a reconstruction loss on the synthesized input view, we use an auxiliary adversarial loss on the novel rendered views. Furthermore, we leverage object symmetry and cycle camera pose consistency. We conduct extensive quantitative and qualitative experiments on the ShapeNet dataset as well as qualitative experiments on Open Images dataset. We show that in all cases, im2nerf achieves the state-of-the-art performance for novel view synthesis from a single-view unposed image in the wild.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 im2nerf，这是一个学习框架，它可以在给定单个输入图像的情况下预测连续的神经对象表示，仅由现成识别方法的分割输出进行监督。构建神经辐射场的标准方法利用了多视图一致性，并且需要场景的许多校准视图，而在野外学习大规模图像数据时无法满足这一要求。我们通过引入一个模型来解决这个缺点，该模型将输入图像编码为解开的对象表示，其中包含对象形状代码、对象外观代码以及捕获对象图像的估计相机姿势。我们的模型在预测的对象表示上设置 NeRF，并使用体积渲染从新颖的视图生成图像。我们在大量输入图像上端到端地训练模型。由于该模型仅提供单视图图像，因此该问题高度受限。因此，除了在合成输入视图上使用重建损失之外，我们还在新颖的渲染视图上使用辅助对抗性损失。此外，我们利用对象对称性和循环相机姿势一致性。我们对 ShapeNet 数据集进行了广泛的定量和定性实验，并对 Open Images 数据集进行了定性实验。我们表明，在所有情况下，im2nerf 都实现了从野外的单视图未摆出图像进行新颖视图合成的最先进性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出im2nerf框架，通过单张野外图像生成神经辐射场（NeRF），实现新视角图像合成。
AI.motivation: 传统NeRF方法依赖多视角校准数据，难以满足大规模野外图像的单视角学习需求。
AI.method: 模型将输入图像编码为解耦的物体形状、外观及相机姿态代码，基于NeRF和体积渲染生成新视角图像，并采用对抗损失与对称性约束优化。
AI.result: 在ShapeNet和Open Images数据集上均达到单视角新视角合成的最先进水平（SOTA）。
AI.conclusion: im2nerf通过单图像生成高精度NeRF，为野外场景的单视角三维重建提供了有效解决方案。

We conduct extensive quantitative and qualitative experiments on the ShapeNet dataset as well as qualitative experiments on Open Images dataset. We show that in all cases, im2nerf achieves the state-of-the-art performance for novel view synthesis from a single-view unposed image in the wild. 我们提出了 im2nerf，这是一个学习框架，它可以在给定单个输入图像的情况下预测连续的神经对象表示，仅由现成识别方法的分割输出进行监督。构建神经辐射场的标准方法利用了多视图一致性，并且需要场景的许多校准视图，而在野外学习大规模图像数据时无法满足这一要求。我们通过引入一个模型来解决这个缺点，该模型将输入图像编码为解开的对象表示，其中包含对象形状代码、对象外观代码以及捕获对象图像的估计相机姿势。我们的模型在预测的对象表示上设置 NeRF，并使用体积渲染从新颖的视图生成图像。我们在大量输入图像上端到端地训练模型。由于该模型仅提供单视图图像，因此该问题高度受限。因此，除了在合成输入视图上使用重建损失之外，我们还在新颖的渲染视图上使用辅助对抗性损失。此外，我们利用对象对称性和循环相机姿势一致性。我们对 ShapeNet 数据集进行了广泛的定量和定性实验，并对 Open Images 数据集进行了定性实验。我们表明，在所有情况下，im2nerf 都实现了从野外的单视图未摆出图像进行新颖视图合成的最先进性能。 本文提出im2nerf框架，通过单张野外图像生成神经辐射场（NeRF），实现新视角图像合成。 Lu Mi,Abhijit Kundu,David Ross,Frank Dellaert,Noah Snavely,Alireza Fathi cs.CV

authors_text: Badih Ghazi,Ravi Kumar,Pasin Manurangsi,Thomas Steinke
title: Algorithms with More Granular Differential Privacy Guarantees
title_zh: 具有更细粒度差异隐私保证的算法
abstract: Differential privacy is often applied with a privacy parameter that is larger than the theory suggests is ideal; various informal justifications for tolerating large privacy parameters have been proposed. In this work, we consider partial differential privacy (DP), which allows quantifying the privacy guarantee on a per-attribute basis. In this framework, we study several basic data analysis and learning tasks, and design algorithms whose per-attribute privacy parameter is smaller that the best possible privacy parameter for the entire record of a person (i.e., all the attributes).
summary: Differential privacy is often applied with a privacy parameter that is larger than the theory suggests is ideal; various informal justifications for tolerating large privacy parameters have been proposed. In this work, we consider partial differential privacy (DP), which allows quantifying the privacy guarantee on a per-attribute basis. In this framework, we study several basic data analysis and learning tasks, and design algorithms whose per-attribute privacy parameter is smaller that the best possible privacy parameter for the entire record of a person (i.e., all the attributes).
abstract_zh: 差分隐私通常采用比理论建议的理想隐私参数更大的隐私参数；已经提出了容忍大隐私参数的各种非正式理由。在这项工作中，我们考虑偏微分隐私（DP），它允许在每个属性的基础上量化隐私保证。在这个框架中，我们研究了几个基本的数据分析和学习任务，并设计了每个属性隐私参数小于一个人的整个记录​​（即所有属性）的最佳可能隐私参数的算法。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了更细粒度的差分隐私保证，设计出针对每个属性的隐私参数比整个记录更小的算法。
AI.motivation: 传统差分隐私常使用过大的隐私参数，导致隐私保护与数据效用间的不平衡。本文旨在通过更精确的属性级隐私控制，提升实际应用中的隐私保护效果。
AI.method: 提出部分差分隐私框架，对每个属性单独量化隐私保证，并在此基础上设计针对基础数据分析和学习任务的算法。
AI.result: 实现了每个属性的隐私参数优于整体记录的隐私参数，验证了方法在保持隐私性的同时提高数据效用的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 细粒度差分隐私框架能够更灵活地平衡隐私保护与数据实用性，为隐私计算提供了新的研究方向。

authors_text: Masataro Asai
title: Dr. Neurosymbolic, or: How I Learned to Stop Worrying and Accept Statistics
title_zh: 神经符号博士，或者：我如何学会停止担忧并接受统计数据
comment: 12 pages of main contents, 29 pages in total. It could also serve as an accompanying material for Latplan paper. (arXiv:2107.00110) v2: rewrote the general ELBO derivation without Prolog. v3: significantly extended the Bayesian reasoning section in the appendix, with several proofs for conjugate priors. v4+: errata fix
comments: 12 pages of main contents, 29 pages in total. It could also serve as an accompanying material for Latplan paper. (arXiv:2107.00110) v2: rewrote the general ELBO derivation without Prolog. v3: significantly extended the Bayesian reasoning section in the appendix, with several proofs for conjugate priors. v4+: errata fix
abstract: The symbolic AI community is increasingly trying to embrace machine learning in neuro-symbolic architectures, yet is still struggling due to cultural barriers. To break the barrier, this rather opinionated personal memo attempts to explain and rectify the conventions in Statistics, Machine Learning, and Deep Learning from the viewpoint of outsiders. It provides a step-by-step protocol for designing a machine learning system that satisfies a minimum theoretical guarantee necessary for being taken seriously by the symbolic AI community, i.e., it discusses "in what condition we can stop worrying and accept statistical machine learning." Unlike most textbooks which are written for students trying to specialize in Stat/ML/DL and willing to accept jargons, this memo is written for experienced symbolic researchers that hear a lot of buzz but are still uncertain and skeptical. Information on Stat/ML/DL is currently too scattered or too noisy to invest in. This memo prioritizes compactness, citations to old papers (many in early 20th century), and concepts that resonate well with symbolic paradigms in order to offer time savings. It prioritizes general mathematical modeling and does not discuss any specific function approximator, such as neural networks (NNs), SVMs, decision trees, etc. Finally, it is open to corrections. Consider this memo as something similar to a blog post taking the form of a paper on Arxiv.

It prioritizes general mathematical modeling and does not discuss any specific function approximator, such as neural networks (NNs), SVMs, decision trees, etc. Finally, it is open to corrections. Consider this memo as something similar to a blog post taking the form of a paper on Arxiv.
abstract_zh: 符号人工智能社区越来越多地尝试在神经符号架构中采用机器学习，但由于文化障碍仍然举步维艰。为了打破障碍，这份相当固执己见的个人备忘录试图从局外人的角度解释和纠正统计学、机器学习和深度学习中的惯例。它提供了一个用于设计机器学习系统的分步协议，该系统满足符号人工智能社区认真对待所需的最低理论保证，即它讨论了“在什么条件下我们可以停止担忧并接受统计机器学习”。与大多数试图专门研究 Stat/ML/DL 并愿意接受术语的学生编写的教科书不同，这份备忘录是为经验丰富的符号研究人员编写的，他们听到了很多嗡嗡声，但仍然不确定和持怀疑态度。目前有关 Stat/ML/DL 的信息太分散或太嘈杂，无法投资。本备忘录优先考虑紧凑性、对旧论文的引用（许多在 20 世纪初）以及与符号范式产生良好共鸣的概念，以节省时间。它优先考虑一般数学建模，不讨论任何特定的函数逼近器，例如神经网络 (NN)、SVM、决策树等。最后，它可以进行修正。将此备忘录视为类似于 Arxiv 上论文形式的博客文章。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在从符号主义AI视角出发，为设计满足理论保证的机器学习系统提供步骤指南，以弥合符号主义与统计机器学习之间的文化鸿沟。
AI.motivation: 符号主义研究者因统计机器学习领域术语繁杂、信息混乱而持怀疑态度，需建立理论框架以获得其认可。
AI.method: 通过引用早期统计学经典文献，构建通用数学建模框架，避免具体模型讨论，提供简洁且符合符号主义范式的理论协议。
AI.result: 提出一套可被符号主义社区接受的统计机器学习系统设计准则，帮助研究者在无需深入具体算法的情况下理解理论基础。
AI.conclusion: 该备忘录作为开放性指南，为符号主义研究者提供时间高效的理论桥梁，但需持续修正完善以适应领域发展。

authors_text: Paresha Farastu,Nicholas Mattei,Robin Burke
title: Who Pays? Personalization, Bossiness and the Cost of Fairness
title_zh: 谁付钱？个性化、专横和公平的成本
abstract: Fairness-aware recommender systems that have a provider-side fairness concern seek to ensure that protected group(s) of providers have a fair opportunity to promote their items or products. There is a ``cost of fairness'' borne by the consumer side of the interaction when such a solution is implemented. This consumer-side cost raises its own questions of fairness, particularly when personalization is used to control the impact of the fairness constraint. In adopting a personalized approach to the fairness objective, researchers may be opening their systems up to strategic behavior on the part of users. This type of incentive has been studied in the computational social choice literature under the terminology of ``bossiness''. The concern is that a bossy user may be able to shift the cost of fairness to others, improving their own outcomes and worsening those for others. This position paper introduces the concept of bossiness, shows its application in fairness-aware recommendation and discusses strategies for reducing this strategic incentive.
summary: Fairness-aware recommender systems that have a provider-side fairness concern seek to ensure that protected group(s) of providers have a fair opportunity to promote their items or products. There is a ``cost of fairness'' borne by the consumer side of the interaction when such a solution is implemented. This consumer-side cost raises its own questions of fairness, particularly when personalization is used to control the impact of the fairness constraint. In adopting a personalized approach to the fairness objective, researchers may be opening their systems up to strategic behavior on the part of users. This type of incentive has been studied in the computational social choice literature under the terminology of ``bossiness''. The concern is that a bossy user may be able to shift the cost of fairness to others, improving their own outcomes and worsening those for others. This position paper introduces the concept of bossiness, shows its application in fairness-aware recommendation and discusses strategies for reducing this strategic incentive.
abstract_zh: 关注提供商方公平性的公平感知推荐系统寻求确保受保护的提供商群体有公平的机会来推广他们的项目或产品。当实施这样的解决方案时，交互的消费者一方会承担“公平成本”。这种消费者方成本引发了其自身的公平性问题，特别是当使用个性化来控制公平性约束的影响时。在采用个性化方法来实现公平目标时，研究人员可能会向用户的战略行为开放他们的系统。这种类型的激励已经在计算社会选择文献中以“老板”的术语进行了研究。令人担忧的是，专横的用户可能会将公平的成本转嫁到他人身上，改善自己的结果，并使他人的结果恶化。本立场文件介绍了专横的概念，展示了其在公平意识推荐中的应用，并讨论了减少这种战略激励的策略。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了在公平性感知推荐系统中，个性化可能导致用户战略行为（支配性），从而将公平性成本转移给他人的问题，并讨论了减少这种激励的策略。
AI.motivation: 在确保提供方公平性的推荐系统中，消费者可能承担公平性成本，而个性化推荐可能使用户通过战略行为将成本转嫁给他人，引发新的公平性问题。
AI.method: 本文引入了'bossiness'概念，分析其在公平性推荐系统中的应用，并探讨减少用户战略行为的策略。
AI.result: 论文指出个性化推荐中的公平性约束可能导致用户战略行为，加剧成本分配的不公平，并提出需设计机制以减少这种激励。
AI.conclusion: 本文强调需关注公平性推荐中成本分配的公平性，避免用户战略行为，并呼吁设计减少支配性激励的机制。

search_text: Who Pays? Personalization, Bossiness and the Cost of Fairness 谁付钱？个性化、专横和公平的成本 Fairness-aware recommender systems that have a provider-side fairness concern seek to ensure that protected group(s) of providers have a fair opportunity to promote their items or products. There is a ``cost of fairness'' borne by the consumer side of the interaction when such a solution is implemented. This consumer-side cost raises its own questions of fairness, particularly when personalization is used to control the impact of the fairness constraint. In adopting a personalized approach to the fairness objective, researchers may be opening their systems up to strategic behavior on the part of users. This type of incentive has been studied in the computational social choice literature under the terminology of ``bossiness''. The concern is that a bossy user may be able to shift the cost of fairness to others, improving their own outcomes and worsening those for others. This position paper introduces the concept of bossiness, shows its application in fairness-aware recommendation and discusses strategies for reducing this strategic incentive. 关注提供商方公平性的公平感知推荐系统寻求确保受保护的提供商群体有公平的机会来推广他们的项目或产品。当实施这样的解决方案时，交互的消费者一方会承担“公平成本”。这种消费者方成本引发了其自身的公平性问题，特别是当使用个性化来控制公平性约束的影响时。在采用个性化方法来实现公平目标时，研究人员可能会向用户的战略行为开放他们的系统。这种类型的激励已经在计算社会选择文献中以“老板”的术语进行了研究。令人担忧的是，专横的用户可能会将公平的成本转嫁到他人身上，改善自己的结果，并使他人的结果恶化。本立场文件介绍了专横的概念，展示了其在公平意识推荐中的应用，并讨论了减少这种战略激励的策略。 本文探讨了在公平性感知推荐系统中，个性化可能导致用户战略行为（支配性），从而将公平性成本转移给他人的问题，并讨论了减少这种激励的策略。 Paresha Farastu,Nicholas Mattei,Robin Burke cs.IR,cs.AI,cs.GT

authors_text: Perla Nohra,Helmi Ben Rejeb,Swaminath Venkateswaran
title: Impact of automation during innovative remanufacturing processes in circular economy: a state of the art
title_zh: 循环经济创新再制造过程中自动化的影响：最先进的技术
abstract: With the increasing demand of raw materials nowadays, and the decrease in supplies, the industrial sector is suffering. The environment and the society are also indirectly affected. The goal to reach a sustainable development imposes several studies on the economic, environmental and community level. The aim of this paper is to provide an overview of the existing body of literature on automated remanufacturing, and its potential impacts on the three pillars of sustainability. A particular interest is given to the growing use of cobots promoted by the principle of industry 4.0. The investigation that covers each part of the remanufacturing process will help in formalizing an approach about the automation of such processes. It highlights the challenges found and aims to improve the remanufacturing sector towards a more sustainable industry.
summary: With the increasing demand of raw materials nowadays, and the decrease in supplies, the industrial sector is suffering. The environment and the society are also indirectly affected. The goal to reach a sustainable development imposes several studies on the economic, environmental and community level. The aim of this paper is to provide an overview of the existing body of literature on automated remanufacturing, and its potential impacts on the three pillars of sustainability. A particular interest is given to the growing use of cobots promoted by the principle of industry 4.0. The investigation that covers each part of the remanufacturing process will help in formalizing an approach about the automation of such processes. It highlights the challenges found and aims to improve the remanufacturing sector towards a more sustainable industry.
abstract_zh: 如今，随着原材料需求的增加和供应的减少，工业部门正在遭受苦难。环境和社会也间接受到影响。实现可持续发展的目标需要在经济、环境和社区层面进行多项研究。本文的目的是概述有关自动化再制造的现有文献及其对可持续发展三大支柱的潜在影响。人们特别关注工业 4.0 原则所推动的协作机器人的日益增长的使用。涵盖再制造过程每个部分的调查将有助于正式确定此类过程自动化的方法。它强调了所发现的挑战，旨在改善再制造行业，使其成为更加可持续的行业。

AI.tldr: 综述现有文献，分析自动化在循环经济创新再制造过程中的影响，特别是工业4.0下协作机器人（cobots）的应用及其对可持续发展三支柱的影响。
AI.motivation: 由于原材料需求增加与供应减少导致工业部门困境，环境与社会受影响，推动可持续发展需在经济、环境及社区层面进行研究，故需探讨自动化在再制造中的作用。
AI.method: 通过文献综述方法，系统分析再制造各阶段的自动化应用，总结现有技术及挑战，结合工业4.0背景下cobots的使用情况。
AI.result: 识别出自动化再制造在实施中的关键挑战，并提出优化路径以推动产业向更可持续方向发展。
AI.conclusion: 自动化在再制造中对可持续发展至关重要，需进一步研究技术整合与跨领域合作以解决现有挑战。

authors_text: Chulin Xie,Yunhui Long,Pin-Yu Chen,Qinbin Li,Arash Nourian,Sanmi Koyejo,Bo Li
title: Unraveling the Connections between Privacy and Certified Robustness in Federated Learning Against Poisoning Attacks
title_zh: 揭示联邦学习中针对投毒攻击的隐私与认证鲁棒性之间的联系
comment: ACM CCS 2023
comments: ACM CCS 2023
abstract: Federated learning (FL) provides an efficient paradigm to jointly train a global model leveraging data from distributed users. As local training data comes from different users who may not be trustworthy, several studies have shown that FL is vulnerable to poisoning attacks. Meanwhile, to protect the privacy of local users, FL is usually trained in a differentially private way (DPFL). Thus, in this paper, we ask: What are the underlying connections between differential privacy and certified robustness in FL against poisoning attacks? Can we leverage the innate privacy property of DPFL to provide certified robustness for FL? Can we further improve the privacy of FL to improve such robustness certification? We first investigate both user-level and instance-level privacy of FL and provide formal privacy analysis to achieve improved instance-level privacy. We then provide two robustness certification criteria: certified prediction and certified attack inefficacy for DPFL on both user and instance levels. Theoretically, we provide the certified robustness of DPFL based on both criteria given a bounded number of adversarial users or instances. Empirically, we conduct extensive experiments to verify our theories under a range of poisoning attacks on different datasets. We find that increasing the level of privacy protection in DPFL results in stronger certified attack inefficacy; however, it does not necessarily lead to a stronger certified prediction. Thus, achieving the optimal certified prediction requires a proper balance between privacy and utility loss.
summary: Federated learning (FL) provides an efficient paradigm to jointly train a global model leveraging data from distributed users. As local training data comes from different users who may not be trustworthy, several studies have shown that FL is vulnerable to poisoning attacks. Meanwhile, to protect the privacy of local users, FL is usually trained in a differentially private way (DPFL). Thus, in this paper, we ask: What are the underlying connections between differential privacy and certified robustness in FL against poisoning attacks? Can we leverage the innate privacy property of DPFL to provide certified robustness for FL? Can we further improve the privacy of FL to improve such robustness certification? We first investigate both user-level and instance-level privacy of FL and provide formal privacy analysis to achieve improved instance-level privacy. We then provide two robustness certification criteria: certified prediction and certified attack inefficacy for DPFL on both user and instance levels. Theoretically, we provide the certified robustness of DPFL based on both criteria given a bounded number of adversarial users or instances. Empirically, we conduct extensive experiments to verify our theories under a range of poisoning attacks on different datasets. We find that increasing the level of privacy protection in DPFL results in stronger certified attack inefficacy; however, it does not necessarily lead to a stronger certified prediction. Thus, achieving the optimal certified prediction requires a proper balance between privacy and utility loss.
abstract_zh: 联邦学习（FL）提供了一种有效的范例，可以利用分布式用户的数据联合训练全局模型。由于本地训练数据来自不同的用户，可能不值得信任，一些研究表明 FL 很容易受到中毒攻击。同时，为了保护本地用户的隐私，FL通常采用差分隐私方式（DPFL）进行训练。因此，在本文中，我们要问：差分隐私和 FL 针对中毒攻击的经过认证的鲁棒性之间的潜在联系是什么？我们能否利用 DPFL 固有的隐私属性来为 FL 提供经过认证的稳健性？我们能否进一步提高FL的隐私性来提高这种鲁棒性认证？我们首先研究 FL 的用户级和实例级隐私，并提供正式的隐私分析以实现改进的实例级隐私。然后，我们提供两个稳健性认证标准：在用户和实例级别上对 DPFL 进行认证的预测和认证的攻击无效性。理论上，在给定有限数量的敌对用户或实例的情况下，我们根据这两个标准提供了经过认证的 DPFL 稳健性。根据经验，我们进行了广泛的实验，以在不同数据集的一系列中毒攻击下验证我们的理论。我们发现，提高 DPFL 的隐私保护水平会导致更强的认证攻击无效性；然而，它并不一定会带来更强的经过验证的预测。因此，实现最佳的认证预测需要在隐私和效用损失之间取得适当的平衡。

AI.tldr: 本文研究联邦学习中差分隐私与对抗中毒攻击的认证鲁棒性之间的内在联系，并探索如何利用差分隐私增强联邦学习的鲁棒性认证。
AI.motivation: 联邦学习面临数据不可信和隐私泄露风险，而差分隐私联邦学习（DPFL）虽能保护隐私，但其与认证鲁棒性的关系尚未明确，需探究隐私保护与鲁棒性之间的平衡。
AI.method: 通过形式化分析用户级和实例级隐私，提出两种认证标准（认证预测与认证攻击无效性），并基于不同数据集进行实验验证。
AI.result: 提升DPFL隐私保护水平可增强认证攻击无效性，但未必提升认证预测效果，需在隐私与效用间取得平衡以实现最优认证预测。
AI.conclusion: 差分隐私与认证鲁棒性存在内在关联，增强隐私保护可改进鲁棒性认证，但需权衡隐私与模型效用以达到最佳效果。
