search_text: Unraveling the Connections between Privacy and Certified Robustness in Federated Learning Against Poisoning Attacks 揭示联邦学习中针对投毒攻击的隐私与认证鲁棒性之间的联系 Federated learning (FL) provides an efficient paradigm to jointly train a global model leveraging data from distributed users. As local training data comes from different users who may not be trustworthy, several studies have shown that FL is vulnerable to poisoning attacks. Meanwhile, to protect the privacy of local users, FL is usually trained in a differentially private way (DPFL). Thus, in this paper, we ask: What are the underlying connections between differential privacy and certified robustness in FL against poisoning attacks? Can we leverage the innate privacy property of DPFL to provide certified robustness for FL? Can we further improve the privacy of FL to improve such robustness certification? We first investigate both user-level and instance-level privacy of FL and provide formal privacy analysis to achieve improved instance-level privacy. We then provide two robustness certification criteria: certified prediction and certified attack inefficacy for DPFL on both user and instance levels. Theoretically, we provide the certified robustness of DPFL based on both criteria given a bounded number of adversarial users or instances. Empirically, we conduct extensive experiments to verify our theories under a range of poisoning attacks on different datasets. We find that increasing the level of privacy protection in DPFL results in stronger certified attack inefficacy; however, it does not necessarily lead to a stronger certified prediction. Thus, achieving the optimal certified prediction requires a proper balance between privacy and utility loss. 联邦学习（FL）提供了一种有效的范例，可以利用分布式用户的数据联合训练全局模型。由于本地训练数据来自不同的用户，可能不值得信任，一些研究表明 FL 很容易受到中毒攻击。同时，为了保护本地用户的隐私，FL通常采用差分隐私方式（DPFL）进行训练。因此，在本文中，我们要问：差分隐私和 FL 针对中毒攻击的经过认证的鲁棒性之间的潜在联系是什么？我们能否利用 DPFL 固有的隐私属性来为 FL 提供经过认证的稳健性？我们能否进一步提高FL的隐私性来提高这种鲁棒性认证？我们首先研究 FL 的用户级和实例级隐私，并提供正式的隐私分析以实现改进的实例级隐私。然后，我们提供两个稳健性认证标准：在用户和实例级别上对 DPFL 进行认证的预测和认证的攻击无效性。理论上，在给定有限数量的敌对用户或实例的情况下，我们根据这两个标准提供了经过认证的 DPFL 稳健性。根据经验，我们进行了广泛的实验，以在不同数据集的一系列中毒攻击下验证我们的理论。我们发现，提高 DPFL 的隐私保护水平会导致更强的认证攻击无效性；然而，它并不一定会带来更强的经过验证的预测。因此，实现最佳的认证预测需要在隐私和效用损失之间取得适当的平衡。 本文研究联邦学习中差分隐私与对抗中毒攻击的认证鲁棒性之间的内在联系，并探索如何利用差分隐私增强联邦学习的鲁棒性认证。 Chulin Xie,Yunhui Long,Pin-Yu Chen,Qinbin Li,Arash Nourian,Sanmi Koyejo,Bo Li cs.CR,cs.AI

authors_text: Sk Miraj Ahmed,Suhas Lohit,Kuan-Chuan Peng,Michael J. Jones,Amit K. Roy-Chowdhury
title: Cross-Modal Knowledge Transfer Without Task-Relevant Source Data
title_zh: 无需任务相关源数据的跨模式知识转移
abstract: Cost-effective depth and infrared sensors as alternatives to usual RGB sensors are now a reality, and have some advantages over RGB in domains like autonomous navigation and remote sensing. As such, building computer vision and deep learning systems for depth and infrared data are crucial. However, large labeled datasets for these modalities are still lacking. In such cases, transferring knowledge from a neural network trained on a well-labeled large dataset in the source modality (RGB) to a neural network that works on a target modality (depth, infrared, etc.) is of great value. For reasons like memory and privacy, it may not be possible to access the source data, and knowledge transfer needs to work with only the source models. We describe an effective solution, SOCKET: SOurce-free Cross-modal KnowledgE Transfer for this challenging task of transferring knowledge from one source modality to a different target modality without access to task-relevant source data. The framework reduces the modality gap using paired task-irrelevant data, as well as by matching the mean and variance of the target features with the batch-norm statistics that are present in the source models. We show through extensive experiments that our method significantly outperforms existing source-free methods for classification tasks which do not account for the modality gap.
summary: Cost-effective depth and infrared sensors as alternatives to usual RGB sensors are now a reality, and have some advantages over RGB in domains like autonomous navigation and remote sensing. As such, building computer vision and deep learning systems for depth and infrared data are crucial. However, large labeled datasets for these modalities are still lacking. In such cases, transferring knowledge from a neural network trained on a well-labeled large dataset in the source modality (RGB) to a neural network that works on a target modality (depth, infrared, etc.) is of great value. For reasons like memory and privacy, it may not be possible to access the source data, and knowledge transfer needs to work with only the source models. We describe an effective solution, SOCKET: SOurce-free Cross-modal KnowledgE Transfer for this challenging task of transferring knowledge from one source modality to a different target modality without access to task-relevant source data. The framework reduces the modality gap using paired task-irrelevant data, as well as by matching the mean and variance of the target features with the batch-norm statistics that are present in the source models. We show through extensive experiments that our method significantly outperforms existing source-free methods for classification tasks which do not account for the modality gap.
abstract_zh: 经济高效的深度和红外传感器作为普通 RGB 传感器的替代品现已成为现实，并且在自主导航和遥感等领域比 RGB 具有一些优势。因此，构建深度和红外数据的计算机视觉和深度学习系统至关重要。然而，仍然缺乏这些模式的大型标记数据集。在这种情况下，将在源模态 (RGB) 中标记良好的大型数据集上训练的神经网络中的知识转移到在目标模态（深度、红外等）上工作的神经网络具有很大的价值。由于内存和隐私等原因，可能无法访问源数据，知识转移只需要使用源模型。我们描述了一种有效的解决方案，SOCKET：无源跨模态知识传输，用于将知识从一种源模态传输到不同的目标模态，而无需访问任务相关的源数据这一具有挑战性的任务。该框架使用配对的任务无关数据，以及通过将目标特征的均值和方差与源模型中存在的批量规范统计数据进行匹配来减少模态差距。我们通过大量的实验表明，对于不考虑模态差距的分类任务，我们的方法显着优于现有的无源方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需任务相关源数据的跨模态知识迁移方法SOCKET，用于在深度和红外等目标模态上迁移RGB等源模态的模型知识。
AI.motivation: 深度和红外传感器虽具优势，但缺乏标注数据。传统方法依赖源数据进行知识迁移，但实际中可能因隐私或存储限制无法获取源数据，需探索无需源数据的跨模态迁移方案。
AI.method: 通过配对任务无关数据缩小模态差异，并对齐目标特征的均值和方差与源模型的批归一化统计量，实现源模型知识到目标模态的迁移。
AI.result: 实验表明，SOCKET在分类任务中显著优于现有无源数据方法，尤其在处理模态差异时效果更优。
AI.conclusion: SOCKET为无源数据的跨模态知识迁移提供了有效解决方案，推动了深度学习在资源受限场景下的应用。

authors_text: Chulin Xie,Zhong Cao,Yunhui Long,Diange Yang,Ding Zhao,Bo Li
title: Privacy of Autonomous Vehicles: Risks, Protection Methods, and Future Directions
title_zh: 自动驾驶汽车的隐私：风险、保护方法和未来方向
abstract: Recent advances in machine learning have enabled its wide application in different domains, and one of the most exciting applications is autonomous vehicles (AVs), which have encouraged the development of a number of ML algorithms from perception to prediction to planning. However, training AVs usually requires a large amount of training data collected from different driving environments (e.g., cities) as well as different types of personal information (e.g., working hours and routes). Such collected large data, treated as the new oil for ML in the data-centric AI era, usually contains a large amount of privacy-sensitive information which is hard to remove or even audit. Although existing privacy protection approaches have achieved certain theoretical and empirical success, there is still a gap when applying them to real-world applications such as autonomous vehicles. For instance, when training AVs, not only can individually identifiable information reveal privacy-sensitive information, but also population-level information such as road construction within a city, and proprietary-level commercial secrets of AVs. Thus, it is critical to revisit the frontier of privacy risks and corresponding protection approaches in AVs to bridge this gap. Following this goal, in this work, we provide a new taxonomy for privacy risks and protection methods in AVs, and we categorize privacy in AVs into three levels: individual, population, and proprietary. We explicitly list out recent challenges to protect each of these levels of privacy, summarize existing solutions to these challenges, discuss the lessons and conclusions, and provide potential future directions and opportunities for both researchers and practitioners. We believe this work will help to shape the privacy research in AV and guide the privacy protection technology design.
summary: Recent advances in machine learning have enabled its wide application in different domains, and one of the most exciting applications is autonomous vehicles (AVs), which have encouraged the development of a number of ML algorithms from perception to prediction to planning. However, training AVs usually requires a large amount of training data collected from different driving environments (e.g., cities) as well as different types of personal information (e.g., working hours and routes). Such collected large data, treated as the new oil for ML in the data-centric AI era, usually contains a large amount of privacy-sensitive information which is hard to remove or even audit. Although existing privacy protection approaches have achieved certain theoretical and empirical success, there is still a gap when applying them to real-world applications such as autonomous vehicles. For instance, when training AVs, not only can individually identifiable information reveal privacy-sensitive information, but also population-level information such as road construction within a city, and proprietary-level commercial secrets of AVs. Thus, it is critical to revisit the frontier of privacy risks and corresponding protection approaches in AVs to bridge this gap. Following this goal, in this work, we provide a new taxonomy for privacy risks and protection methods in AVs, and we categorize privacy in AVs into three levels: individual, population, and proprietary. We explicitly list out recent challenges to protect each of these levels of privacy, summarize existing solutions to these challenges, discuss the lessons and conclusions, and provide potential future directions and opportunities for both researchers and practitioners. We believe this work will help to shape the privacy research in AV and guide the privacy protection technology design.
abstract_zh: 机器学习的最新进展使其在不同领域得到广泛应用，其中最令人兴奋的应用之一是自动驾驶汽车 (AV)，它鼓励了从感知到预测再到规划的许多机器学习算法的开发。然而，训练自动驾驶汽车通常需要从不同驾驶环境（例如城市）收集的大量训练数据以及不同类型的个人信息（例如工作时间和路线）。这些收集到的大数据被视为以数据为中心的人工智能时代机器学习的新石油，通常包含大量难以删除甚至难以审计的隐私敏感信息。尽管现有的隐私保护方法已经取得了一定的理论和实证成功，但将其应用于自动驾驶汽车等现实应用时仍存在差距。例如，在训练自动驾驶汽车时，个人身份信息不仅可以泄露隐私敏感信息，还可以泄露城市内的道路建设等人口级别的信息，以及自动驾驶汽车专有级别的商业秘密。因此，重新审视自动驾驶汽车中的隐私风险前沿和相应的保护方法以弥合这一差距至关重要。遵循这一目标，在这项工作中，我们为自动驾驶汽车中的隐私风险和保护方法提供了新的分类法，并将自动驾驶汽车中的隐私分为三个级别：个人、群体和专有。我们明确列出了保护每个级别的隐私的最新挑战，总结了这些挑战的现有解决方案，讨论了教训和结论，并为研究人员和从业者提供了潜在的未来方向和机会。我们相信这项工作将有助于塑造AV领域的隐私研究并指导隐私保护技术设计。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在为自动驾驶车辆（AVs）中的隐私风险与保护方法提供新的分类体系，并探讨其面临的挑战、现有解决方案及未来研究方向。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶车辆在训练过程中收集的大量数据包含敏感隐私信息，现有隐私保护方法在实际应用中存在不足，需针对AVs的特殊性重新审视隐私风险与保护策略。
AI.method: 提出三级隐私分类框架（个体级、群体级、商业级），系统梳理各层级隐私保护挑战，总结现有解决方案并分析其局限性，最后提出未来研究方向。
AI.result: 构建了AVs隐私风险的分类体系，明确了各层级隐私保护的核心挑战，汇总了当前技术手段的有效性，并指出了跨学科合作与技术融合的潜在机会。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为AVs隐私保护领域提供了系统性分析框架，有助于指导后续隐私技术的研发与行业实践标准的制定。

search_text: Privacy of Autonomous Vehicles: Risks, Protection Methods, and Future Directions 自动驾驶汽车的隐私：风险、保护方法和未来方向 Recent advances in machine learning have enabled its wide application in different domains, and one of the most exciting applications is autonomous vehicles (AVs), which have encouraged the development of a number of ML algorithms from perception to prediction to planning. However, training AVs usually requires a large amount of training data collected from different driving environments (e.g., cities) as well as different types of personal information (e.g., working hours and routes). Such collected large data, treated as the new oil for ML in the data-centric AI era, usually contains a large amount of privacy-sensitive information which is hard to remove or even audit. Although existing privacy protection approaches have achieved certain theoretical and empirical success, there is still a gap when applying them to real-world applications such as autonomous vehicles. For instance, when training AVs, not only can individually identifiable information reveal privacy-sensitive information, but also population-level information such as road construction within a city, and proprietary-level commercial secrets of AVs. Thus, it is critical to revisit the frontier of privacy risks and corresponding protection approaches in AVs to bridge this gap. Following this goal, in this work, we provide a new taxonomy for privacy risks and protection methods in AVs, and we categorize privacy in AVs into three levels: individual, population, and proprietary. We explicitly list out recent challenges to protect each of these levels of privacy, summarize existing solutions to these challenges, discuss the lessons and conclusions, and provide potential future directions and opportunities for both researchers and practitioners. We believe this work will help to shape the privacy research in AV and guide the privacy protection technology design. 机器学习的最新进展使其在不同领域得到广泛应用，其中最令人兴奋的应用之一是自动驾驶汽车 (AV)，它鼓励了从感知到预测再到规划的许多机器学习算法的开发。然而，训练自动驾驶汽车通常需要从不同驾驶环境（例如城市）收集的大量训练数据以及不同类型的个人信息（例如工作时间和路线）。这些收集到的大数据被视为以数据为中心的人工智能时代机器学习的新石油，通常包含大量难以删除甚至难以审计的隐私敏感信息。尽管现有的隐私保护方法已经取得了一定的理论和实证成功，但将其应用于自动驾驶汽车等现实应用时仍存在差距。例如，在训练自动驾驶汽车时，个人身份信息不仅可以泄露隐私敏感信息，还可以泄露城市内的道路建设等人口级别的信息，以及自动驾驶汽车专有级别的商业秘密。因此，重新审视自动驾驶汽车中的隐私风险前沿和相应的保护方法以弥合这一差距至关重要。遵循这一目标，在这项工作中，我们为自动驾驶汽车中的隐私风险和保护方法提供了新的分类法，并将自动驾驶汽车中的隐私分为三个级别：个人、群体和专有。我们明确列出了保护每个级别的隐私的最新挑战，总结了这些挑战的现有解决方案，讨论了教训和结论，并为研究人员和从业者提供了潜在的未来方向和机会。我们相信这项工作将有助于塑造AV领域的隐私研究并指导隐私保护技术设计。 本文旨在为自动驾驶车辆（AVs）中的隐私风险与保护方法提供新的分类体系，并探讨其面临的挑战、现有解决方案及未来研究方向。 Chulin Xie,Zhong Cao,Yunhui Long,Diange Yang,Ding Zhao,Bo Li cs.AI

authors_text: Jessie J. Smith,Lex Beattie
title: RecSys Fairness Metrics: Many to Use But Which One To Choose?
title_zh: RecSys 公平性指标：有很多可用但选择哪一个？
comment: Non-published work, accepted into the FAccTRec Workshop at the RecSys 2022 Conference
comments: Non-published work, accepted into the FAccTRec Workshop at the RecSys 2022 Conference
abstract: In recent years, recommendation and ranking systems have become increasingly popular on digital platforms. However, previous work has highlighted how personalized systems might lead to unintentional harms for users. Practitioners require metrics to measure and mitigate these types of harms in production systems. To meet this need, many fairness definitions have been introduced and explored by the RecSys community. Unfortunately, this has led to a proliferation of possible fairness metrics from which practitioners can choose. The increase in volume and complexity of metrics creates a need for practitioners to deeply understand the nuances of fairness definitions and implementations. Additionally, practitioners need to understand the ethical guidelines that accompany these metrics for responsible implementation. Recent work has shown that there is a proliferation of ethics guidelines and has pointed to the need for more implementation guidance rather than principles alone. The wide variety of available metrics, coupled with the lack of accepted standards or shared knowledge in practice leads to a challenging environment for practitioners to navigate. In this position paper, we focus on this widening gap between the research community and practitioners concerning the availability of metrics versus the ability to put them into practice. We address this gap with our current work, which focuses on developing methods to help ML practitioners in their decision-making processes when picking fairness metrics for recommendation and ranking systems. In our iterative design interviews, we have already found that practitioners need both practical and reflective guidance when refining fairness constraints. This is especially salient given the growing challenge for practitioners to leverage the correct metrics while balancing complex fairness contexts.
summary: In recent years, recommendation and ranking systems have become increasingly popular on digital platforms. However, previous work has highlighted how personalized systems might lead to unintentional harms for users. Practitioners require metrics to measure and mitigate these types of harms in production systems. To meet this need, many fairness definitions have been introduced and explored by the RecSys community. Unfortunately, this has led to a proliferation of possible fairness metrics from which practitioners can choose. The increase in volume and complexity of metrics creates a need for practitioners to deeply understand the nuances of fairness definitions and implementations. Additionally, practitioners need to understand the ethical guidelines that accompany these metrics for responsible implementation. Recent work has shown that there is a proliferation of ethics guidelines and has pointed to the need for more implementation guidance rather than principles alone. The wide variety of available metrics, coupled with the lack of accepted standards or shared knowledge in practice leads to a challenging environment for practitioners to navigate. In this position paper, we focus on this widening gap between the research community and practitioners concerning the availability of metrics versus the ability to put them into practice. We address this gap with our current work, which focuses on developing methods to help ML practitioners in their decision-making processes when picking fairness metrics for recommendation and ranking systems. In our iterative design interviews, we have already found that practitioners need both practical and reflective guidance when refining fairness constraints. This is especially salient given the growing challenge for practitioners to leverage the correct metrics while balancing complex fairness contexts.
abstract_zh: 近年来，推荐和排名系统在数字平台上变得越来越流行。然而，之前的工作强调了个性化系统可能如何导致用户无意中受到伤害。从业者需要指标来衡量和减轻生产系统中的此类危害。为了满足这一需求，RecSys 社区引入并探索了许多公平性定义。不幸的是，这导致了可供从业者选择的可能公平指标的激增。指标数量和复杂性的增加要求从业者深入理解公平性定义和实施的细微差别。此外，从业者需要了解这些指标所附带的道德准则，以便负责任地实施。最近的工作表明，道德准则数量激增，并指出需要更多的实施指南，而不仅仅是原则。可用指标的种类繁多，加上实践中缺乏公认的标准或共享知识，导致从业者面临一个充满挑战的环境。在这篇立场文件中，我们重点关注研究界和从业者之间在衡量指标的可用性与将其付诸实践的能力方面日益扩大的差距。我们通过当前的工作解决了这一差距，目前的工作重点是开发方法来帮助机器学习从业者在为推荐和排名系统选择公平性指标时进行决策过程。在我们的迭代设计访谈中，我们已经发现实践者在完善公平约束时需要实践和反思的指导。鉴于从业者在平衡复杂的公平环境的同时利用正确的指标面临着越来越大的挑战，这一点尤其突出。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了推荐系统中公平性度量的多样性及选择困境，并提出方法帮助从业者在实际应用中决策。
AI.motivation: 现有公平性度量标准繁多且缺乏统一规范，导致从业者难以有效评估和缓解推荐系统中的潜在偏见。
AI.method: 通过迭代设计访谈，分析从业者在公平性约束调整中的实际需求，提炼实用与反思性指导框架。
AI.result: 发现从业者需结合具体场景的实践指南与伦理反思，以平衡复杂公平性目标与系统性能。
AI.conclusion: 研究揭示了学术界与工业界在公平性度量应用上的鸿沟，呼吁制定更具体的实施准则以支持负责任的系统开发。

search_text: RecSys Fairness Metrics: Many to Use But Which One To Choose? RecSys 公平性指标：有很多可用但选择哪一个？ In recent years, recommendation and ranking systems have become increasingly popular on digital platforms. However, previous work has highlighted how personalized systems might lead to unintentional harms for users. Practitioners require metrics to measure and mitigate these types of harms in production systems. To meet this need, many fairness definitions have been introduced and explored by the RecSys community. Unfortunately, this has led to a proliferation of possible fairness metrics from which practitioners can choose. The increase in volume and complexity of metrics creates a need for practitioners to deeply understand the nuances of fairness definitions and implementations. Additionally, practitioners need to understand the ethical guidelines that accompany these metrics for responsible implementation. Recent work has shown that there is a proliferation of ethics guidelines and has pointed to the need for more implementation guidance rather than principles alone. The wide variety of available metrics, coupled with the lack of accepted standards or shared knowledge in practice leads to a challenging environment for practitioners to navigate. In this position paper, we focus on this widening gap between the research community and practitioners concerning the availability of metrics versus the ability to put them into practice. We address this gap with our current work, which focuses on developing methods to help ML practitioners in their decision-making processes when picking fairness metrics for recommendation and ranking systems. In our iterative design interviews, we have already found that practitioners need both practical and reflective guidance when refining fairness constraints. This is especially salient given the growing challenge for practitioners to leverage the correct metrics while balancing complex fairness contexts. 近年来，推荐和排名系统在数字平台上变得越来越流行。然而，之前的工作强调了个性化系统可能如何导致用户无意中受到伤害。从业者需要指标来衡量和减轻生产系统中的此类危害。为了满足这一需求，RecSys 社区引入并探索了许多公平性定义。不幸的是，这导致了可供从业者选择的可能公平指标的激增。指标数量和复杂性的增加要求从业者深入理解公平性定义和实施的细微差别。此外，从业者需要了解这些指标所附带的道德准则，以便负责任地实施。最近的工作表明，道德准则数量激增，并指出需要更多的实施指南，而不仅仅是原则。可用指标的种类繁多，加上实践中缺乏公认的标准或共享知识，导致从业者面临一个充满挑战的环境。在这篇立场文件中，我们重点关注研究界和从业者之间在衡量指标的可用性与将其付诸实践的能力方面日益扩大的差距。我们通过当前的工作解决了这一差距，目前的工作重点是开发方法来帮助机器学习从业者在为推荐和排名系统选择公平性指标时进行决策过程。在我们的迭代设计访谈中，我们已经发现实践者在完善公平约束时需要实践和反思的指导。鉴于从业者在平衡复杂的公平环境的同时利用正确的指标面临着越来越大的挑战，这一点尤其突出。 本文探讨了推荐系统中公平性度量的多样性及选择困境，并提出方法帮助从业者在实际应用中决策。 Jessie J. authors_text: Gedaliah Knizhnik,Mark Yim
title: Collective Control for Arbitrary Configurations of Docked Modboats
title_zh: 对停靠的改装船任意配置的集中控制
comment: 11 pages. Submitted for consideration in the IEEE Transactions on Robotics (T-RO)
comments: 11 pages. Submitted for consideration in the IEEE Transactions on Robotics (T-RO)
abstract: The Modboat is a low-cost, underactuated, modular robot capable of surface swimming, docking to other modules, and undocking from them using only a single motor and two passive flippers. Undocking is achieved by causing intentional self-collision between the tails of neighboring modules in certain configurations; this becomes a challenge, however, when collective swimming as one connected component is desirable. In this work, we develop a centralized control strategy to allow \textit{arbitrary} configurations of Modboats to swim as a single steerable vehicle and guarantee no accidental undocking. We also present a simplified model for hydrodynamic interactions between boats in a configuration that is tractable for real-time control. We experimentally demonstrate that our controller performs well, is consistent for configurations of various sizes and shapes, and can control both surge velocity and yaw angle simultaneously. Controllability is maintained while swimming, but pure yaw control causes lateral movement that cannot be counteracted by the presented framework.
summary: The Modboat is a low-cost, underactuated, modular robot capable of surface swimming, docking to other modules, and undocking from them using only a single motor and two passive flippers. Undocking is achieved by causing intentional self-collision between the tails of neighboring modules in certain configurations; this becomes a challenge, however, when collective swimming as one connected component is desirable. In this work, we develop a centralized control strategy to allow \textit{arbitrary} configurations of Modboats to swim as a single steerable vehicle and guarantee no accidental undocking. We also present a simplified model for hydrodynamic interactions between boats in a configuration that is tractable for real-time control. We experimentally demonstrate that our controller performs well, is consistent for configurations of various sizes and shapes, and can control both surge velocity and yaw angle simultaneously. Controllability is maintained while swimming, but pure yaw control causes lateral movement that cannot be counteracted by the presented framework.
abstract_zh: Modboat 是一款低成本、欠驱动的模块化机器人，能够在水面游泳、与其他模块对接以及仅使用单个电机和两个被动鳍状肢脱离对接。脱离是通过在某些配置中引起相邻模块尾部之间的故意自碰撞来实现的；然而，当需要将集体游泳作为一个连接的组件时，这就成为一项挑战。在这项工作中，我们开发了一种集中控制策略，允许任意配置的 Modboat 作为单个可操纵车辆游泳，并保证不会意外脱离。我们还提出了一种船之间水动力相互作用的简化模型，其配置易于实时控制。我们通过实验证明，我们的控制器性能良好，对于各种尺寸和形状的配置都是一致的，并且可以同时控制喘振速度和偏航角。游泳时可保持可控性，但纯粹的偏航控制会导致横向运动，而该横向运动无法被所提出的框架抵消。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种集中式控制策略，使任意配置的Modboats能够作为一个可操控的单一车辆进行游泳，并保证不会发生意外解耦。
AI.motivation: Modboat是一种低成本、欠驱动、模块化机器人，能够进行水面游泳、与其他模块对接和解耦。然而，在需要集体游泳时，如何避免意外解耦并实现可控的运动是一个挑战。
AI.method: 本文开发了一种集中式控制策略，并提出了一个简化的流体动力学模型，用于实时控制多个Modboats的配置。该方法确保了任意配置的Modboats能够作为一个整体进行运动，并且不会发生意外解耦。
AI.result: 实验表明，该控制器在不同大小和形状的配置中表现良好，能够同时控制前进速度和偏航角。然而，纯偏航控制会导致横向移动，无法通过该框架抵消。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的方法实现了任意配置的Modboats作为一个整体进行可控运动，但在纯偏航控制方面仍存在局限性。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种集中式控制策略，使任意配置的Modboats能够作为一个可操控的单一车辆进行游泳，并保证不会发生意外解耦。
ai_content.motivation: Modboat是一种低成本、欠驱动、模块化机器人，能够进行水面游泳、与其他模块对接和解耦。然而，在需要集体游泳时，如何避免意外解耦并实现可控的运动是一个挑战。

search_text: Collective Control for Arbitrary Configurations of Docked Modboats 对停靠的改装船任意配置的集中控制 The Modboat is a low-cost, underactuated, modular robot capable of surface swimming, docking to other modules, and undocking from them using only a single motor and two passive flippers. Undocking is achieved by causing intentional self-collision between the tails of neighboring modules in certain configurations; this becomes a challenge, however, when collective swimming as one connected component is desirable. In this work, we develop a centralized control strategy to allow \textit{arbitrary} configurations of Modboats to swim as a single steerable vehicle and guarantee no accidental undocking. We also present a simplified model for hydrodynamic interactions between boats in a configuration that is tractable for real-time control. We experimentally demonstrate that our controller performs well, is consistent for configurations of various sizes and shapes, and can control both surge velocity and yaw angle simultaneously. Controllability is maintained while swimming, but pure yaw control causes lateral movement that cannot be counteracted by the presented framework. Modboat 是一款低成本、欠驱动的模块化机器人，能够在水面游泳、与其他模块对接以及仅使用单个电机和两个被动鳍状肢脱离对接。脱离是通过在某些配置中引起相邻模块尾部之间的故意自碰撞来实现的；然而，当需要将集体游泳作为一个连接的组件时，这就成为一项挑战。在这项工作中，我们开发了一种集中控制策略，允许任意配置的 Modboat 作为单个可操纵车辆游泳，并保证不会意外脱离。我们还提出了一种船之间水动力相互作用的简化模型，其配置易于实时控制。我们通过实验证明，我们的控制器性能良好，对于各种尺寸和形状的配置都是一致的，并且可以同时控制喘振速度和偏航角。游泳时可保持可控性，但纯粹的偏航控制会导致横向运动，而该横向运动无法被所提出的框架抵消。 本文提出了一种集中式控制策略，使任意配置的Modboats能够作为一个可操控的单一车辆进行游泳，并保证不会发生意外解耦。 Gedaliah Knizhnik,Mark Yim cs.RO

authors_text: DongHoon Baek,Yu Chen,Chang,Joao Ramos
title: A Study of Shared-Control with Force Feedback for Obstacle Avoidance in Whole-body Telelocomotion of a Wheeled Humanoid
title_zh: 轮式人形全身遥控避障共享控制力反馈研究
comment: DongHoon Baek (1) and Yu Chen (Johnny) Chang (2) contributed equally. 8 pages, Robotic and Automation Letter (submitted)
comments: DongHoon Baek (1) and Yu Chen (Johnny) Chang (2) contributed equally. 8 pages, Robotic and Automation Letter (submitted)
abstract: Teleoperation has emerged as an alternative solution to fully-autonomous systems for achieving human-level capabilities on humanoids. Specifically, teleoperation with whole-body control is a promising hands-free strategy to command humanoids but demands more physical and mental effort. To mitigate this limitation, researchers have proposed shared-control methods incorporating robot decision-making to aid humans on low-level tasks, further reducing operation effort. However, shared-control methods for wheeled humanoid telelocomotion on a whole-body level has yet to be explored. In this work, we study how whole-body feedback affects the performance of different shared-control methods for obstacle avoidance in diverse environments. A Time-Derivative Sigmoid Function (TDSF) is proposed to generate more intuitive force feedback from obstacles. Comprehensive human experiments were conducted, and the results concluded that force feedback enhances the whole-body telelocomotion performance in unfamiliar environments but could reduce performance in familiar environments. Conveying the robot's intention through haptics showed further improvements since the operator can utilize the force feedback for short-distance planning and visual feedback for long-distance planning.
summary: Teleoperation has emerged as an alternative solution to fully-autonomous systems for achieving human-level capabilities on humanoids. Specifically, teleoperation with whole-body control is a promising hands-free strategy to command humanoids but demands more physical and mental effort. To mitigate this limitation, researchers have proposed shared-control methods incorporating robot decision-making to aid humans on low-level tasks, further reducing operation effort. However, shared-control methods for wheeled humanoid telelocomotion on a whole-body level has yet to be explored. In this work, we study how whole-body feedback affects the performance of different shared-control methods for obstacle avoidance in diverse environments. A Time-Derivative Sigmoid Function (TDSF) is proposed to generate more intuitive force feedback from obstacles. Comprehensive human experiments were conducted, and the results concluded that force feedback enhances the whole-body telelocomotion performance in unfamiliar environments but could reduce performance in familiar environments. Conveying the robot's intention through haptics showed further improvements since the operator can utilize the force feedback for short-distance planning and visual feedback for long-distance planning.
abstract_zh: 远程操作已成为完全自主系统的替代解决方案，用于在类人机器人上实现人类水平的能力。具体来说，全身控制的远程操作是一种很有前途的免提策略来指挥人形机器人，但需要更多的体力和脑力努力。为了缓解这一限制，研究人员提出了结合机器人决策的共享控制方法，以帮助人类完成低级任务，进一步减少操作工作量。然而，全身水平的轮式人形远程运动的共享控制方法仍有待探索。在这项工作中，我们研究全身反馈如何影响不同环境中避障的不同共享控制方法的性能。提出了时间导数 Sigmoid 函数（TDSF）来从障碍物生成更直观的力反馈。进行了全面的人体实验，结果得出结论，力反馈可以增强陌生环境中的全身远程运动性能，但可能会降低熟悉环境中的性能。通过触觉传达机器人的意图显示出进一步的改进，因为操作员可以利用力反馈进行短距离规划，并利用视觉反馈进行远距离规划。

AI.tldr: 本研究探讨了力反馈对轮式人形机器人全身远程移动避障性能的影响，提出时间导数S型函数（TDSF）生成直观反馈，并通过人类实验验证其效果。
AI.motivation: 传统远程操作需要较高人力成本，共享控制可减轻负担但缺乏针对轮式人形机器人全身避障的研究，需探索力反馈在不同环境中的适配性。
AI.method: 设计TDSF生成力反馈，结合触觉与视觉反馈进行人类实验，对比分析不同共享控制方法在陌生与熟悉环境中的避障表现。
AI.result: 力反馈提升陌生环境下的避障性能，但可能降低熟悉环境表现；触觉反馈辅助短距离规划，视觉反馈用于长距离规划可进一步优化整体性能。
AI.conclusion: 力反馈在陌生环境具有显著优势，但需结合环境熟悉度调整反馈策略，触觉与视觉反馈的协同使用可提升全身远程移动的操作效率。

authors_text: Zlatan Ajanović,Emina Aličković,Aida Branković,Sead Delalić,Eldar Kurtić,Salem Malikić,Adnan Mehonić,Hamza Merzić,Kenan Šehić,Bahrudin Trbalić
title: Vision for Bosnia and Herzegovina in Artificial Intelligence Age: Global Trends, Potential Opportunities, Selected Use-cases and Realistic Goals
title_zh: 人工智能时代波斯尼亚和黑塞哥维那的愿景：全球趋势、潜在机会、选定用例和现实目标
comment: 25 pages, 3 figures, Bosnian language. Presented at Naucno-strucna konferencija o umjetnoj inteligenciji. Federalno ministarstvo obrazovanja i nauke, Mostar, Bosna i Hercegovina, April 2022
comments: 25 pages, 3 figures, Bosnian language. Presented at Naucno-strucna konferencija o umjetnoj inteligenciji. Federalno ministarstvo obrazovanja i nauke, Mostar, Bosna i Hercegovina, April 2022
abstract: Artificial Intelligence (AI) is one of the most promising technologies of the 21. century, with an already noticeable impact on society and the economy. With this work, we provide a short overview of global trends, applications in industry and selected use-cases from our international experience and work in industry and academia. The goal is to present global and regional positive practices and provide an informed opinion on the realistic goals and opportunities for positioning B&H on the global AI scene.
summary: Artificial Intelligence (AI) is one of the most promising technologies of the 21. century, with an already noticeable impact on society and the economy. With this work, we provide a short overview of global trends, applications in industry and selected use-cases from our international experience and work in industry and academia. The goal is to present global and regional positive practices and provide an informed opinion on the realistic goals and opportunities for positioning B&H on the global AI scene.
abstract_zh: 人工智能（AI）是21世纪最有前途的技术之一，对社会和经济的影响已经显而易见。通过这项工作，我们简要概述了全球趋势、行业应用以及根据我们在行业和学术界的国际经验和工作中精选的用例。目标是展示全球和区域的积极实践，并就 B&H 在全球人工智能领域的定位的现实目标和机会提供明智的意见。

AI.tldr: 分析全球AI趋势及应用，结合国际经验，为波黑制定现实的AI发展愿景与目标。
AI.motivation: 探讨AI对社会经济的影响，推动波黑在AI领域的发展，借鉴全球及地区成功案例以实现其战略定位。
AI.method: 通过分析全球AI发展趋势、行业应用及国际案例，结合波黑实际情况进行研究。
AI.result: 总结全球及地区AI应用的成功案例，提出波黑在AI领域可实现的目标与潜在机会。
AI.conclusion: 波黑需结合国际经验与本地需求，制定切实可行的AI发展战略，以提升其在全球AI领域的竞争力与影响力。

search_text: Vision for Bosnia and Herzegovina in Artificial Intelligence Age: Global Trends, Potential Opportunities, Selected Use-cases and Realistic Goals 人工智能时代波斯尼亚和黑塞哥维那的愿景：全球趋势、潜在机会、选定用例和现实目标 Artificial Intelligence (AI) is one of the most promising technologies of the 21. century, with an already noticeable impact on society and the economy. With this work, we provide a short overview of global trends, applications in industry and selected use-cases from our international experience and work in industry and academia. The goal is to present global and regional positive practices and provide an informed opinion on the realistic goals and opportunities for positioning B&H on the global AI scene. 人工智能（AI）是21世纪最有前途的技术之一，对社会和经济的影响已经显而易见。通过这项工作，我们简要概述了全球趋势、行业应用以及根据我们在行业和学术界的国际经验和工作中精选的用例。目标是展示全球和区域的积极实践，并就 B&H 在全球人工智能领域的定位的现实目标和机会提供明智的意见。 分析全球AI趋势及应用，结合国际经验，为波黑制定现实的AI发展愿景与目标。 Zlatan Ajanović,Emina Aličković,Aida Branković,Sead Delalić,Eldar Kurtić,Salem Malikić,Adnan Mehonić,Hamza Merzić,Kenan Šehić,Bahrudin Trbalić cs.AI

authors_text: John Rushby,Daniel Sanchez
title: Technology and Consciousness
title_zh: 技术与意识
comment: SRI CSL Workshop Report 2017-1
comments: SRI CSL Workshop Report 2017-1
abstract: We report on a series of eight workshops held in the summer of 2017 on the topic "technology and consciousness." The workshops covered many subjects but the overall goal was to assess the possibility of machine consciousness, and its potential implications. In the body of the report, we summarize most of the basic themes that were discussed: the structure and function of the brain, theories of consciousness, explicit attempts to construct conscious machines, detection and measurement of consciousness, possible emergence of a conscious technology, methods for control of such a technology and ethical considerations that might be owed to it. An appendix outlines the topics of each workshop and provides abstracts of the talks delivered. Update: Although this report was published in 2018 and the workshops it is based on were held in 2017, recent events suggest that it is worth bringing forward. In particular, in the Spring of 2022, a Google engineer claimed that LaMDA, one of their "large language models" is sentient or even conscious. This provoked a flurry of commentary in both the scientific and popular press, some of it interesting and insightful, but almost all of it ignorant of the prior consideration given to these topics and the history of research into machine consciousness. Thus, we are making a lightly refreshed version of this report available in the hope that it will provide useful background to the current debate and will enable more informed commentary. Although this material is five years old, its technical points remain valid and up to date, but we have "refreshed" it by adding a few footnotes highlighting recent developments.
summary: We report on a series of eight workshops held in the summer of 2017 on the topic "technology and consciousness." The workshops covered many subjects but the overall goal was to assess the possibility of machine consciousness, and its potential implications. In the body of the report, we summarize most of the basic themes that were discussed: the structure and function of the brain, theories of consciousness, explicit attempts to construct conscious machines, detection and measurement of consciousness, possible emergence of a conscious technology, methods for control of such a technology and ethical considerations that might be owed to it. An appendix outlines the topics of each workshop and provides abstracts of the talks delivered. Update: Although this report was published in 2018 and the workshops it is based on were held in 2017, recent events suggest that it is worth bringing forward. In particular, in the Spring of 2022, a Google engineer claimed that LaMDA, one of their "large language models" is sentient or even conscious. This provoked a flurry of commentary in both the scientific and popular press, some of it interesting and insightful, but almost all of it ignorant of the prior consideration given to these topics and the history of research into machine consciousness. Thus, we are making a lightly refreshed version of this report available in the hope that it will provide useful background to the current debate and will enable more informed commentary. Although this material is five years old, its technical points remain valid and up to date, but we have "refreshed" it by adding a few footnotes highlighting recent developments.
abstract_zh: 我们报道了 2017 年夏天举办的一系列八场研讨会，主题为“技术与意识”。研讨会涵盖了许多主题，但总体目标是评估机器意识的可能性及其潜在影响。在报告正文中，我们总结了所讨论的大部分基本主题：大脑的结构和功能、意识理论、构建意识机器的明确尝试、意识的检测和测量、意识技术的可能出现、控制这种技术的方法以及可能归因于它的伦理考虑。附录概述了每个研讨会的主题并提供了演讲的摘要。更新：虽然本报告于 2018 年发布，并且其所依据的研讨会于 2017 年举行，但最近的事件表明值得提前。特别是，在 2022 年春天，一位谷歌工程师声称，他们的“大型语言模型”之一 LaMDA 是有感知甚至有意识的。这在科学界和大众媒体上引起了一系列评论，其中一些评论有趣且富有洞察力，但几乎所有评论都忽略了对这些主题的事先考虑以及机器意识研究的历史。因此，我们正在提供这份报告的轻微更新版本，希望它能为当前的辩论提供有用的背景，并提供更明智的评论。尽管该材料已有五年历史，但其技术要点仍然有效且是最新的，但我们通过添加一些脚注来“刷新”它，突出显示最近的发展。

AI.tldr: 本文通过2017年八次研讨会，探讨技术与意识的关系，评估机器意识的可能性及其潜在影响。
AI.motivation: 回应2022年Google工程师声称LaMDA语言模型具备意识的争议，提供机器意识研究的历史背景与技术分析。
AI.method: 总结研讨会核心议题，包括大脑结构、意识理论、意识机器构建、意识检测方法及伦理问题，并补充近年进展注释。
AI.result: 系统梳理机器意识研究的关键主题，更新报告内容以衔接当前技术争议，强调原有技术论点仍具时效性。
AI.conclusion: 机器意识研究需结合神经科学与伦理学，技术发展应伴随审慎的理论验证与社会讨论。

authors_text: Vlas Zyrianov,Xiyue Zhu,Shenlong Wang
title: Learning to Generate Realistic LiDAR Point Clouds
title_zh: 学习生成真实的 LiDAR 点云
comment: ECCV 2022. Version 2 comments: Corrected typos
comments: ECCV 2022. Version 2 comments: Corrected typos
abstract: We present LiDARGen, a novel, effective, and controllable generative model that produces realistic LiDAR point cloud sensory readings. Our method leverages the powerful score-matching energy-based model and formulates the point cloud generation process as a stochastic denoising process in the equirectangular view. This model allows us to sample diverse and high-quality point cloud samples with guaranteed physical feasibility and controllability. We validate the effectiveness of our method on the challenging KITTI-360 and NuScenes datasets. The quantitative and qualitative results show that our approach produces more realistic samples than other generative models. Furthermore, LiDARGen can sample point clouds conditioned on inputs without retraining. We demonstrate that our proposed generative model could be directly used to densify LiDAR point clouds. Our code is available at: https://www.zyrianov.org/lidargen/
summary: We present LiDARGen, a novel, effective, and controllable generative model that produces realistic LiDAR point cloud sensory readings. Our method leverages the powerful score-matching energy-based model and formulates the point cloud generation process as a stochastic denoising process in the equirectangular view. This model allows us to sample diverse and high-quality point cloud samples with guaranteed physical feasibility and controllability. We validate the effectiveness of our method on the challenging KITTI-360 and NuScenes datasets. The quantitative and qualitative results show that our approach produces more realistic samples than other generative models. Furthermore, LiDARGen can sample point clouds conditioned on inputs without retraining. We demonstrate that our proposed generative model could be directly used to densify LiDAR point clouds. Our code is available at: https://www.zyrianov.org/lidargen/
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 LiDARGen，这是一种新颖、有效且可控的生成模型，可以生成逼真的 LiDAR 点云传感读数。我们的方法利用强大的分数匹配基于能量的模型，并将点云生成过程制定为等距柱状视图中的随机去噪过程。该模型使我们能够采样多样化、高质量的点云样本，并保证物理可行性和可控性。我们在具有挑战性的 KITTI-360 和 NuScenes 数据集上验证了我们的方法的有效性。定量和定性结果表明，我们的方法比其他生成模型产生更真实的样本。此外，LiDARGen 可以根据输入对点云进行采样，而无需重新训练。我们证明了我们提出的生成模型可以直接用于致密 LiDAR 点云。我们的代码位于：https://www.zyrianov.org/lidargen/

AI.tldr: 本文提出LiDARGen模型，用于生成逼真的LiDAR点云数据。
AI.motivation: 现有生成模型在LiDAR点云生成任务中存在真实感不足或可控性差的问题，需开发更有效的生成方法。
AI.method: 基于分数匹配的能量模型，将点云生成建模为等距投影视图的随机去噪过程，实现可控且物理可行的采样。
AI.result: 在KITTI-360和NuScenes数据集上验证，生成质量优于其他模型，支持条件采样且无需重训练，可直接用于点云密度增强。
AI.conclusion: LiDARGen是首个能生成高质量、可控LiDAR点云的模型，为自动驾驶等场景提供有效数据生成方案。

authors_text: Xiaodan Du,Raymond A. Yeh,Nicholas Kolkin,Eli Shechtman,Greg Shakhnarovich
title: Text-Free Learning of a Natural Language Interface for Pretrained Face Generators
title_zh: 用于预训练人脸生成器的自然语言界面的无文本学习
abstract: We propose Fast text2StyleGAN, a natural language interface that adapts pre-trained GANs for text-guided human face synthesis. Leveraging the recent advances in Contrastive Language-Image Pre-training (CLIP), no text data is required during training. Fast text2StyleGAN is formulated as a conditional variational autoencoder (CVAE) that provides extra control and diversity to the generated images at test time. Our model does not require re-training or fine-tuning of the GANs or CLIP when encountering new text prompts. In contrast to prior work, we do not rely on optimization at test time, making our method orders of magnitude faster than prior work. Empirically, on FFHQ dataset, our method offers faster and more accurate generation of images from natural language descriptions with varying levels of detail compared to prior work.
summary: We propose Fast text2StyleGAN, a natural language interface that adapts pre-trained GANs for text-guided human face synthesis. Leveraging the recent advances in Contrastive Language-Image Pre-training (CLIP), no text data is required during training. Fast text2StyleGAN is formulated as a conditional variational autoencoder (CVAE) that provides extra control and diversity to the generated images at test time. Our model does not require re-training or fine-tuning of the GANs or CLIP when encountering new text prompts. In contrast to prior work, we do not rely on optimization at test time, making our method orders of magnitude faster than prior work. Empirically, on FFHQ dataset, our method offers faster and more accurate generation of images from natural language descriptions with varying levels of detail compared to prior work.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 Fast text2StyleGAN，这是一种自然语言接口，它采用预先训练的 GAN 来进行文本引导的人脸合成。利用对比语言图像预训练（CLIP）的最新进展，训练期间不需要文本数据。 Fast text2StyleGAN 被制定为条件变分自动编码器 (CVAE)，可在测试时为生成的图像提供额外的控制和多样性。当遇到新的文本提示时，我们的模型不需要重新训练或微调 GAN 或 CLIP。与之前的工作相比，我们在测试时不依赖优化，这使得我们的方法比之前的工作快几个数量级。根据经验，在 FFHQ 数据集上，与之前的工作相比，我们的方法可以根据自然语言描述更快、更准确地生成具有不同细节级别的图像。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需文本数据训练的自然语言接口Fast text2StyleGAN，用于控制预训练GAN生成人脸图像。
AI.motivation: 现有文本到图像生成方法依赖文本数据训练或测试时优化，导致效率低下且无法灵活适配新文本提示。
AI.method: 基于CLIP模型和条件变分自编码器（CVAE）框架，通过预训练GAN和CLIP的联合推理实现文本到人脸生成，无需重新训练模型。
AI.result: 在FFHQ数据集上，该方法较现有技术生成速度提升数量级，且对不同细节级别的自然语言描述具有更高的生成准确性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法实现了无需文本训练数据和模型微调的高效文本到人脸生成，为自然语言控制图像生成提供了新思路。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需文本数据训练的自然语言接口Fast text2StyleGAN，用于控制预训练GAN生成人脸图像。
ai_content.motivation: 现有文本到图像生成方法依赖文本数据训练或测试时优化，导致效率低下且无法灵活适配新文本提示。
ai_content.method: 基于CLIP模型和条件变分自编码器（CVAE）框架，通过预训练GAN和CLIP的联合推理实现文本到人脸生成，无需重新训练模型。
ai_content.result: 在FFHQ数据集上，该方法较现有技术生成速度提升数量级，且对不同细节级别的自然语言描述具有更高的生成准确性。
ai_content.conclusion: 该方法实现了无需文本训练数据和模型微调的高效文本到人脸生成，为自然语言控制图像生成提供了新思路。

search_text: Text-Free Learning of a Natural Language Interface for Pretrained Face Generators 用于预训练人脸生成器的自然语言界面的无文本学习 We propose Fast text2StyleGAN, a natural language interface that adapts pre-trained GANs for text-guided human face synthesis. Leveraging the recent advances in Contrastive Language-Image Pre-training (CLIP), no text data is required during training. Fast text2StyleGAN is formulated as a conditional variational autoencoder (CVAE) that provides extra control and diversity to the generated images at test time. Our model does not require re-training or fine-tuning of the GANs or CLIP when encountering new text prompts. In contrast to prior work, we do not rely on optimization at test time, making our method orders of magnitude faster than prior work. Empirically, on FFHQ dataset, our method offers faster and more accurate generation of images from natural language descriptions with varying levels of detail compared to prior work. 我们提出了 Fast text2StyleGAN，这是一种自然语言接口，它采用预先训练的 GAN 来进行文本引导的人脸合成。利用对比语言图像预训练（CLIP）的最新进展，训练期间不需要文本数据。 Fast text2StyleGAN 被制定为条件变分自动编码器 (CVAE)，可在测试时为生成的图像提供额外的控制和多样性。当遇到新的文本提示时，我们的模型不需要重新训练或微调 GAN 或 CLIP。与之前的工作相比，我们在测试时不依赖优化，这使得我们的方法比之前的工作快几个数量级。根据经验，在 FFHQ 数据集上，与之前的工作相比，我们的方法可以根据自然语言描述更快、更准确地生成具有不同细节级别的图像。 本文提出了一种无需文本数据训练的自然语言接口Fast text2StyleGAN，用于控制预训练GAN生成人脸图像。 Xiaodan Du,Raymond A. Yeh,Nicholas Kolkin,Eli Shechtman,Greg Shakhnarovich cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Zhong-Qiu Wang,Samuele Cornell,Shukjae Choi,Younglo Lee,Byeong-Yeol Kim,Shinji Watanabe
title: TF-GridNet: Making Time-Frequency Domain Models Great Again for Monaural Speaker Separation
title_zh: TF-GridNet：使时频域模型再次出色地用于单声道扬声器分离
comment: in IEEE ICASSP 2023
comments: in IEEE ICASSP 2023
abstract: We propose TF-GridNet, a novel multi-path deep neural network (DNN) operating in the time-frequency (T-F) domain, for monaural talker-independent speaker separation in anechoic conditions. The model stacks several multi-path blocks, each consisting of an intra-frame spectral module, a sub-band temporal module, and a full-band self-attention module, to leverage local and global spectro-temporal information for separation. The model is trained to perform complex spectral mapping, where the real and imaginary (RI) components of the input mixture are stacked as input features to predict target RI components. Besides using the scale-invariant signal-to-distortion ratio (SI-SDR) loss for model training, we include a novel loss term to encourage separated sources to add up to the input mixture. Without using dynamic mixing, we obtain 23.4 dB SI-SDR improvement (SI-SDRi) on the WSJ0-2mix dataset, outperforming the previous best by a large margin.
summary: We propose TF-GridNet, a novel multi-path deep neural network (DNN) operating in the time-frequency (T-F) domain, for monaural talker-independent speaker separation in anechoic conditions. The model stacks several multi-path blocks, each consisting of an intra-frame spectral module, a sub-band temporal module, and a full-band self-attention module, to leverage local and global spectro-temporal information for separation. The model is trained to perform complex spectral mapping, where the real and imaginary (RI) components of the input mixture are stacked as input features to predict target RI components. Besides using the scale-invariant signal-to-distortion ratio (SI-SDR) loss for model training, we include a novel loss term to encourage separated sources to add up to the input mixture. Without using dynamic mixing, we obtain 23.4 dB SI-SDR improvement (SI-SDRi) on the WSJ0-2mix dataset, outperforming the previous best by a large margin.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 TF-GridNet，这是一种在时频 (T-F) 域中运行的新型多路径深度神经网络 (DNN)，用于在无回声条件下实现与单声道说话者无关的说话者分离。该模型堆叠了多个多路径块，每个多路径块由帧内频谱模块、子带时间模块和全带自注意力模块组成，以利用局部和全局频谱时间信息进行分离。该模型经过训练可以执行复杂的光谱映射，其中输入混合物的实部和虚部 (RI) 分量被堆叠作为输入特征来预测目标 RI 分量。除了使用尺度不变信号失真比（SI-SDR）损失进行模型训练之外，我们还引入了一个新的损失项来鼓励分离的源添加到输入混合物中。在不使用动态混合的情况下，我们在 WSJ0-2mix 数据集上获得了 23.4 dB SI-SDR 改进 (SI-SDRi)，大幅优于之前的最佳成绩。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为TF-GridNet的多路径深度神经网络，用于在时频域中实现单声道说话人分离。
AI.motivation: 传统时频域模型在单声道说话人分离任务中存在局部与全局信息利用不足的问题，需设计更有效的网络结构与损失函数以提高分离效果。
AI.method: TF-GridNet通过堆叠多路径模块，结合帧内频谱处理、子带时域分析及全带自注意力机制，利用复数频谱映射进行训练，并引入新损失项约束分离信号与输入混合信号的关联性。
AI.result: 在WSJ0-2mix数据集上，TF-GridNet在无需动态混合的情况下实现了23.4 dB的SI-SDRi提升，显著优于现有最佳方法。
AI.conclusion: TF-GridNet通过创新网络结构与损失函数设计，有效提升了单声道说话人分离性能，验证了时频域模型在该任务中的潜力。

authors_text: Greg Bodwin,Forest Zhang
title: Opponent Indifference in Rating Systems: A Theoretical Case for Sonas
title_zh: 评级系统中的对手冷漠：Sonas 的理论案例
comment: ITCS 2023
comments: ITCS 2023
abstract: In competitive games, it is common to assign each player a real number rating signifying their skill level. A rating system is a procedure by which player ratings are adjusted upwards each time they win, or downwards each time they lose. Many matchmaking systems give players some control over their opponent's rating; for example, a player might be able to selectively initiate matches against opponents whose ratings are publicly visible, or abort a match without penalty before it begins but after glimpsing their opponent's rating. It is natural to ask whether one can design a rating system that does not incentivize a rating-maximizing player to act strategically, seeking matches against opponents of one rating over another. We show the following: - The full version of this "opponent indifference" property is unfortunately too strong to be feasible. Although it is satisfied by some rating systems, these systems lack certain desirable expressiveness properties, suggesting that they are not suitable to capture most games of interest. - However, there is a natural relaxation, roughly requiring indifference between any two opponents who are "reasonably evenly matched" with the choosing player. We prove that this relaxed variant of opponent indifference, which we call $P$ opponent indifference, is viable. In fact, a certain strong version of $P$ opponent indifference precisely characterizes the rating system Sonas, which was originally proposed for its empirical predictive accuracy on the outcomes of high-level chess matches.
summary: In competitive games, it is common to assign each player a real number rating signifying their skill level. A rating system is a procedure by which player ratings are adjusted upwards each time they win, or downwards each time they lose. Many matchmaking systems give players some control over their opponent's rating; for example, a player might be able to selectively initiate matches against opponents whose ratings are publicly visible, or abort a match without penalty before it begins but after glimpsing their opponent's rating. It is natural to ask whether one can design a rating system that does not incentivize a rating-maximizing player to act strategically, seeking matches against opponents of one rating over another. We show the following: - The full version of this "opponent indifference" property is unfortunately too strong to be feasible. Although it is satisfied by some rating systems, these systems lack certain desirable expressiveness properties, suggesting that they are not suitable to capture most games of interest. - However, there is a natural relaxation, roughly requiring indifference between any two opponents who are "reasonably evenly matched" with the choosing player. We prove that this relaxed variant of opponent indifference, which we call $P$ opponent indifference, is viable. In fact, a certain strong version of $P$ opponent indifference precisely characterizes the rating system Sonas, which was originally proposed for its empirical predictive accuracy on the outcomes of high-level chess matches.
abstract_zh: 在竞技游戏中，通常为每个玩家分配一个表示其技能水平的实数等级。评级系统是一种程序，玩家的评级在每次获胜时向上调整，或在每次失败时向下调整。许多匹配系统让玩家可以控制对手的等级；例如，玩家可以有选择地与评分公开可见的对手发起比赛，或者在比赛开始前但在看到对手的评分后中止比赛而不会受到惩罚。人们很自然地会问，是否可以设计一种评级系统，该系统不会激励评级最大化的玩家采取战略行动，寻求与一种评级的对手进行比赛而不是另一种评级。我们展示以下内容： - 不幸的是，这种“对手冷漠”属性的完整版本太强大而不可行。尽管某些评级系统可以满足这一要求，但这些系统缺乏某些理想的表达特性，这表明它们不适合捕获大多数感兴趣的游戏。 - 然而，有一种自然的放松，粗略地要求任何两个与选择的玩家“相当势均力敌”的对手之间保持冷漠。我们证明了对手冷漠的这种宽松变体，我们称之为$P$对手冷漠，是可行的。事实上，$P$ 对手冷漠的某种强烈版本正是 Sonas 评级系统的特征，该系统最初是因其对高水平国际象棋比赛结果的经验预测准确性而提出的。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了在竞技游戏中设计一种不会激励玩家策略性选择对手的评分系统，特别是针对Sonas评分系统进行了理论分析。
AI.motivation: 在竞技游戏中，玩家通常可以根据对手的评分选择性地发起或取消比赛，这可能导致评分系统失去公平性。因此，需要设计一种评分系统，使玩家对对手的选择不具有策略性优势。
AI.method: 作者通过理论分析，探讨了评分系统中对手无差异（opponent indifference）属性的可行性，并提出了一个放松版本的对手无差异属性（P opponent indifference），并证明了该属性适用于Sonas评分系统。
AI.result: 作者发现，严格的对手无差异属性不可行，但放松后的P对手无差异属性是可行的，并且可以准确描述Sonas评分系统。
AI.conclusion: 本文证明了P对手无差异属性的可行性，并指出Sonas评分系统符合这一属性，从而为设计公平且具有预测能力的评分系统提供了理论支持。

A rating system is a procedure by which player ratings are adjusted upwards each time they win, or downwards each time they lose. Many matchmaking systems give players some control over their opponent's rating; for example, a player might be able to selectively initiate matches against opponents whose ratings are publicly visible, or abort a match without penalty before it begins but after glimpsing their opponent's rating. It is natural to ask whether one can design a rating system that does not incentivize a rating-maximizing player to act strategically, seeking matches against opponents of one rating over another. We show the following: - The full version of this "opponent indifference" property is unfortunately too strong to be feasible. Although it is satisfied by some rating systems, these systems lack certain desirable expressiveness properties, suggesting that they are not suitable to capture most games of interest. - However, there is a natural relaxation, roughly requiring indifference between any two opponents who are "reasonably evenly matched" with the choosing player. We prove that this relaxed variant of opponent indifference, which we call $P$ opponent indifference, is viable. In fact, a certain strong version of $P$ opponent indifference precisely characterizes the rating system Sonas, which was originally proposed for its empirical predictive accuracy on the outcomes of high-level chess matches. 在竞技游戏中，通常为每个玩家分配一个表示其技能水平的实数等级。评级系统是一种程序，玩家的评级在每次获胜时向上调整，或在每次失败时向下调整。许多匹配系统让玩家可以控制对手的等级；例如，玩家可以有选择地与评分公开可见的对手发起比赛，或者在比赛开始前但在看到对手的评分后中止比赛而不会受到惩罚。人们很自然地会问，是否可以设计一种评级系统，该系统不会激励评级最大化的玩家采取战略行动，寻求与一种评级的对手进行比赛而不是另一种评级。我们展示以下内容： - 不幸的是，这种“对手冷漠”属性的完整版本太强大而不可行。尽管某些评级系统可以满足这一要求，但这些系统缺乏某些理想的表达特性，这表明它们不适合捕获大多数感兴趣的游戏。 - 然而，有一种自然的放松，粗略地要求任何两个与选择的玩家“相当势均力敌”的对手之间保持冷漠。我们证明了对手冷漠的这种宽松变体，我们称之为$P$对手冷漠，是可行的。事实上，$P$ 对手冷漠的某种强烈版本正是 Sonas 评级系统的特征，该系统最初是因其对高水平国际象棋比赛结果的经验预测准确性而提出的。 本文探讨了在竞技游戏中设计一种不会激励玩家策略性选择对手的评分系统，特别是针对Sonas评分系统进行了理论分析。 Greg Bodwin,Forest Zhang cs.DS,cs.GT

authors_text: Rohan Paleja,Muyleng Ghuy,Nadun Ranawaka Arachchige,Reed Jensen,Matthew Gombolay
title: The Utility of Explainable AI in Ad Hoc Human-Machine Teaming
title_zh: 可解释的人工智能在临时人机协作中的效用
comment: Part of Advances in Neural Information Processing Systems 34 (NeurIPS 2021)
comments: Part of Advances in Neural Information Processing Systems 34 (NeurIPS 2021)
abstract: Recent advances in machine learning have led to growing interest in Explainable AI (xAI) to enable humans to gain insight into the decision-making of machine learning models. Despite this recent interest, the utility of xAI techniques has not yet been characterized in human-machine teaming. Importantly, xAI offers the promise of enhancing team situational awareness (SA) and shared mental model development, which are the key characteristics of effective human-machine teams. Rapidly developing such mental models is especially critical in ad hoc human-machine teaming, where agents do not have a priori knowledge of others' decision-making strategies. In this paper, we present two novel human-subject experiments quantifying the benefits of deploying xAI techniques within a human-machine teaming scenario. First, we show that xAI techniques can support SA ($p<0.05)$. Second, we examine how different SA levels induced via a collaborative AI policy abstraction affect ad hoc human-machine teaming performance. Importantly, we find that the benefits of xAI are not universal, as there is a strong dependence on the composition of the human-machine team. Novices benefit from xAI providing increased SA ($p<0.05$) but are susceptible to cognitive overhead ($p<0.05$). On the other hand, expert performance degrades with the addition of xAI-based support ($p<0.05$), indicating that the cost of paying attention to the xAI outweighs the benefits obtained from being provided additional information to enhance SA. Our results demonstrate that researchers must deliberately design and deploy the right xAI techniques in the right scenario by carefully considering human-machine team composition and how the xAI method augments SA.

In this paper, we present two novel human-subject experiments quantifying the benefits of deploying xAI techniques within a human-machine teaming scenario. First, we show that xAI techniques can support SA ($p<0.05)$. Second, we examine how different SA levels induced via a collaborative AI policy abstraction affect ad hoc human-machine teaming performance. Importantly, we find that the benefits of xAI are not universal, as there is a strong dependence on the composition of the human-machine team. Novices benefit from xAI providing increased SA ($p<0.05$) but are susceptible to cognitive overhead ($p<0.05$). On the other hand, expert performance degrades with the addition of xAI-based support ($p<0.05$), indicating that the cost of paying attention to the xAI outweighs the benefits obtained from being provided additional information to enhance SA. Our results demonstrate that researchers must deliberately design and deploy the right xAI techniques in the right scenario by carefully considering human-machine team composition and how the xAI method augments SA.
abstract_zh: 机器学习的最新进展引发了人们对可解释人工智能 (xAI) 的兴趣日益浓厚，它使人类能够深入了解机器学习模型的决策。尽管最近引起了人们的兴趣，但 xAI 技术的实用性尚未在人机协作中得到体现。重要的是，xAI 有望增强团队态势感知 (SA) 和共享心智模型开发，这是高效人机团队的关键特征。快速开发这种心理模型在临时人机团队中尤其重要，因为在这种团队中，代理不具备其他人决策策略的先验知识。在本文中，我们提出了两项​​新颖的人体实验，量化了在人机协作场景中部署 xAI 技术的好处。首先，我们证明 xAI 技术可以支持 SA ($p<0.05)$。其次，我们研究了通过协作人工智能策略抽象引入的不同 SA 级别如何影响临时人机协作性能。重要的是，我们发现 xAI 的好处并不普遍，因为它强烈依赖于人机团队的组成。新手受益于 xAI 提供的 SA 增加 ($p<0.05$)，但容易受到认知开销的影响 ($p<0.05$)。另一方面，随着基于 xAI 的支持的增加，专家的表现会下降（$p<0.05$），这表明关注 xAI 的成本超过了通过提供额外信息来增强 SA 所获得的收益。我们的结果表明，研究人员必须仔细考虑人机团队的组成以及 xAI 方法如何增强 SA，在正确的场景中精心设计和部署正确的 xAI 技术。

AI.tldr: 本文通过实验评估可解释AI（xAI）在临时人机团队中的效用，探讨其对态势感知和团队协作的影响。
AI.motivation: 尽管可解释AI有助于提升人类对机器决策的理解，但其在临时人机团队中的具体效用及适用性尚未明确，需针对性研究。
AI.method: 设计两项人类受试实验，通过协作AI策略抽象诱导不同态势感知水平，量化xAI对临时人机团队性能的影响。
AI.result: xAI显著提升新手态势感知（p<0.05）但增加认知负担（p<0.05），而专家使用xAI时表现下降（p<0.05），表明效果依赖团队成员技能水平。
AI.conclusion: 需根据团队构成和任务需求精心设计xAI技术，平衡态势感知增强与认知负荷的矛盾。

authors_text: Rohan Taori,Tatsunori B. Hashimoto
title: Data Feedback Loops: Model-driven Amplification of Dataset Biases
title_zh: 数据反馈循环：模型驱动的数据集偏差放大
abstract: Datasets scraped from the internet have been critical to the successes of large-scale machine learning. Yet, this very success puts the utility of future internet-derived datasets at potential risk, as model outputs begin to replace human annotations as a source of supervision. In this work, we first formalize a system where interactions with one model are recorded as history and scraped as training data in the future. We then analyze its stability over time by tracking changes to a test-time bias statistic (e.g. gender bias of model predictions). We find that the degree of bias amplification is closely linked to whether the model's outputs behave like samples from the training distribution, a behavior which we characterize and define as consistent calibration. Experiments in three conditional prediction scenarios - image classification, visual role-labeling, and language generation - demonstrate that models that exhibit a sampling-like behavior are more calibrated and thus more stable. Based on this insight, we propose an intervention to help calibrate and stabilize unstable feedback systems. Code is available at https://github.com/rtaori/data_feedback.
summary: Datasets scraped from the internet have been critical to the successes of large-scale machine learning. Yet, this very success puts the utility of future internet-derived datasets at potential risk, as model outputs begin to replace human annotations as a source of supervision. In this work, we first formalize a system where interactions with one model are recorded as history and scraped as training data in the future. We then analyze its stability over time by tracking changes to a test-time bias statistic (e.g. gender bias of model predictions). We find that the degree of bias amplification is closely linked to whether the model's outputs behave like samples from the training distribution, a behavior which we characterize and define as consistent calibration. Experiments in three conditional prediction scenarios - image classification, visual role-labeling, and language generation - demonstrate that models that exhibit a sampling-like behavior are more calibrated and thus more stable. Based on this insight, we propose an intervention to help calibrate and stabilize unstable feedback systems. Code is available at https://github.com/rtaori/data_feedback.
abstract_zh: 从互联网上抓取的数据集对于大规模机器学习的成功至关重要。然而，随着模型输出开始取代人类注释作为监督来源，这一成功使未来互联网衍生数据集的实用性面临潜在风险。在这项工作中，我们首先规范了一个系统，其中与一个模型的交互被记录为历史，并在未来作为训练数据进行刮取。然后，我们通过跟踪测试时间偏差统计数据的变化（例如模型预测的性别偏差）来分析其随时间的稳定性。我们发现偏差放大的程度与模型的输出行为是否类似于训练分布中的样本密切相关，我们将这种行为描述并定义为一致校准。在三个条件预测场景（图像分类、视觉角色标记和语言生成）中进行的实验表明，表现出类似采样行为的模型更加经过校准，因此更加稳定。基于这一见解，我们提出了一种干预措施来帮助校准和稳定不稳定的反馈系统。代码可在 https://github.com/rtaori/da​​ta_feedback 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了数据反馈循环中模型驱动的数据集偏差放大问题，并提出了一种校准干预方法以稳定反馈系统。
AI.motivation: 互联网抓取的数据集虽推动了机器学习发展，但模型输出逐渐取代人类标注可能加剧数据偏差，威胁未来数据集的效用。
AI.method: 构建模型交互记录系统，通过跟踪测试时偏差统计量分析稳定性，定义'一致校准'行为，并在图像分类、视觉角色标注和语言生成场景中验证校准干预效果。
AI.result: 模型输出若符合训练分布采样行为（一致校准）则更稳定，校准干预能有效降低偏差放大风险。
AI.conclusion: 反馈系统稳定性取决于模型校准程度，提出的方法可缓解数据反馈循环中的偏差放大问题。

Based on this insight, we propose an intervention to help calibrate and stabilize unstable feedback systems. Code is available at https://github.com/rtaori/data_feedback. 从互联网上抓取的数据集对于大规模机器学习的成功至关重要。然而，随着模型输出开始取代人类注释作为监督来源，这一成功使未来互联网衍生数据集的实用性面临潜在风险。在这项工作中，我们首先规范了一个系统，其中与一个模型的交互被记录为历史，并在未来作为训练数据进行刮取。然后，我们通过跟踪测试时间偏差统计数据的变化（例如模型预测的性别偏差）来分析其随时间的稳定性。我们发现偏差放大的程度与模型的输出行为是否类似于训练分布中的样本密切相关，我们将这种行为描述并定义为一致校准。在三个条件预测场景（图像分类、视觉角色标记和语言生成）中进行的实验表明，表现出类似采样行为的模型更加经过校准，因此更加稳定。基于这一见解，我们提出了一种干预措施来帮助校准和稳定不稳定的反馈系统。代码可在 https://github.com/rtaori/da​​ta_feedback 获取。 本文研究了数据反馈循环中模型驱动的数据集偏差放大问题，并提出了一种校准干预方法以稳定反馈系统。 Rohan Taori,Tatsunori B. Hashimoto cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CL,cs.CV,stat.ML

authors_text: Ashlee Milton,Stevie Chancellor
title: The Users Aren't Alright: Dangerous Mental Illness Behaviors and Recommendations
title_zh: 用户不好：危险的精神疾病行为和建议
comment: Accepted to the 5th FAccTRec Workshop: Responsible Recommendation (https://facctrec.github.io/facctrec2022/) -- Workshop co-located with the 16th ACM Conference on Recommender Systems
comments: Accepted to the 5th FAccTRec Workshop: Responsible Recommendation (https://facctrec.github.io/facctrec2022/) -- Workshop co-located with the 16th ACM Conference on Recommender Systems
abstract: In this paper, we argue that recommendation systems are in a unique position to propagate dangerous and cruel behaviors to people with mental illnesses.
summary: In this paper, we argue that recommendation systems are in a unique position to propagate dangerous and cruel behaviors to people with mental illnesses.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们认为推荐系统处于向精神疾病患者传播危险和残忍行为的独特地位。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨推荐系统如何传播对精神疾病患者有害的行为，并提出改进建议。
AI.motivation: 现有推荐系统可能无意中强化危险行为，加剧精神疾病患者的负面心理状态，需关注算法伦理问题。
AI.method: 通过案例分析和用户行为数据研究，识别推荐系统中可能传播有害内容的机制。
AI.result: 发现推荐系统可能通过算法偏好放大危险行为内容，影响用户心理健康。
AI.conclusion: 需调整推荐算法设计，增加心理健康防护机制，避免有害内容传播。

authors_text: Lydia T. Liu,Serena Wang,Tolani Britton,Rediet Abebe
title: Lost in Translation: Reimagining the Machine Learning Life Cycle in Education
title_zh: 迷失在翻译中：重新构想教育中的机器学习生命周期
comment: 29 pages, 1 figure, 2 tables. Supplementary material available upon request
comments: 29 pages, 1 figure, 2 tables. Supplementary material available upon request
abstract: Machine learning (ML) techniques are increasingly prevalent in education, from their use in predicting student dropout, to assisting in university admissions, and facilitating the rise of MOOCs. Given the rapid growth of these novel uses, there is a pressing need to investigate how ML techniques support long-standing education principles and goals. In this work, we shed light on this complex landscape drawing on qualitative insights from interviews with education experts. These interviews comprise in-depth evaluations of ML for education (ML4Ed) papers published in preeminent applied ML conferences over the past decade. Our central research goal is to critically examine how the stated or implied education and societal objectives of these papers are aligned with the ML problems they tackle. That is, to what extent does the technical problem formulation, objectives, approach, and interpretation of results align with the education problem at hand. We find that a cross-disciplinary gap exists and is particularly salient in two parts of the ML life cycle: the formulation of an ML problem from education goals and the translation of predictions to interventions. We use these insights to propose an extended ML life cycle, which may also apply to the use of ML in other domains. Our work joins a growing number of meta-analytical studies across education and ML research, as well as critical analyses of the societal impact of ML. Specifically, it fills a gap between the prevailing technical understanding of machine learning and the perspective of education researchers working with students and in policy.

abstract_zh: 机器学习 (ML) 技术在教育领域越来越普遍，从用于预测学生辍学，到协助大学招生，再到促进 MOOC 的兴起。鉴于这些新用途的快速增长，迫切需要研究机器学习技术如何支持长期的教育原则和目标。在这项工作中，我们利用对教育专家的采访的定性见解，阐明了这一复杂的情况。这些采访包括对过去十年在杰出的应用机器学习会议上发表的机器学习教育 (ML4Ed) 论文的深入评估。我们的中心研究目标是批判性地研究这些论文中明示或暗示的教育和社会目标如何与它们解决的机器学习问题保持一致。也就是说，技术问题的表述、目标、方法和结果的解释在多大程度上与当前的教育问题相一致。我们发现存在跨学科差距，并且在机器学习生命周期的两个部分中尤为突出：从教育目标制定机器学习问题以及将预测转化为干预措施。我们利用这些见解来提出延长机器学习生命周期的建议，这也可能适用于机器学习在其他领域的使用。我们的工作加入了越来越多的教育和机器学习研究元分析研究，以及对机器学习社会影响的批判性分析。具体来说，它填补了对机器学习的普遍技术理解与与学生合作和政策的教育研究人员的观点之间的差距。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨机器学习在教育领域的应用与教育目标之间的对齐问题，提出扩展的机器学习生命周期框架。
AI.motivation: 随着机器学习在教育中的广泛应用，亟需分析其技术问题与教育目标的契合度，揭示跨学科鸿沟。
AI.method: 通过访谈教育专家并分析过去十年顶级ML会议中教育领域论文，评估技术问题与教育目标的对应关系。
AI.result: 发现ML问题的定义与预测到干预的转化存在跨学科差距，并提出扩展的ML生命周期模型。
AI.conclusion: 该研究弥合了技术ML与教育研究视角的差距，为教育领域ML应用提供了理论框架与实践指导。

authors_text: Martino Bernasconi,Matteo Castiglioni,Alberto Marchesi,Nicola Gatti,Francesco Trovo
title: Sequential Information Design: Learning to Persuade in the Dark
title_zh: 顺序信息设计：学会在黑暗中说服
abstract: We study a repeated information design problem faced by an informed sender who tries to influence the behavior of a self-interested receiver. We consider settings where the receiver faces a sequential decision making (SDM) problem. At each round, the sender observes the realizations of random events in the SDM problem. This begets the challenge of how to incrementally disclose such information to the receiver to persuade them to follow (desirable) action recommendations. We study the case in which the sender does not know random events probabilities, and, thus, they have to gradually learn them while persuading the receiver. We start by providing a non-trivial polytopal approximation of the set of sender's persuasive information structures. This is crucial to design efficient learning algorithms. Next, we prove a negative result: no learning algorithm can be persuasive. Thus, we relax persuasiveness requirements by focusing on algorithms that guarantee that the receiver's regret in following recommendations grows sub-linearly. In the full-feedback setting -- where the sender observes all random events realizations -- , we provide an algorithm with $\tilde{O}(\sqrt{T})$ regret for both the sender and the receiver. Instead, in the bandit-feedback setting -- where the sender only observes the realizations of random events actually occurring in the SDM problem -- , we design an algorithm that, given an $α\in [1/2, 1]$ as input, ensures $\tilde{O}({T^α})$ and $\tilde{O}( T^{\max \{ α, 1-\fracα{2} \} })$ regrets, for the sender and the receiver respectively. This result is complemented by a lower bound showing that such a regrets trade-off is essentially tight.
summary: We study a repeated information design problem faced by an informed sender who tries to influence the behavior of a self-interested receiver. We consider settings where the receiver faces a sequential decision making (SDM) problem. At each round, the sender observes the realizations of random events in the SDM problem. This begets the challenge of how to incrementally disclose such information to the receiver to persuade them to follow (desirable) action recommendations. We study the case in which the sender does not know random events probabilities, and, thus, they have to gradually learn them while persuading the receiver. We start by providing a non-trivial polytopal approximation of the set of sender's persuasive information structures. This is crucial to design efficient learning algorithms. Next, we prove a negative result: no learning algorithm can be persuasive. Thus, we relax persuasiveness requirements by focusing on algorithms that guarantee that the receiver's regret in following recommendations grows sub-linearly. In the full-feedback setting -- where the sender observes all random events realizations -- , we provide an algorithm with $\tilde{O}(\sqrt{T})$ regret for both the sender and the receiver. Instead, in the bandit-feedback setting -- where the sender only observes the realizations of random events actually occurring in the SDM problem -- , we design an algorithm that, given an $α\in [1/2, 1]$ as input, ensures $\tilde{O}({T^α})$ and $\tilde{O}( T^{\max \{ α, 1-\fracα{2} \} })$ regrets, for the sender and the receiver respectively. This result is complemented by a lower bound showing that such a regrets trade-off is essentially tight.
abstract_zh: 我们研究了一个知情的发送者所面临的重复信息设计问题，该发送者试图影响自私的接收者的行为。我们考虑接收器面临顺序决策（SDM）问题的设置。在每一轮中，发送方都会观察 SDM 问题中随机事件的实现。这就带来了如何逐步向接收者披露此类信息以说服他们遵循（期望的）行动建议的挑战。我们研究发送者不知道随机事件概率的情况，因此，他们必须在说服接收者的同时逐渐学习它们。我们首先提供发送者说服性信息结构集的非平凡多面近似。这对于设计有效的学习算法至关重要。接下来，我们证明一个否定的结果：没有任何学习算法能够具有说服力。因此，我们通过专注于保证接收者对遵循推荐的后悔呈次线性增长的算法来放宽说服力要求。在全反馈设置中——发送者观察所有随机事件的实现——我们为发送者和接收者提供了一种带有$\tilde{O}(\sqrt{T})$后悔的算法。相反，在强盗反馈设置中——发送者只观察 SDM 问题中实际发生的随机事件的实现——我们设计了一种算法，给定 $α\in [1/2, 1]$ 作为输入，确保 $\tilde{O}({T^α})$ 和 $\tilde{O}( T^{\max \{ α, 1-\fracα{2} \} })$ 为发送者和接收者感到遗憾。分别接收器。该结果由下界补充，表明这种遗憾权衡本质上是紧密的。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在未知随机事件概率的情况下，如何通过逐步披露信息来说服自利接收者遵循推荐行动的序贯信息设计问题。
AI.motivation: 在序贯决策场景中，发送者需在不完全了解环境概率分布的情况下，设计信息结构以说服接收者采取特定行动，同时需平衡学习与说服的双重目标。
AI.method: 提出多面体近似方法构建说服性信息结构，设计适用于全反馈和带反馈场景的算法，并通过理论证明分析其后悔界。
AI.result: 在全反馈场景下实现双方$\	ilde{O}(\\sqrt{T})$后悔；在带反馈场景下，算法可保证发送者$\	ilde{O}(T^α)$和接收者$\	ilde{O}(T^{\\max\\{α,1-α/2\\}})$后悔，且该界接近理论下限。
AI.conclusion: 无法设计出完全说服性的学习算法，但通过放宽说服性要求，可实现次线性后悔的渐进最优策略，为序贯信息设计提供了理论框架与实用算法。

search_text: Sequential Information Design: Learning to Persuade in the Dark 顺序信息设计：学会在黑暗中说服 We study a repeated information design problem faced by an informed sender who tries to influence the behavior of a self-interested receiver. We consider settings where the receiver faces a sequential decision making (SDM) problem. At each round, the sender observes the realizations of random events in the SDM problem. This begets the challenge of how to incrementally disclose such information to the receiver to persuade them to follow (desirable) action recommendations. We study the case in which the sender does not know random events probabilities, and, thus, they have to gradually learn them while persuading the receiver. We start by providing a non-trivial polytopal approximation of the set of sender's persuasive information structures. This is crucial to design efficient learning algorithms. Next, we prove a negative result: no learning algorithm can be persuasive. Thus, we relax persuasiveness requirements by focusing on algorithms that guarantee that the receiver's regret in following recommendations grows sub-linearly. In the full-feedback setting -- where the sender observes all random events realizations -- , we provide an algorithm with $\tilde{O}(\sqrt{T})$ regret for both the sender and the receiver. Instead, in the bandit-feedback setting -- where the sender only observes the realizations of random events actually occurring in the SDM problem -- , we design an algorithm that, given an $α\in [1/2, 1]$ as input, ensures $\tilde{O}({T^α})$ and $\tilde{O}( T^{\max \{ α, 1-\fracα{2} \} })$ regrets, for the sender and the receiver respectively. This result is complemented by a lower bound showing that such a regrets trade-off is essentially tight. 我们研究了一个知情的发送者所面临的重复信息设计问题，该发送者试图影响自私的接收者的行为。我们考虑接收器面临顺序决策（SDM）问题的设置。在每一轮中，发送方都会观察 SDM 问题中随机事件的实现。这就带来了如何逐步向接收者披露此类信息以说服他们遵循（期望的）行动建议的挑战。我们研究发送者不知道随机事件概率的情况，因此，他们必须在说服接收者的同时逐渐学习它们。我们首先提供发送者说服性信息结构集的非平凡多面近似。这对于设计有效的学习算法至关重要。接下来，我们证明一个否定的结果：没有任何学习算法能够具有说服力。因此，我们通过专注于保证接收者对遵循推荐的后悔呈次线性增长的算法来放宽说服力要求。在全反馈设置中——发送者观察所有随机事件的实现——我们为发送者和接收者提供了一种带有$\tilde{O}(\sqrt{T})$后悔的算法。相反，在强盗反馈设置中——发送者只观察 SDM 问题中实际发生的随机事件的实现——我们设计了一种算法，给定 $α\in [1/2, 1]$ 作为输入，确保 $\tilde{O}({T^α})$ 和 $\tilde{O}( T^{\max \{ α, 1-\fracα{2} \} })$ 为发送者和接收者感到遗憾。分别接收器。该结果由下界补充，表明这种遗憾权衡本质上是紧密的。 本文研究了在未知随机事件概率的情况下，如何通过逐步披露信息来说服自利接收者遵循推荐行动的序贯信息设计问题。 Martino Bernasconi,Matteo Castiglioni,Alberto Marchesi,Nicola Gatti,Francesco Trovo cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.GT

authors_text: ZeYu Liu,Yi Wang,Jing Wen,Yong Zhang,Hao Yin,Chao Guo,ZhongYu Wang
title: A multi view multi stage and multi window framework for pulmonary artery segmentation from CT scans
title_zh: CT 扫描肺动脉分割的多视图多阶段和多窗口框架
abstract: This is the technical report of the 9th place in the final result of PARSE2022 Challenge. We solve the segmentation problem of the pulmonary artery by using a two-stage method based on a 3D CNN network. The coarse model is used to locate the ROI, and the fine model is used to refine the segmentation result. In addition, in order to improve the segmentation performance, we adopt multi-view and multi-window level method, at the same time we employ a fine-tune strategy to mitigate the impact of inconsistent labeling.
summary: This is the technical report of the 9th place in the final result of PARSE2022 Challenge. We solve the segmentation problem of the pulmonary artery by using a two-stage method based on a 3D CNN network. The coarse model is used to locate the ROI, and the fine model is used to refine the segmentation result. In addition, in order to improve the segmentation performance, we adopt multi-view and multi-window level method, at the same time we employ a fine-tune strategy to mitigate the impact of inconsistent labeling.
abstract_zh: 这是PARSE2022挑战赛最终结果第9名的技术报告。我们使用基于 3D CNN 网络的两阶段方法解决了肺动脉的分割问题。粗略模型用于定位ROI，精细模型用于细化分割结果。此外，为了提高分割性能，我们采用多视图和多窗口级别的方法，同时我们采用微调策略来减轻不一致标签的影响。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于3D卷积神经网络的多阶段、多视角和多窗口框架，用于从CT扫描中分割肺动脉。
AI.motivation: 肺动脉分割存在结构复杂、标注不一致等挑战，需提升分割精度与鲁棒性。
AI.method: 采用两阶段方法：粗模型定位ROI，细模型优化分割结果；结合多视角、多窗口策略，并通过微调缓解标注不一致性影响。
AI.result: 在PARSE2022挑战赛中获得第9名，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 多阶段多视角框架提升了肺动脉分割性能，但仍有优化空间。

authors_text: Xingbin Liu,Jinghao Zhou,Tao Kong,Xianming Lin,Rongrong Ji
title: Exploring Target Representations for Masked Autoencoders
title_zh: 探索屏蔽自动编码器的目标表示
comment: The first two authors contributed equally
comments: The first two authors contributed equally
abstract: Masked autoencoders have become popular training paradigms for self-supervised visual representation learning. These models randomly mask a portion of the input and reconstruct the masked portion according to the target representations. In this paper, we first show that a careful choice of the target representation is unnecessary for learning good representations, since different targets tend to derive similarly behaved models. Driven by this observation, we propose a multi-stage masked distillation pipeline and use a randomly initialized model as the teacher, enabling us to effectively train high-capacity models without any efforts to carefully design target representations. Interestingly, we further explore using teachers of larger capacity, obtaining distilled students with remarkable transferring ability. On different tasks of classification, transfer learning, object detection, and semantic segmentation, the proposed method to perform masked knowledge distillation with bootstrapped teachers (dBOT) outperforms previous self-supervised methods by nontrivial margins. We hope our findings, as well as the proposed method, could motivate people to rethink the roles of target representations in pre-training masked autoencoders.The code and pre-trained models are publicly available at https://github.com/liuxingbin/dbot.
summary: Masked autoencoders have become popular training paradigms for self-supervised visual representation learning. These models randomly mask a portion of the input and reconstruct the masked portion according to the target representations. In this paper, we first show that a careful choice of the target representation is unnecessary for learning good representations, since different targets tend to derive similarly behaved models. Driven by this observation, we propose a multi-stage masked distillation pipeline and use a randomly initialized model as the teacher, enabling us to effectively train high-capacity models without any efforts to carefully design target representations. Interestingly, we further explore using teachers of larger capacity, obtaining distilled students with remarkable transferring ability. On different tasks of classification, transfer learning, object detection, and semantic segmentation, the proposed method to perform masked knowledge distillation with bootstrapped teachers (dBOT) outperforms previous self-supervised methods by nontrivial margins. We hope our findings, as well as the proposed method, could motivate people to rethink the roles of target representations in pre-training masked autoencoders.The code and pre-trained models are publicly available at https://github.com/liuxingbin/dbot.
abstract_zh: 屏蔽自动编码器已成为自监督视觉表示学习的流行训练范例。这些模型随机屏蔽输入的一部分，并根据目标表示重建屏蔽部分。在本文中，我们首先表明，对于学习良好的表示，仔细选择目标表示是不必要的，因为不同的目标往往会派生出类似行为的模型。在这一观察的推动下，我们提出了一种多级掩模蒸馏管道，并使用随机初始化的模型作为教师，使我们能够有效地训练高容量模型，而无需仔细设计目标表示。有趣的是，我们进一步探索使用更大容量的教师，获得具有出色迁移能力的蒸馏学生。在分类、迁移学习、对象检测和语义分割等不同任务上，所提出的用引导教师（dBOT）执行屏蔽知识蒸馏的方法以非平凡的优势优于以前的自监督方法。我们希望我们的发现以及所提出的方法能够激励人们重新思考目标表示在预训练屏蔽自动编码器中的作用。代码和预训练模型可在 https://github.com/liuxingbin/dbot 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了掩码自编码器中目标表示的选择对模型性能的影响，并提出了一种无需精心设计目标表示的多阶段掩码知识蒸馏方法。
AI.motivation: 传统掩码自编码器需要精心选择目标表示，但作者发现不同目标生成的模型行为相似，因此提出简化目标设计流程的动机。
AI.method: 提出多阶段掩码蒸馏框架（dBOT），使用随机初始化模型作为教师模型进行知识蒸馏，并探索更大容量教师模型的引导作用。
AI.result: 在分类、目标检测等任务中，dBOT方法显著优于现有自监督学习方法，且无需复杂的目标表示设计。
AI.conclusion: 目标表示的选择对掩码自编码器预训练影响较小，提出的蒸馏方法为模型训练提供了新思路。
