authors_text: Prajwal Chidananda,Saurabh Nair,Douglas Lee,Adrian Kaehler
title: PixTrack: Precise 6DoF Object Pose Tracking using NeRF Templates and Feature-metric Alignment
title_zh: PixTrack：使用 NeRF 模板和特征度量对齐进行精确的 6DoF 对象姿势跟踪
abstract: We present PixTrack, a vision based object pose tracking framework using novel view synthesis and deep feature-metric alignment. We follow an SfM-based relocalization paradigm where we use a Neural Radiance Field to canonically represent the tracked object. Our evaluations demonstrate that our method produces highly accurate, robust, and jitter-free 6DoF pose estimates of objects in both monocular RGB images and RGB-D images without the need of any data annotation or trajectory smoothing. Our method is also computationally efficient making it easy to have multi-object tracking with no alteration to our algorithm through simple CPU multiprocessing. Our code is available at: https://github.com/GiantAI/pixtrack
summary: We present PixTrack, a vision based object pose tracking framework using novel view synthesis and deep feature-metric alignment. We follow an SfM-based relocalization paradigm where we use a Neural Radiance Field to canonically represent the tracked object. Our evaluations demonstrate that our method produces highly accurate, robust, and jitter-free 6DoF pose estimates of objects in both monocular RGB images and RGB-D images without the need of any data annotation or trajectory smoothing. Our method is also computationally efficient making it easy to have multi-object tracking with no alteration to our algorithm through simple CPU multiprocessing. Our code is available at: https://github.com/GiantAI/pixtrack
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 PixTrack，一种基于视觉的物体姿态跟踪框架，使用新颖的视图合成和深度特征度量对齐。我们遵循基于 SfM 的重定位范例，其中使用神经辐射场来规范地表示跟踪对象。我们的评估表明，我们的方法可以对单目 RGB 图像和 RGB-D 图像中的物体进行高精度、稳健且无抖动的 6DoF 位姿估计，而无需任何数据注释或轨迹平滑。我们的方法计算效率也很高，可以轻松进行多目标跟踪，而无需通过简单的 CPU 多处理改变我们的算法。我们的代码位于：https://github.com/GiantAI/pixtrack

AI.tldr: 本文提出PixTrack，一种基于NeRF模板和特征度量对齐的6DoF物体姿态跟踪方法，可在无需数据标注和轨迹平滑的情况下实现高精度、鲁棒的单目及RGB-D图像跟踪。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通常依赖数据标注或轨迹平滑以提升跟踪稳定性，但存在计算复杂度高、难以扩展至多物体跟踪等问题，需开发更高效且无需人工干预的解决方案。
AI.method: 采用基于SfM的重定位框架，利用NeRF构建物体规范表示，结合新视角合成与深度特征度量对齐实现姿态估计，并通过CPU多进程支持多物体并行跟踪。
AI.result: 实验表明，PixTrack在单目RGB和RGB-D图像中均能输出高精度、无抖动的6DoF姿态估计，且计算效率高，支持无需算法修改的多物体跟踪。
AI.conclusion: PixTrack通过NeRF与特征对齐有效解决了传统跟踪方法的局限性，在精度、鲁棒性和计算效率上取得平衡，适用于实际场景中的多物体实时跟踪任务。

authors_text: Rebecca Salganik,Fernando Diaz,Golnoosh Farnadi
title: Analyzing the Effect of Sampling in GNNs on Individual Fairness
title_zh: 分析 GNN 中的采样对个体公平性的影响
abstract: Graph neural network (GNN) based methods have saturated the field of recommender systems. The gains of these systems have been significant, showing the advantages of interpreting data through a network structure. However, despite the noticeable benefits of using graph structures in recommendation tasks, this representational form has also bred new challenges which exacerbate the complexity of mitigating algorithmic bias. When GNNs are integrated into downstream tasks, such as recommendation, bias mitigation can become even more difficult. Furthermore, the intractability of applying existing methods of fairness promotion to large, real world datasets places even more serious constraints on mitigation attempts. Our work sets out to fill in this gap by taking an existing method for promoting individual fairness on graphs and extending it to support mini-batch, or sub-sample based, training of a GNN, thus laying the groundwork for applying this method to a downstream recommendation task. We evaluate two popular GNN methods: Graph Convolutional Network (GCN), which trains on the entire graph, and GraphSAGE, which uses probabilistic random walks to create subgraphs for mini-batch training, and assess the effects of sub-sampling on individual fairness. We implement an individual fairness notion called \textit{REDRESS}, proposed by Dong et al., which uses rank optimization to learn individual fair node, or item, embeddings. We empirically show on two real world datasets that GraphSAGE is able to achieve, not just, comparable accuracy, but also, improved fairness as compared with the GCN model. These finding have consequential ramifications to individual fairness promotion, GNNs, and in downstream form, recommender systems, showing that mini-batch training facilitate individual fairness promotion by allowing for local nuance to guide the process of fairness promotion in representation learning.

The gains of these systems have been significant, showing the advantages of interpreting data through a network structure. However, despite the noticeable benefits of using graph structures in recommendation tasks, this representational form has also bred new challenges which exacerbate the complexity of mitigating algorithmic bias. When GNNs are integrated into downstream tasks, such as recommendation, bias mitigation can become even more difficult. Furthermore, the intractability of applying existing methods of fairness promotion to large, real world datasets places even more serious constraints on mitigation attempts. Our work sets out to fill in this gap by taking an existing method for promoting individual fairness on graphs and extending it to support mini-batch, or sub-sample based, training of a GNN, thus laying the groundwork for applying this method to a downstream recommendation task. We evaluate two popular GNN methods: Graph Convolutional Network (GCN), which trains on the entire graph, and GraphSAGE, which uses probabilistic random walks to create subgraphs for mini-batch training, and assess the effects of sub-sampling on individual fairness. We implement an individual fairness notion called \textit{REDRESS}, proposed by Dong et al., which uses rank optimization to learn individual fair node, or item, embeddings. We empirically show on two real world datasets that GraphSAGE is able to achieve, not just, comparable accuracy, but also, improved fairness as compared with the GCN model. These finding have consequential ramifications to individual fairness promotion, GNNs, and in downstream form, recommender systems, showing that mini-batch training facilitate individual fairness promotion by allowing for local nuance to guide the process of fairness promotion in representation learning.
abstract_zh: 基于图神经网络（GNN）的方法已经饱和了推荐系统领域。这些系统的收益是显着的，显示出通过网络结构解释数据的优势。然而，尽管在推荐任务中使用图结构有明显的好处，但这种表示形式也带来了新的挑战，加剧了减轻算法偏差的复杂性。当 GNN 集成到推荐等下游任务中时，缓解偏差可能会变得更加困难。此外，将现有的公平促进方法应用于大型现实世界数据集的困难性对缓解尝试造成了更严重的限制。我们的工作旨在填补这一空白，采用现有的方法来促进图上的个体公平性，并将其扩展到支持小批量或基于子样本的 GNN 训练，从而为将该方法应用于下游推荐任务奠定基础。我们评估了两种流行的 GNN 方法：图卷积网络（GCN），它在整个图上进行训练；GraphSAGE，它使用概率随机游走来创建用于小批量训练的子图，并评估子采样对个体公平性的影响。我们实现了由 Dong 等人提出的名为 \textit{REDRESS} 的个体公平概念，它使用排名优化来学习个体公平节点或项目嵌入。我们在两个现实世界数据集上的经验表明，与 GCN 模型相比，GraphSAGE 不仅能够实现可比的准确性，而且还能够提高公平性。这些发现对个体公平性提升、GNN 以及下游形式的推荐系统产生了重要影响，表明小批量训练通过允许局部细微差别来指导表征学习中公平性提升的过程，从而促进个体公平性提升。

AI.tldr: 本文分析了图神经网络（GNN）中采样对个体公平性的影响，并探讨了在推荐系统中应用子采样训练方法的可行性。
AI.motivation: 尽管GNN在推荐系统中表现出色，但其图结构可能加剧算法偏见，而现有公平性方法难以适应大规模真实数据集的子采样训练需求。
AI.method: 基于REDRESS公平性框架，对比两种GNN方法（GCN全图训练与GraphSAGE子图采样训练），评估子采样对个体公平性的影响。
AI.result: 实验表明，GraphSAGE在保持推荐准确性的同时，相比GCN实现了更优的个体公平性表现。
AI.conclusion: 子采样训练通过捕捉局部特征细节，为GNN的公平性优化提供了更有效的实现路径，对推荐系统具有重要启示。

authors_text: Bishal Lamichhane,Nidal Moukaddam,Ankit B. Patel,Ashutosh Sabharwal
title: Dyadic Interaction Assessment from Free-living Audio for Depression Severity Assessment
title_zh: 用于抑郁严重程度评估的自由生活音频的二元交互评估
comment: Accepted to INTERSPEECH 2022
comments: Accepted to INTERSPEECH 2022
abstract: Psychomotor retardation in depression has been associated with speech timing changes from dyadic clinical interviews. In this work, we investigate speech timing features from free-living dyadic interactions. Apart from the possibility of continuous monitoring to complement clinical visits, a study in free-living conditions would also allow inferring sociability features such as dyadic interaction frequency implicated in depression. We adapted a speaker count estimator as a dyadic interaction detector with a specificity of 89.5% and a sensitivity of 86.1% in the DIHARD dataset. Using the detector, we obtained speech timing features from the detected dyadic interactions in multi-day audio recordings of 32 participants comprised of 13 healthy individuals, 11 individuals with depression, and 8 individuals with psychotic disorders. The dyadic interaction frequency increased with depression severity in participants with no or mild depression, indicating a potential diagnostic marker of depression onset. However, the dyadic interaction frequency decreased with increasing depression severity for participants with moderate or severe depression. In terms of speech timing features, the response time had a significant positive correlation with depression severity. Our work shows the potential of dyadic interaction analysis from audio recordings of free-living to obtain markers of depression severity.
summary: Psychomotor retardation in depression has been associated with speech timing changes from dyadic clinical interviews. Using the detector, we obtained speech timing features from the detected dyadic interactions in multi-day audio recordings of 32 participants comprised of 13 healthy individuals, 11 individuals with depression, and 8 individuals with psychotic disorders. The dyadic interaction frequency increased with depression severity in participants with no or mild depression, indicating a potential diagnostic marker of depression onset. However, the dyadic interaction frequency decreased with increasing depression severity for participants with moderate or severe depression. In terms of speech timing features, the response time had a significant positive correlation with depression severity. Our work shows the potential of dyadic interaction analysis from audio recordings of free-living to obtain markers of depression severity.
abstract_zh: 抑郁症的精神运动迟缓与二元临床访谈的言语时间变化有关。在这项工作中，我们研究了自由生活二元交互中的语音计时特征。除了持续监测以补充临床就诊的可能性之外，在自由生活条件下的研究还可以推断社交特征，例如与抑郁症有关的二元互动频率。我们采用说话者计数估计器作为二元交互检测器，在 DIHARD 数据集中特异性为 89.5%，灵敏度为 86.1%。使用检测器，我们从 32 名参与者（包括 13 名健康个体、11 名抑郁症患者和 8 名精神障碍患者）的多日录音中检测到的二元交互中获得了语音计时特征。在没有抑郁症或轻度抑郁症的参与者中，二元相互作用频率随着抑郁症严重程度的增加而增加，表明抑郁症发作的潜在诊断标志。然而，对于中度或重度抑郁症参与者来说，二元相互作用频率随着抑郁症严重程度的增加而降低。在言语计时特征方面，反应时间与抑郁严重程度呈显着正相关。我们的工作展示了通过自由生活的录音进行二元交互分析以获得抑郁严重程度标记的潜力。

AI.tldr: 本研究通过分析自由生活场景下的双人对话音频，探讨语音时序特征与抑郁严重程度的关系，以评估抑郁症的潜在生物标志物。
AI.motivation: 抑郁症患者的运动迟缓与语音时序变化相关，但传统临床访谈存在局限性。自由生活场景下的连续监测可提供更自然的社交互动数据，有助于发现抑郁的早期诊断标志物。
AI.method: 采用DIHARD数据集训练的说话人计数器检测双人对话，从32名参与者的多日音频中提取语音时序特征，包括互动频率和响应时间，并与抑郁严重程度进行相关性分析。
AI.result: 轻度抑郁患者双人互动频率随病情加重而增加，而中重度患者则减少；响应时间与抑郁严重程度呈显著正相关。
AI.conclusion: 自由生活音频中的双人互动分析可为抑郁症严重程度提供潜在的生物标志物，但需进一步验证不同抑郁阶段的动态变化规律。

search_text: Dyadic Interaction Assessment from Free-living Audio for Depression Severity Assessment 用于抑郁严重程度评估的自由生活音频的二元交互评估 Psychomotor retardation in depression has been associated with speech timing changes from dyadic clinical interviews. In this work, we investigate speech timing features from free-living dyadic interactions. Apart from the possibility of continuous monitoring to complement clinical visits, a study in free-living conditions would also allow inferring sociability features such as dyadic interaction frequency implicated in depression. We adapted a speaker count estimator as a dyadic interaction detector with a specificity of 89.5% and a sensitivity of 86.1% in the DIHARD dataset. Using the detector, we obtained speech timing features from the detected dyadic interactions in multi-day audio recordings of 32 participants comprised of 13 healthy individuals, 11 individuals with depression, and 8 individuals with psychotic disorders. The dyadic interaction frequency increased with depression severity in participants with no or mild depression, indicating a potential diagnostic marker of depression onset. However, the dyadic interaction frequency decreased with increasing depression severity for participants with moderate or severe depression. In terms of speech timing features, the response time had a significant positive correlation with depression severity. Our work shows the potential of dyadic interaction analysis from audio recordings of free-living to obtain markers of depression severity. 抑郁症的精神运动迟缓与二元临床访谈的言语时间变化有关。在这项工作中，我们研究了自由生活二元交互中的语音计时特征。除了持续监测以补充临床就诊的可能性之外，在自由生活条件下的研究还可以推断社交特征，例如与抑郁症有关的二元互动频率。我们采用说话者计数估计器作为二元交互检测器，在 DIHARD 数据集中特异性为 89.5%，灵敏度为 86.1%。使用检测器，我们从 32 名参与者（包括 13 名健康个体、11 名抑郁症患者和 8 名精神障碍患者）的多日录音中检测到的二元交互中获得了语音计时特征。在没有抑郁症或轻度抑郁症的参与者中，二元相互作用频率随着抑郁症严重程度的增加而增加，表明抑郁症发作的潜在诊断标志。然而，对于中度或重度抑郁症参与者来说，二元相互作用频率随着抑郁症严重程度的增加而降低。在言语计时特征方面，反应时间与抑郁严重程度呈显着正相关。我们的工作展示了通过自由生活的录音进行二元交互分析以获得抑郁严重程度标记的潜力。 本研究通过分析自由生活场景下的双人对话音频，探讨语音时序特征与抑郁严重程度的关系，以评估抑郁症的潜在生物标志物。 Bishal Lamichhane,Nidal Moukaddam,Ankit B. authors_text: Xinjie Liu
title: Interactive Imitation Learning in Robotics based on Simulations
title_zh: 基于模拟的机器人学交互式模仿学习
abstract: The transformation towards intelligence in various industries is creating more demand for intelligent and flexible products. In the field of robotics, learning-based methods are increasingly being applied, with the purpose of training robots to learn to deal with complex and changing external environments through data. In this context, reinforcement learning and imitation learning are becoming research hotspots with their respective characteristics. However, the two have their own limitations in some cases, such as the high cost of data acquisition for reinforcement learning. Moreover, it is difficult for imitation learning to provide perfect demonstrations. As a branch of imitation learning, interactive imitation learning aims at transferring human knowledge to the agent through interactions between the demonstrator and the robot, which alleviates the difficulty of teaching. This thesis implements IIL algorithms in four simulation scenarios and conducts extensive experiments, aiming at providing exhaustive information about IIL methods both in action space and state space as well as comparison with RL methods.
summary: The transformation towards intelligence in various industries is creating more demand for intelligent and flexible products. In the field of robotics, learning-based methods are increasingly being applied, with the purpose of training robots to learn to deal with complex and changing external environments through data. In this context, reinforcement learning and imitation learning are becoming research hotspots with their respective characteristics. However, the two have their own limitations in some cases, such as the high cost of data acquisition for reinforcement learning. Moreover, it is difficult for imitation learning to provide perfect demonstrations. As a branch of imitation learning, interactive imitation learning aims at transferring human knowledge to the agent through interactions between the demonstrator and the robot, which alleviates the difficulty of teaching. This thesis implements IIL algorithms in four simulation scenarios and conducts extensive experiments, aiming at providing exhaustive information about IIL methods both in action space and state space as well as comparison with RL methods.
abstract_zh: 各行业向智能化转型，对智能、柔性产品产生了更多需求。在机器人领域，基于学习的方法越来越多地被应用，目的是通过数据训练机器人学会应对复杂多变的外部环境。在此背景下，强化学习和模仿学习以其各自的特点成为研究热点。然而，两者在某些情况下都有各自的局限性，例如强化学习的数据获取成本较高。而且，模仿学习很难提供完美的演示。作为模仿学习的一个分支，交互式模仿学习旨在通过演示者与机器人之间的交互将人类知识传递给代理，从而减轻教学难度。本文在四种模拟场景中实现了 IIL 算法并进行了广泛的实验，旨在提供有关 IIL 方法在动作空间和状态空间中的详尽信息以及与 RL 方法的比较。

AI.tldr: 本文在四个仿真场景中实现交互模仿学习算法，通过实验比较其在动作空间和状态空间的表现，并与强化学习方法进行对比。
AI.motivation: 传统强化学习数据成本高，模仿学习难以获得完美示范，而交互模仿学习通过人机互动降低教学难度，需验证其有效性。
AI.method: 在仿真环境中实施IIL算法，设计多场景实验，从动作空间和状态空间维度分析方法性能，并与强化学习方法对比。
AI.result: 实验提供了IIL方法在不同场景下的详尽性能数据，验证了其在减少数据依赖和提升学习效率方面的优势。
AI.conclusion: 交互模仿学习通过有效的人机互动机制，在复杂环境适应性上优于传统方法，为机器人学习提供了新思路。

authors_text: Sergio Burdisso,Juan Zuluaga-Gomez,Esau Villatoro-Tello,Martin Fajcik,Muskaan Singh,Pavel Smrz,Petr Motlicek
title: IDIAPers @ Causal News Corpus 2022: Efficient Causal Relation Identification Through a Prompt-based Few-shot Approach
title_zh: IDIAPers @ Causal News Corpus 2022：通过基于提示的小样本方法进行高效因果关系识别
comment: To be published in CASE@EMNLP 2022 (5th Workshop on Challenges and Applications of Automated Extraction of Socio-political Events from Text)
comments: To be published in CASE@EMNLP 2022 (5th Workshop on Challenges and Applications of Automated Extraction of Socio-political Events from Text)
abstract: In this paper, we describe our participation in the subtask 1 of CASE-2022, Event Causality Identification with Casual News Corpus. We address the Causal Relation Identification (CRI) task by exploiting a set of simple yet complementary techniques for fine-tuning language models (LMs) on a small number of annotated examples (i.e., a few-shot configuration). We follow a prompt-based prediction approach for fine-tuning LMs in which the CRI task is treated as a masked language modeling problem (MLM). This approach allows LMs natively pre-trained on MLM problems to directly generate textual responses to CRI-specific prompts. We compare the performance of this method against ensemble techniques trained on the entire dataset. Our best-performing submission was fine-tuned with only 256 instances per class, 15.7% of the all available data, and yet obtained the second-best precision (0.82), third-best accuracy (0.82), and an F1-score (0.85) very close to what was reported by the winner team (0.86).
summary: In this paper, we describe our participation in the subtask 1 of CASE-2022, Event Causality Identification with Casual News Corpus. We address the Causal Relation Identification (CRI) task by exploiting a set of simple yet complementary techniques for fine-tuning language models (LMs) on a small number of annotated examples (i.e., a few-shot configuration). We follow a prompt-based prediction approach for fine-tuning LMs in which the CRI task is treated as a masked language modeling problem (MLM). This approach allows LMs natively pre-trained on MLM problems to directly generate textual responses to CRI-specific prompts. We compare the performance of this method against ensemble techniques trained on the entire dataset. Our best-performing submission was fine-tuned with only 256 instances per class, 15.7% of the all available data, and yet obtained the second-best precision (0.82), third-best accuracy (0.82), and an F1-score (0.85) very close to what was reported by the winner team (0.86).
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们描述了我们对 CASE-2022 子任务 1 的参与，即使用休闲新闻语料库进行事件因果关系识别。我们通过利用一组简单但互补的技术在少量带注释的示例（即少数镜头配置）上微调语言模型（LM）来解决因果关系识别（CRI）任务。我们遵循基于提示的预测方法来微调 LM，其中 CRI 任务被视为掩码语言建模问题 (MLM)。这种方法允许在 MLM 问题上进行本地预训练的 LM 直接生成对 CRI 特定提示的文本响应。我们将该方法的性能与在整个数据集上训练的集成技术进行比较。我们表现​​最好的提交经过微调，每类仅 256 个实例，占所有可用数据的 15.7%，但获得了第二好的精度 (0.82)、第三好的准确度 (0.82) 和 F1 分数 (0.85)，非常接近获胜团队报告的结果 (0.86)。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了在CASE-2022因果新闻语料库任务中，通过基于提示的少样本方法高效识别因果关系的解决方案。
AI.motivation: 因果关系识别（CRI）任务面临标注数据有限的挑战，需探索在少量样本下提升模型性能的高效方法。
AI.method: 将CRI任务转化为掩码语言建模（MLM）问题，利用提示机制微调语言模型，并对比全数据集训练的集成方法。
AI.result: 仅使用15.7%的标注数据（每类256实例），模型在精度（0.82）、准确率（0.82）和F1分数（0.85）上取得优异成绩，接近冠军团队。
AI.conclusion: 基于提示的少样本方法在有限数据下仍能实现高精度因果关系识别，验证了该方法的有效性和实用性。

ai_content.tldr: 本文介绍了在CASE-2022因果新闻语料库任务中，通过基于提示的少样本方法高效识别因果关系的解决方案。

ai_content.conclusion: 基于提示的少样本方法在有限数据下仍能实现高精度因果关系识别，验证了该方法的有效性和实用性。

search_text: IDIAPers @ Causal News Corpus 2022: Efficient Causal Relation Identification Through a Prompt-based Few-shot Approach IDIAPers @ Causal News Corpus 2022：通过基于提示的小样本方法进行高效因果关系识别 In this paper, we describe our participation in the subtask 1 of CASE-2022, Event Causality Identification with Casual News Corpus. We address the Causal Relation Identification (CRI) task by exploiting a set of simple yet complementary techniques for fine-tuning language models (LMs) on a small number of annotated examples (i.e., a few-shot configuration). We follow a prompt-based prediction approach for fine-tuning LMs in which the CRI task is treated as a masked language modeling problem (MLM). This approach allows LMs natively pre-trained on MLM problems to directly generate textual responses to CRI-specific prompts. We compare the performance of this method against ensemble techniques trained on the entire dataset. Our best-performing submission was fine-tuned with only 256 instances per class, 15.7% of the all available data, and yet obtained the second-best precision (0.82), third-best accuracy (0.82), and an F1-score (0.85) very close to what was reported by the winner team (0.86). 在本文中，我们描述了我们对 CASE-2022 子任务 1 的参与，即使用休闲新闻语料库进行事件因果关系识别。我们通过利用一组简单但互补的技术在少量带注释的示例（即少数镜头配置）上微调语言模型（LM）来解决因果关系识别（CRI）任务。我们遵循基于提示的预测方法来微调 LM，其中 CRI 任务被视为掩码语言建模问题 (MLM)。这种方法允许在 MLM 问题上进行本地预训练的 LM 直接生成对 CRI 特定提示的文本响应。我们将该方法的性能与在整个数据集上训练的集成技术进行比较。我们表现​​最好的提交经过微调，每类仅 256 个实例，占所有可用数据的 15.7%，但获得了第二好的精度 (0.82)、第三好的准确度 (0.82) 和 F1 分数 (0.85)，非常接近获胜团队报告的结果 (0.86)。 本文介绍了在CASE-2022因果新闻语料库任务中，通过基于提示的少样本方法高效识别因果关系的解决方案。 Sergio Burdisso,Juan Zuluaga-Gomez,Esau Villatoro-Tello,Martin Fajcik,Muskaan Singh,Pavel Smrz,Petr Motlicek cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Martin Fajcik,Muskaan Singh,Juan Zuluaga-Gomez,Esaú Villatoro-Tello,Sergio Burdisso,Petr Motlicek,Pavel Smrz
title: IDIAPers @ Causal News Corpus 2022: Extracting Cause-Effect-Signal Triplets via Pre-trained Autoregressive Language Model
title_zh: IDIAPers @ Causal News Corpus 2022：通过预训练的自回归语言模型提取因果信号三元组
comment: Camera-ready for CASE@EMNLP
comments: Camera-ready for CASE@EMNLP
abstract: In this paper, we describe our shared task submissions for Subtask 2 in CASE-2022, Event Causality Identification with Casual News Corpus. The challenge focused on the automatic detection of all cause-effect-signal spans present in the sentence from news-media. We detect cause-effect-signal spans in a sentence using T5 -- a pre-trained autoregressive language model. We iteratively identify all cause-effect-signal span triplets, always conditioning the prediction of the next triplet on the previously predicted ones. To predict the triplet itself, we consider different causal relationships such as cause$\rightarrow$effect$\rightarrow$signal. Each triplet component is generated via a language model conditioned on the sentence, the previous parts of the current triplet, and previously predicted triplets. Despite training on an extremely small dataset of 160 samples, our approach achieved competitive performance, being placed second in the competition. Furthermore, we show that assuming either cause$\rightarrow$effect or effect$\rightarrow$cause order achieves similar results.
summary: In this paper, we describe our shared task submissions for Subtask 2 in CASE-2022, Event Causality Identification with Casual News Corpus. The challenge focused on the automatic detection of all cause-effect-signal spans present in the sentence from news-media. We detect cause-effect-signal spans in a sentence using T5 -- a pre-trained autoregressive language model. We iteratively identify all cause-effect-signal span triplets, always conditioning the prediction of the next triplet on the previously predicted ones. To predict the triplet itself, we consider different causal relationships such as cause$\rightarrow$effect$\rightarrow$signal. Each triplet component is generated via a language model conditioned on the sentence, the previous parts of the current triplet, and previously predicted triplets. Despite training on an extremely small dataset of 160 samples, our approach achieved competitive performance, being placed second in the competition. Furthermore, we show that assuming either cause$\rightarrow$effect or effect$\rightarrow$cause order achieves similar results.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们描述了 CASE-2022 中子任务 2 的共享任务提交，即使用休闲新闻语料库进行事件因果关系识别。挑战的重点是自动检测新闻媒体句子中存在的所有因果信号范围。我们使用 T5（一种预先训练的自回归语言模型）来检测句子中的因果信号跨度。我们迭代地识别所有因果信号跨度三元组，始终根据先前预测的三元组来调整下一个三元组的预测。为了预测三元组本身，我们考虑不同的因果关系，例如 Cause$\rightarrow$effect$\rightarrow$signal。每个三元组组件都是通过以句子、当前三元组的先前部分和先前预测的三元组为条件的语言模型生成的。尽管在包含 160 个样本的极小数据集上进行训练，我们的方法仍取得了有竞争力的性能，在竞赛中排名第二。此外，我们还表明，假设 Cause$\rightarrow$effect 或 Effect$\rightarrow$cause order 可以达到类似的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文描述了在CASE-2022事件因果识别任务中，使用预训练自回归语言模型T5从新闻语料中提取因果信号三元组的方法。
AI.motivation: 新闻媒体中因果关系的自动检测具有挑战性，需从句子中准确识别因果信号三元组以支持事件分析。
AI.method: 基于T5模型迭代预测因果信号三元组，每次预测均依赖于句子内容、当前三元组前序部分及已预测的三元组，同时考虑不同因果关系顺序（如cause→effect→signal）。
AI.result: 在仅使用160个样本训练的情况下，该方法在竞赛中获得第二名，且发现假设因果顺序（cause→effect或effect→cause）对结果影响较小。
AI.conclusion: 预训练语言模型结合迭代预测策略能有效处理小数据场景下的因果三元组提取任务，因果顺序假设的灵活性可提升模型鲁棒性。

authors_text: Lennart Reiher,Bastian Lampe,Timo Woopen,Raphael van Kempen,Till Beemelmanns,Lutz Eckstein
title: Enabling Connectivity for Automated Mobility: A Novel MQTT-based Interface Evaluated in a 5G Case Study on Edge-Cloud Lidar Object Detection
title_zh: 实现自动移动连接：在边缘云激光雷达目标检测的 5G 案例研究中评估基于 MQTT 的新型接口
abstract: Enabling secure and reliable high-bandwidth lowlatency connectivity between automated vehicles and external servers, intelligent infrastructure, and other road users is a central step in making fully automated driving possible. The availability of data interfaces, which allow this kind of connectivity, has the potential to distinguish artificial agents' capabilities in connected, cooperative, and automated mobility systems from the capabilities of human operators, who do not possess such interfaces. Connected agents can for example share data to build collective environment models, plan collective behavior, and learn collectively from the shared data that is centrally combined. This paper presents multiple solutions that allow connected entities to exchange data. In particular, we propose a new universal communication interface which uses the Message Queuing Telemetry Transport (MQTT) protocol to connect agents running the Robot Operating System (ROS). Our work integrates methods to assess the connection quality in the form of various key performance indicators in real-time. We compare a variety of approaches that provide the connectivity necessary for the exemplary use case of edge-cloud lidar object detection in a 5G network. We show that the mean latency between the availability of vehicle-based sensor measurements and the reception of a corresponding object list from the edge-cloud is below 87 ms. All implemented solutions are made open-source and free to use. Source code is available at https://github.com/ika-rwth-aachen/ros-v2x-benchmarking-suite.
summary: Enabling secure and reliable high-bandwidth lowlatency connectivity between automated vehicles and external servers, intelligent infrastructure, and other road users is a central step in making fully automated driving possible. The availability of data interfaces, which allow this kind of connectivity, has the potential to distinguish artificial agents' capabilities in connected, cooperative, and automated mobility systems from the capabilities of human operators, who do not possess such interfaces. Connected agents can for example share data to build collective environment models, plan collective behavior, and learn collectively from the shared data that is centrally combined. This paper presents multiple solutions that allow connected entities to exchange data. In particular, we propose a new universal communication interface which uses the Message Queuing Telemetry Transport (MQTT) protocol to connect agents running the Robot Operating System (ROS). Our work integrates methods to assess the connection quality in the form of various key performance indicators in real-time. We compare a variety of approaches that provide the connectivity necessary for the exemplary use case of edge-cloud lidar object detection in a 5G network. We show that the mean latency between the availability of vehicle-based sensor measurements and the reception of a corresponding object list from the edge-cloud is below 87 ms. All implemented solutions are made open-source and free to use. Source code is available at https://github.com/ika-rwth-aachen/ros-v2x-benchmarking-suite.
abstract_zh: 在自动驾驶车辆与外部服务器、智能基础设施和其他道路使用者之间实现安全可靠的高带宽低延迟连接是实现全自动驾驶的核心步骤。允许这种连接的数据接口的可用性有可能将人工智能代理在连接、协作和自动移动系统中的能力与不具备此类接口的人类操作员的能力区分开来。例如，连接的代理可以共享数据来构建集体环境模型，规划集体行为，并从集中组合的共享数据中集体学习。本文提出了多种允许连接实体交换数据的解决方案。特别是，我们提出了一种新的通用通信接口，它使用消息队列遥测传输（MQTT）协议来连接运行机器人操作系统（ROS）的代理。我们的工作集成了以各种关键性能指标的形式实时评估连接质量的方法。我们比较了各种为 5G 网络中边缘云激光雷达目标检测示例用例提供所需连接的方法。我们表明，基于车辆的传感器测量的可用性与从边缘云接收相应对象列表之间的平均延迟低于 87 毫秒。所有实施的解决方案都是开源的并且免费使用。源代码可在 https://github.com/ika-rwth-aachen/ros-v2x-benchmarking-suite 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文设计并评估了一种基于MQTT协议的新通信接口，用于实现自动化移动中的车辆与外部实体的高效连接，并在5G网络的边缘云激光雷达物体检测案例中验证其性能。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶需要车辆与外部服务器、基础设施及其他道路使用者之间实现安全、可靠且低延迟的连接，而现有接口难以满足这一需求，亟需优化通信方案以提升协同能力。
AI.method: 提出基于MQTT协议的通用通信接口，整合实时连接质量评估指标（KPI），并在5G网络中对比多种连接方案，重点验证边缘云激光雷达物体检测场景下的性能表现。
AI.result: 实验显示，车辆传感器数据与边缘云返回物体列表的平均延迟低于87毫秒，所有解决方案均开源并提供代码库。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的MQTT接口能够满足自动化移动性对低延迟连接的需求，开源实现为后续研究提供了基础，验证了该方案在5G边缘计算场景中的可行性。

conclusion: 所提出的MQTT接口能够满足自动化移动性对低延迟连接的需求，开源实现为后续研究提供了基础，验证了该方案在5G边缘计算场景中的可行性。
search_text: Enabling Connectivity for Automated Mobility: A Novel MQTT-based Interface Evaluated in a 5G Case Study on Edge-Cloud Lidar Object Detection 实现自动移动连接：在边缘云激光雷达目标检测的 5G 案例研究中评估基于 MQTT 的新型接口 Enabling secure and reliable high-bandwidth lowlatency connectivity between automated vehicles and external servers, intelligent infrastructure, and other road users is a central step in making fully automated driving possible. The availability of data interfaces, which allow this kind of connectivity, has the potential to distinguish artificial agents' capabilities in connected, cooperative, and automated mobility systems from the capabilities of human operators, who do not possess such interfaces. Connected agents can for example share data to build collective environment models, plan collective behavior, and learn collectively from the shared data that is centrally combined. This paper presents multiple solutions that allow connected entities to exchange data. In particular, we propose a new universal communication interface which uses the Message Queuing Telemetry Transport (MQTT) protocol to connect agents running the Robot Operating System (ROS). Our work integrates methods to assess the connection quality in the form of various key performance indicators in real-time. We compare a variety of approaches that provide the connectivity necessary for the exemplary use case of edge-cloud lidar object detection in a 5G network. We show that the mean latency between the availability of vehicle-based sensor measurements and the reception of a corresponding object list from the edge-cloud is below 87 ms. All implemented solutions are made open-source and free to use. Source code is available at https://github.com/ika-rwth-aachen/ros-v2x-benchmarking-suite. 在自动驾驶车辆与外部服务器、智能基础设施和其他道路使用者之间实现安全可靠的高带宽低延迟连接是实现全自动驾驶的核心步骤。允许这种连接的数据接口的可用性有可能将人工智能代理在连接、协作和自动移动系统中的能力与不具备此类接口的人类操作员的能力区分开来。例如，连接的代理可以共享数据来构建集体环境模型，规划集体行为，并从集中组合的共享数据中集体学习。本文提出了多种允许连接实体交换数据的解决方案。特别是，我们提出了一种新的通用通信接口，它使用消息队列遥测传输（MQTT）协议来连接运行机器人操作系统（ROS）的代理。我们的工作集成了以各种关键性能指标的形式实时评估连接质量的方法。我们比较了各种为 5G 网络中边缘云激光雷达目标检测示例用例提供所需连接的方法。我们表明，基于车辆的传感器测量的可用性与从边缘云接收相应对象列表之间的平均延迟低于 87 毫秒。所有实施的解决方案都是开源的并且免费使用。源代码可在 https://github.com/ika-rwth-aachen/ros-v2x-benchmarking-suite 获取。 本文设计并评估了一种基于MQTT协议的新通信接口，用于实现自动化移动中的车辆与外部实体的高效连接，并在5G网络的边缘云激光雷达物体检测案例中验证其性能。 Lennart Reiher,Bastian Lampe,Timo Woopen,Raphael van Kempen,Till Beemelmanns,Lutz Eckstein cs.RO,cs.NI

authors_text: Devarsh Patel,Sarthak Patel,Megh Patel
title: Application of image-to-image translation in improving pedestrian detection
title_zh: 图像到图像转换在改进行人检测中的应用
comment: This is a working draft and not indented for publication
comments: This is a working draft and not indented for publication
abstract: The lack of effective target regions makes it difficult to perform several visual functions in low intensity light, including pedestrian recognition, and image-to-image translation. In this situation, with the accumulation of high-quality information by the combined use of infrared and visible images it is possible to detect pedestrians even in low light. In this study we are going to use advanced deep learning models like pix2pixGAN and YOLOv7 on LLVIP dataset, containing visible-infrared image pairs for low light vision. This dataset contains 33672 images and most of the images were captured in dark scenes, tightly synchronized with time and location.
summary: The lack of effective target regions makes it difficult to perform several visual functions in low intensity light, including pedestrian recognition, and image-to-image translation. In this situation, with the accumulation of high-quality information by the combined use of infrared and visible images it is possible to detect pedestrians even in low light. In this study we are going to use advanced deep learning models like pix2pixGAN and YOLOv7 on LLVIP dataset, containing visible-infrared image pairs for low light vision. This dataset contains 33672 images and most of the images were captured in dark scenes, tightly synchronized with time and location.
abstract_zh: 缺乏有效的目标区域使得在低强度光下执行多种视觉功能变得困难，包括行人识别和图像到图像的转换。在这种情况下，通过结合使用红外和可见光图像积累高质量信息，即使在弱光下也可以检测到行人。在本研究中，我们将在 LLVIP 数据集上使用先进的深度学习模型，例如 pix2pixGAN 和 YOLOv7，其中包含用于弱光视觉的可见光-红外图像对。该数据集包含 33672 张图像，大部分图像是在黑暗场景中拍摄的，与时间和位置紧密同步。

AI.tldr: 本文研究将图像到图像翻译技术应用于提升低光环境下的行人检测性能。
AI.motivation: 低光照条件下有效目标区域缺失导致行人识别困难，而红外与可见光图像融合可提供更丰富的信息用于检测。
AI.method: 采用pix2pixGAN进行图像翻译增强数据多样性，并结合YOLOv7模型在LLVIP数据集（含33672对可见-红外图像）进行训练与验证。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在低光场景中显著提升了行人检测的准确率与鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 红外-可见光图像融合与先进深度学习模型结合，可有效解决低光照条件下的行人检测难题。

authors_text: Yunfeng Zhao,Stuart Ferguson,Huiyu Zhou,Karen Rafferty
title: Representing Camera Response Function by a Single Latent Variable and Fully Connected Neural Network
title_zh: 用单潜变量和全连接神经网络表示相机响应函数
comment: 11 pages, 4 figures, 3 tables. Accepted by Signal, Image and Video Processing
comments: 11 pages, 4 figures, 3 tables. Accepted by Signal, Image and Video Processing
abstract: Modelling the mapping from scene irradiance to image intensity is essential for many computer vision tasks. Such mapping is known as the camera response. Most digital cameras use a nonlinear function to map irradiance, as measured by the sensor to an image intensity used to record the photograph. Modelling of the response is necessary for the nonlinear calibration. In this paper, a new high-performance camera response model that uses a single latent variable and fully connected neural network is proposed. The model is produced using unsupervised learning with an autoencoder on real-world (example) camera responses. Neural architecture searching is then used to find the optimal neural network architecture. A latent distribution learning approach was introduced to constrain the latent distribution. The proposed model achieved state-of-the-art CRF representation accuracy in a number of benchmark tests, but is almost twice as fast as the best current models when performing the maximum likelihood estimation during camera response calibration due to the simple yet efficient model representation.
summary: Modelling the mapping from scene irradiance to image intensity is essential for many computer vision tasks. Such mapping is known as the camera response. Most digital cameras use a nonlinear function to map irradiance, as measured by the sensor to an image intensity used to record the photograph. Modelling of the response is necessary for the nonlinear calibration. In this paper, a new high-performance camera response model that uses a single latent variable and fully connected neural network is proposed. The model is produced using unsupervised learning with an autoencoder on real-world (example) camera responses. Neural architecture searching is then used to find the optimal neural network architecture. A latent distribution learning approach was introduced to constrain the latent distribution. The proposed model achieved state-of-the-art CRF representation accuracy in a number of benchmark tests, but is almost twice as fast as the best current models when performing the maximum likelihood estimation during camera response calibration due to the simple yet efficient model representation.
abstract_zh: 对从场景辐照度到图像强度的映射进行建模对于许多计算机视觉任务至关重要。这种映射称为相机响应。大多数数码相机使用非线性函数来将传感器测量的辐照度映射到用于记录照片的图像强度。响应建模对于非线性校准是必要的。本文提出了一种使用单个潜变量和全连接神经网络的新型高性能相机响应模型。该模型是使用无监督学习和自动编码器根据真实世界（示例）相机响应生成的。然后使用神经架构搜索来寻找最佳神经网络架构。引入潜在分布学习方法来约束潜在分布。所提出的模型在许多基准测试中实现了最先进的 CRF 表示精度，但由于简单而高效的模型表示，在相机响应校准期间执行最大似然估计时，速度几乎是当前最佳模型的两倍。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于单个潜在变量和全连接神经网络的新型相机响应函数（CRF）模型，旨在提升校准效率和精度。
AI.motivation: 传统相机响应建模依赖非线性校准，但现有方法在速度或精度上存在不足，需更高效且准确的模型以满足计算机视觉任务需求。
AI.method: 通过无监督学习的自编码器生成模型，结合神经架构搜索优化网络结构，并采用潜在分布学习约束潜在变量分布。
AI.result: 模型在多个基准测试中达到最先进CRF表示精度，且最大似然估计速度为现有最佳模型的两倍。
AI.conclusion: 该模型以简单高效的结构实现了高精度与高速度，适用于需要快速相机响应校准的场景。

authors_text: Eyal Segal,Moshe Sipper
title: Adaptive Combination of a Genetic Algorithm and Novelty Search for Deep Neuroevolution
title_zh: 遗传算法与深度神经进化新颖性搜索的自适应组合
comment: ef:Proceedings of the 14th International Joint Conference on Computational Intelligence (IJCCI 2022)
comments: ef:Proceedings of the 14th International Joint Conference on Computational Intelligence (IJCCI 2022)
abstract: Evolutionary Computation (EC) has been shown to be able to quickly train Deep Artificial Neural Networks (DNNs) to solve Reinforcement Learning (RL) problems. While a Genetic Algorithm (GA) is well-suited for exploiting reward functions that are neither deceptive nor sparse, it struggles when the reward function is either of those. To that end, Novelty Search (NS) has been shown to be able to outperform gradient-following optimizers in some cases, while under-performing in others. We propose a new algorithm: Explore-Exploit $γ$-Adaptive Learner ($E^2γAL$, or EyAL). By preserving a dynamically-sized niche of novelty-seeking agents, the algorithm manages to maintain population diversity, exploiting the reward signal when possible and exploring otherwise. The algorithm combines both the exploitation power of a GA and the exploration power of NS, while maintaining their simplicity and elegance. Our experiments show that EyAL outperforms NS in most scenarios, while being on par with a GA -- and in some scenarios it can outperform both. EyAL also allows the substitution of the exploiting component (GA) and the exploring component (NS) with other algorithms, e.g., Evolution Strategy and Surprise Search, thus opening the door for future research.
summary: Evolutionary Computation (EC) has been shown to be able to quickly train Deep Artificial Neural Networks (DNNs) to solve Reinforcement Learning (RL) problems. While a Genetic Algorithm (GA) is well-suited for exploiting reward functions that are neither deceptive nor sparse, it struggles when the reward function is either of those. To that end, Novelty Search (NS) has been shown to be able to outperform gradient-following optimizers in some cases, while under-performing in others. We propose a new algorithm: Explore-Exploit $γ$-Adaptive Learner ($E^2γAL$, or EyAL). By preserving a dynamically-sized niche of novelty-seeking agents, the algorithm manages to maintain population diversity, exploiting the reward signal when possible and exploring otherwise. The algorithm combines both the exploitation power of a GA and the exploration power of NS, while maintaining their simplicity and elegance. Our experiments show that EyAL outperforms NS in most scenarios, while being on par with a GA -- and in some scenarios it can outperform both. EyAL also allows the substitution of the exploiting component (GA) and the exploring component (NS) with other algorithms, e.g., Evolution Strategy and Surprise Search, thus opening the door for future research.
abstract_zh: 进化计算（EC）已被证明能够快速训练深度人工神经网络（DNN）来解决强化学习（RL）问题。虽然遗传算法 (GA) 非常适合利用既不具有欺骗性也不稀疏的奖励函数，但当奖励函数是其中任何一种时，它就会陷入困境。为此，新颖性搜索（NS）已被证明在某些情况下能够优于梯度跟踪优化器，而在其他情况下则表现不佳。我们提出了一种新算法：Explore-Exploit $γ$-Adaptive Learner（$E^2γAL$，或 EyAL）。通过保留动态大小的寻求新奇代理的利基，该算法设法保持群体多样性，在可能的情况下利用奖励信号，并在其他情况下进行探索。该算法结合了 GA 的开发能力和 NS 的探索能力，同时保持了它们的简单性和优雅性。我们的实验表明，EyAL 在大多数情况下都优于 NS，同时与 GA 相当，并且在某些情况下它可以优于两者。 EyAL还允许用其他算法替换利用组件（GA）和探索组件（NS），例如进化策略和惊喜搜索，从而为未来的研究打开了大门。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合遗传算法（GA）与新颖性搜索（NS）的新算法E²γAL（EyAL），用于深度神经进化，以解决强化学习中的奖励函数稀疏或欺骗性问题。
AI.motivation: 遗传算法在稀疏或欺骗性奖励场景下表现不佳，而新颖性搜索虽能探索但稳定性不足，需融合两者优势以提升深度神经网络训练效率。
AI.method: 设计E²γAL算法，通过动态维护新颖性代理种群，在奖励信号可用时利用GA优化，否则转向NS探索，并支持替换GA/NS为其他算法（如进化策略）。
AI.result: 实验表明，EyAL在多数场景优于NS，与GA性能相当，部分场景超越两者；且算法框架具备扩展性，可兼容多种优化组件。
AI.conclusion: EyAL有效结合了GA与NS的优势，提升了深度神经进化在复杂奖励场景下的性能，同时为未来算法组合研究提供了灵活框架。

search_text: Adaptive Combination of a Genetic Algorithm and Novelty Search for Deep Neuroevolution 遗传算法与深度神经进化新颖性搜索的自适应组合 Evolutionary Computation (EC) has been shown to be able to quickly train Deep Artificial Neural Networks (DNNs) to solve Reinforcement Learning (RL) problems. While a Genetic Algorithm (GA) is well-suited for exploiting reward functions that are neither deceptive nor sparse, it struggles when the reward function is either of those. To that end, Novelty Search (NS) has been shown to be able to outperform gradient-following optimizers in some cases, while under-performing in others. We propose a new algorithm: Explore-Exploit $γ$-Adaptive Learner ($E^2γAL$, or EyAL). By preserving a dynamically-sized niche of novelty-seeking agents, the algorithm manages to maintain population diversity, exploiting the reward signal when possible and exploring otherwise. The algorithm combines both the exploitation power of a GA and the exploration power of NS, while maintaining their simplicity and elegance. Our experiments show that EyAL outperforms NS in most scenarios, while being on par with a GA -- and in some scenarios it can outperform both. EyAL also allows the substitution of the exploiting component (GA) and the exploring component (NS) with other algorithms, e.g., Evolution Strategy and Surprise Search, thus opening the door for future research. 进化计算（EC）已被证明能够快速训练深度人工神经网络（DNN）来解决强化学习（RL）问题。虽然遗传算法 (GA) 非常适合利用既不具有欺骗性也不稀疏的奖励函数，但当奖励函数是其中任何一种时，它就会陷入困境。为此，新颖性搜索（NS）已被证明在某些情况下能够优于梯度跟踪优化器，而在其他情况下则表现不佳。我们提出了一种新算法：Explore-Exploit $γ$-Adaptive Learner（$E^2γAL$，或 EyAL）。通过保留动态大小的寻求新奇代理的利基，该算法设法保持群体多样性，在可能的情况下利用奖励信号，并在其他情况下进行探索。该算法结合了 GA 的开发能力和 NS 的探索能力，同时保持了它们的简单性和优雅性。我们的实验表明，EyAL 在大多数情况下都优于 NS，同时与 GA 相当，并且在某些情况下它可以优于两者。 EyAL还允许用其他算法替换利用组件（GA）和探索组件（NS），例如进化策略和惊喜搜索，从而为未来的研究打开了大门。 本文提出了一种结合遗传算法（GA）与新颖性搜索（NS）的新算法E²γAL（EyAL），用于深度神经进化，以解决强化学习中的奖励函数稀疏或欺骗性问题。 Eyal Segal,Moshe Sipper cs.NE,cs.MA

authors_text: Yisheng Alison Zheng,Amani Abusafia,Abdallah Lakhdari,Shing Tai Tony Lui,Athman Bouguettaya
title: IMAP: Individual huMAn mobility Patterns visualizing platform
title_zh: IMAP：个人流动模式可视化平台
comment: 3 pages, 2 figures. This is an accepted demo paper and it will appear in the Proceedings of The 28th Annual International Conference on Mobile Computing and Networking (MobiCom 2022)
comments: 3 pages, 2 figures. This is an accepted demo paper and it will appear in the Proceedings of The 28th Annual International Conference on Mobile Computing and Networking (MobiCom 2022)
abstract: Understanding human mobility is essential for the development of smart cities and social behavior research. Human mobility models may be used in numerous applications, including pandemic control, urban planning, and traffic management. The existing models' accuracy in predicting users' mobility patterns is less than 25%. The low accuracy may be justified by the flexible nature of the human movement. Indeed, humans are not rigid in their daily movement. In addition, the rigid mobility models may result in missing the hidden regularities in users' records. Thus, we propose a novel perspective to study and analyze human mobility patterns and capture their flexibility. Typically, the mobility patterns are represented by a sequence of locations. We propose to define the mobility patterns by abstracting these locations into a set of places. Labeling these locations will allow us to detect close-to-reality hidden patterns. We present IMAP, an Individual huMAn mobility Patterns visualizing platform. Our platform enables users to visualize a graph of the places they visited based on their history records. In addition, our platform displays the most frequent mobility patterns computed using a modified PrefixSpan approach.
summary: Understanding human mobility is essential for the development of smart cities and social behavior research. Human mobility models may be used in numerous applications, including pandemic control, urban planning, and traffic management. The existing models' accuracy in predicting users' mobility patterns is less than 25%. The low accuracy may be justified by the flexible nature of the human movement. Indeed, humans are not rigid in their daily movement. In addition, the rigid mobility models may result in missing the hidden regularities in users' records. Thus, we propose a novel perspective to study and analyze human mobility patterns and capture their flexibility. Typically, the mobility patterns are represented by a sequence of locations. We propose to define the mobility patterns by abstracting these locations into a set of places. Labeling these locations will allow us to detect close-to-reality hidden patterns. We present IMAP, an Individual huMAn mobility Patterns visualizing platform. Our platform enables users to visualize a graph of the places they visited based on their history records. In addition, our platform displays the most frequent mobility patterns computed using a modified PrefixSpan approach.
abstract_zh: 了解人类流动性对于智慧城市和社会行为研究的发展至关重要。人员流动模型可用于许多应用，包括流行病控制、城市规划和交通管理。现有模型预测用户移动模式的准确度不到 25%。低准确度可能是由于人类运动的灵活性所致。事实上，人类的日常运动并不僵化。此外，僵化的移动模型可能会导致遗漏用户记录中隐藏的规律。因此，我们提出了一种新的视角来研究和分析人类流动模式并捕捉其灵活性。通常，移动模式由位置序列表示。我们建议通过将这些位置抽象为一组位置来定义移动模式。标记这些位置将使我们能够检测接近现实的隐藏模式。我们推出 IMAP，一个个体人类移动模式可视化平台。我们的平台使用户能够根据历史记录可视化他们访问过的地点的图表。此外，我们的平台还显示使用修改后的 PrefixSpan 方法计算出的最常见的移动模式。

AI.tldr: 本文提出IMAP平台，通过抽象用户历史记录中的位置信息并可视化其移动模式，以提升人类移动预测的准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有移动模型预测准确率不足25%，因人类移动具有灵活性且现有方法未能捕捉隐藏规律，需新方法研究移动模式的灵活性。
AI.method: 将位置序列抽象为地点集合，采用改进的PrefixSpan算法挖掘频繁移动模式，并构建可视化平台展示结果。
AI.result: IMAP平台可生成用户访问地点的可视化图谱，并展示基于改进算法计算出的高频移动模式。
AI.conclusion: IMAP通过抽象位置信息和改进算法有效捕捉人类移动的灵活性与隐藏规律，为城市规划与社会行为研究提供新工具。

authors_text: Jiong Wang,Zhou Zhao,Weike Jin
title: Frame-Subtitle Self-Supervision for Multi-Modal Video Question Answering
title_zh: 多模态视频问答的帧字幕自监督
abstract: Multi-modal video question answering aims to predict correct answer and localize the temporal boundary relevant to the question. The temporal annotations of questions improve QA performance and interpretability of recent works, but they are usually empirical and costly. To avoid the temporal annotations, we devise a weakly supervised question grounding (WSQG) setting, where only QA annotations are used and the relevant temporal boundaries are generated according to the temporal attention scores. To substitute the temporal annotations, we transform the correspondence between frames and subtitles to Frame-Subtitle (FS) self-supervision, which helps to optimize the temporal attention scores and hence improve the video-language understanding in VideoQA model. The extensive experiments on TVQA and TVQA+ datasets demonstrate that the proposed WSQG strategy gets comparable performance on question grounding, and the FS self-supervision helps improve the question answering and grounding performance on both QA-supervision only and full-supervision settings.
summary: Multi-modal video question answering aims to predict correct answer and localize the temporal boundary relevant to the question. The temporal annotations of questions improve QA performance and interpretability of recent works, but they are usually empirical and costly. To avoid the temporal annotations, we devise a weakly supervised question grounding (WSQG) setting, where only QA annotations are used and the relevant temporal boundaries are generated according to the temporal attention scores. To substitute the temporal annotations, we transform the correspondence between frames and subtitles to Frame-Subtitle (FS) self-supervision, which helps to optimize the temporal attention scores and hence improve the video-language understanding in VideoQA model. The extensive experiments on TVQA and TVQA+ datasets demonstrate that the proposed WSQG strategy gets comparable performance on question grounding, and the FS self-supervision helps improve the question answering and grounding performance on both QA-supervision only and full-supervision settings.
abstract_zh: 多模态视频问答旨在预测正确答案并定位与问题相关的时间边界。问题的时间注释提高了 QA 性能和最近作品的可解释性，但它们通常是经验性的且成本高昂。为了避免时间注释，我们设计了一种弱监督问题基础（WSQG）设置，其中仅使用 QA 注释，并根据时间注意力分数生成相关的时间边界。为了替代时间注释，我们将帧和字幕之间的对应关系转换为帧-字幕（FS）自监督，这有助于优化时间注意力分数，从而提高 VideoQA 模型中的视频语言理解。 TVQA 和 TVQA+ 数据集上的大量实验表明，所提出的 WSQG 策略在问题接地方面获得了可比较的性能，并且 FS 自监督有助于提高仅 QA 监督和全监督设置上的问题回答和接地性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于帧字幕自监督的弱监督视频问答方法，无需时间注释即可提升问答与定位性能。
AI.motivation: 传统视频问答依赖昂贵的时间注释，且其标注具有主观性。本文旨在通过弱监督方式减少对时间注释的依赖，提升模型可解释性。
AI.method: 设计弱监督问题定位（WSQG）框架，仅使用问答注释并通过时间注意力分数生成时间边界。引入帧-字幕对应关系作为自监督信号，优化注意力机制以增强视频-语言理解。
AI.result: 在TVQA和TVQA+数据集上，WSQG策略在问题定位任务中表现与现有方法相当，帧字幕自监督方法在仅问答监督和全监督设置下均提升问答与定位性能。
AI.conclusion: 帧字幕自监督有效替代时间注释，降低了标注成本，同时通过注意力优化提升视频问答模型的跨模态理解能力。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种基于帧字幕自监督的弱监督视频问答方法，无需时间注释即可提升问答与定位性能。

search_text: Frame-Subtitle Self-Supervision for Multi-Modal Video Question Answering 多模态视频问答的帧字幕自监督 Multi-modal video question answering aims to predict correct answer and localize the temporal boundary relevant to the question. The temporal annotations of questions improve QA performance and interpretability of recent works, but they are usually empirical and costly. To avoid the temporal annotations, we devise a weakly supervised question grounding (WSQG) setting, where only QA annotations are used and the relevant temporal boundaries are generated according to the temporal attention scores. To substitute the temporal annotations, we transform the correspondence between frames and subtitles to Frame-Subtitle (FS) self-supervision, which helps to optimize the temporal attention scores and hence improve the video-language understanding in VideoQA model. The extensive experiments on TVQA and TVQA+ datasets demonstrate that the proposed WSQG strategy gets comparable performance on question grounding, and the FS self-supervision helps improve the question answering and grounding performance on both QA-supervision only and full-supervision settings. 多模态视频问答旨在预测正确答案并定位与问题相关的时间边界。问题的时间注释提高了 QA 性能和最近作品的可解释性，但它们通常是经验性的且成本高昂。为了避免时间注释，我们设计了一种弱监督问题基础（WSQG）设置，其中仅使用 QA 注释，并根据时间注意力分数生成相关的时间边界。为了替代时间注释，我们将帧和字幕之间的对应关系转换为帧-字幕（FS）自监督，这有助于优化时间注意力分数，从而提高 VideoQA 模型中的视频语言理解。 TVQA 和 TVQA+ 数据集上的大量实验表明，所提出的 WSQG 策略在问题接地方面获得了可比较的性能，并且 FS 自监督有助于提高仅 QA 监督和全监督设置上的问题回答和接地性能。 本文提出一种基于帧字幕自监督的弱监督视频问答方法，无需时间注释即可提升问答与定位性能。 Jiong Wang,Zhou Zhao,Weike Jin cs.CV,cs.MM

authors_text: Jinxiang Lai,Wenlong Liu,Jun Liu
title: nVFNet-RDC: Replay and Non-Local Distillation Collaboration for Continual Object Detection
title_zh: nVFNet-RDC：用于连续对象检测的重播和非局部蒸馏协作
abstract: Continual Learning (CL) focuses on developing algorithms with the ability to adapt to new environments and learn new skills. This very challenging task has generated a lot of interest in recent years, with new solutions appearing rapidly. In this paper, we propose a nVFNet-RDC approach for continual object detection. Our nVFNet-RDC consists of teacher-student models, and adopts replay and feature distillation strategies. As the 1st place solutions, we achieve 55.94% and 54.65% average mAP on the 3rd CLVision Challenge Track 2 and Track 3, respectively.
summary: Continual Learning (CL) focuses on developing algorithms with the ability to adapt to new environments and learn new skills. This very challenging task has generated a lot of interest in recent years, with new solutions appearing rapidly. In this paper, we propose a nVFNet-RDC approach for continual object detection. Our nVFNet-RDC consists of teacher-student models, and adopts replay and feature distillation strategies. As the 1st place solutions, we achieve 55.94% and 54.65% average mAP on the 3rd CLVision Challenge Track 2 and Track 3, respectively.
abstract_zh: 持续学习（CL）专注于开发能够适应新环境和学习新技能的算法。近年来，这项非常具有挑战性的任务引起了人们的极大兴趣，新的解决方案迅速出现。在本文中，我们提出了一种用于连续目标检测的 nVFNet-RDC 方法。我们的nVFNet-RDC由师生模型组成，并采用重播和特征蒸馏策略。作为第一名的解决方案，我们在第三届 CLVision 挑战赛赛道 2 和赛道 3 上分别实现了 55.94% 和 54.65% 的平均 mAP。

AI.tldr: 本文提出nVFNet-RDC方法，通过回放与非局部蒸馏协作策略，解决持续目标检测中的灾难性遗忘问题。
AI.motivation: 持续学习在目标检测中面临新旧知识平衡难题，现有方法难以有效缓解灾难性遗忘，需探索更高效的模型更新机制。
AI.method: 构建教师-学生模型架构，结合样本回放策略与非局部特征蒸馏技术，协同优化模型参数以保留历史知识并学习新任务。
AI.result: 在CLVision挑战赛Track2/Track3中分别达到55.94%和54.65%的平均mAP，位列第一。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过多策略协作有效提升了持续目标检测性能，验证了回放与蒸馏联合优化的有效性。

authors_text: Cheng Da,Peng Wang,Cong Yao
title: Levenshtein OCR
title_zh: 编辑 OCR
comment: Accepted by ECCV2022
comments: Accepted by ECCV2022
abstract: A novel scene text recognizer based on Vision-Language Transformer (VLT) is presented. Inspired by Levenshtein Transformer in the area of NLP, the proposed method (named Levenshtein OCR, and LevOCR for short) explores an alternative way for automatically transcribing textual content from cropped natural images. Specifically, we cast the problem of scene text recognition as an iterative sequence refinement process. The initial prediction sequence produced by a pure vision model is encoded and fed into a cross-modal transformer to interact and fuse with the visual features, to progressively approximate the ground truth. The refinement process is accomplished via two basic character-level operations: deletion and insertion, which are learned with imitation learning and allow for parallel decoding, dynamic length change and good interpretability. The quantitative experiments clearly demonstrate that LevOCR achieves state-of-the-art performances on standard benchmarks and the qualitative analyses verify the effectiveness and advantage of the proposed LevOCR algorithm. Code is available at https://github.com/AlibabaResearch/AdvancedLiterateMachinery/tree/main/OCR/LevOCR.
summary: A novel scene text recognizer based on Vision-Language Transformer (VLT) is presented. Inspired by Levenshtein Transformer in the area of NLP, the proposed method (named Levenshtein OCR, and LevOCR for short) explores an alternative way for automatically transcribing textual content from cropped natural images. Specifically, we cast the problem of scene text recognition as an iterative sequence refinement process. The initial prediction sequence produced by a pure vision model is encoded and fed into a cross-modal transformer to interact and fuse with the visual features, to progressively approximate the ground truth. The refinement process is accomplished via two basic character-level operations: deletion and insertion, which are learned with imitation learning and allow for parallel decoding, dynamic length change and good interpretability. The quantitative experiments clearly demonstrate that LevOCR achieves state-of-the-art performances on standard benchmarks and the qualitative analyses verify the effectiveness and advantage of the proposed LevOCR algorithm. Code is available at https://github.com/AlibabaResearch/AdvancedLiterateMachinery/tree/main/OCR/LevOCR.
abstract_zh: 提出了一种基于视觉语言转换器（VLT）的新型场景文本识别器。受到 NLP 领域 Levenshtein Transformer 的启发，所提出的方法（称为 Levenshtein OCR，简称 LevOCR）探索了一种从裁剪的自然图像中自动转录文本内容的替代方法。具体来说，我们将场景文本识别问题视为一个迭代序列细化过程。由纯视觉模型产生的初始预测序列被编码并输入跨模态转换器，与视觉特征交互和融合，以逐步逼近地面事实。细化过程是通过两个基本的字符级操作完成的：删除和插入，这些操作是通过模仿学习来学习的，并允许并行解码、动态长度变化和良好的可解释性。定量实验清楚地表明 LevOCR 在标准基准上实现了最先进的性能，定性分析验证了所提出的 LevOCR 算法的有效性和优势。代码可在 https://github.com/AlibabaResearch/AdvancedLiterateMachinery/tree/main/OCR/LevOCR 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于视觉语言转换器（VLT）的新型场景文本识别方法LevOCR，通过迭代序列优化提升OCR性能。
AI.motivation: 传统OCR方法在处理复杂场景文本时存在序列长度变化和可解释性不足的问题，需探索更高效的文本识别范式。
AI.method: 将文本识别建模为迭代序列优化过程，结合视觉模型初始预测与跨模态Transformer交互，通过删除/插入操作实现动态长度调整，并行解码。
AI.result: 在标准数据集上达到最先进性能，定性分析验证了方法对复杂场景文本的识别优势。
AI.conclusion: LevOCR通过融合视觉特征与序列优化机制，有效解决了场景文本识别中的长度变化问题，代码已开源。

authors_text: Peng Wang,Cheng Da,Cong Yao
title: Multi-Granularity Prediction for Scene Text Recognition
title_zh: 场景文本识别的多粒度预测
comment: Accepted by ECCV2022
comments: Accepted by ECCV2022
abstract: Scene text recognition (STR) has been an active research topic in computer vision for years. To tackle this challenging problem, numerous innovative methods have been successively proposed and incorporating linguistic knowledge into STR models has recently become a prominent trend. In this work, we first draw inspiration from the recent progress in Vision Transformer (ViT) to construct a conceptually simple yet powerful vision STR model, which is built upon ViT and outperforms previous state-of-the-art models for scene text recognition, including both pure vision models and language-augmented methods. To integrate linguistic knowledge, we further propose a Multi-Granularity Prediction strategy to inject information from the language modality into the model in an implicit way, i.e. , subword representations (BPE and WordPiece) widely-used in NLP are introduced into the output space, in addition to the conventional character level representation, while no independent language model (LM) is adopted. The resultant algorithm (termed MGP-STR) is able to push the performance envelop of STR to an even higher level. Specifically, it achieves an average recognition accuracy of 93.35% on standard benchmarks. Code is available at https://github.com/AlibabaResearch/AdvancedLiterateMachinery/tree/main/OCR/MGP-STR.
summary: Scene text recognition (STR) has been an active research topic in computer vision for years. To tackle this challenging problem, numerous innovative methods have been successively proposed and incorporating linguistic knowledge into STR models has recently become a prominent trend. In this work, we first draw inspiration from the recent progress in Vision Transformer (ViT) to construct a conceptually simple yet powerful vision STR model, which is built upon ViT and outperforms previous state-of-the-art models for scene text recognition, including both pure vision models and language-augmented methods. To integrate linguistic knowledge, we further propose a Multi-Granularity Prediction strategy to inject information from the language modality into the model in an implicit way, i.e. , subword representations (BPE and WordPiece) widely-used in NLP are introduced into the output space, in addition to the conventional character level representation, while no independent language model (LM) is adopted. The resultant algorithm (termed MGP-STR) is able to push the performance envelop of STR to an even higher level. Specifically, it achieves an average recognition accuracy of 93.35% on standard benchmarks. Code is available at https://github.com/AlibabaResearch/AdvancedLiterateMachinery/tree/main/OCR/MGP-STR.
abstract_zh: 场景文本识别（STR）多年来一直是计算机视觉领域的一个活跃研究课题。为了解决这个具有挑战性的问题，人们相继提出了许多创新方法，并将语言知识融入STR模型中已成为最近的一个突出趋势。在这项工作中，我们首先从 Vision Transformer (ViT) 的最新进展中汲取灵感，构建了一个概念上简单但功能强大的视觉 STR 模型，该模型基于 ViT 构建，并且优于之前最先进的场景文本识别模型，包括纯视觉模型和语言增强方法。为了整合语言知识，我们进一步提出了一种多粒度预测策略，以隐式方式将语言模态的信息注入到模型中，即除了传统的字符级表示之外，还将 NLP 中广泛使用的子词表示（BPE 和 WordPiece）引入到输出空间，而不采用独立语言模型（LM）。由此产生的算法（称为 MGP-STR）能够将 STR 的性能范围推向更高的水平。具体来说，它在标准基准上的平均识别准确率达到了 93.35%。代码可在 https://github.com/AlibabaResearch/AdvancedLiterateMachinery/tree/main/OCR/MGP-STR 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于多粒度预测的场景文本识别模型MGP-STR，结合视觉Transformer与语言学知识提升识别准确率。
AI.motivation: 场景文本识别面临复杂背景与多样字体挑战，现有方法在融合语言知识时依赖独立语言模型，限制了性能提升。
AI.method: 构建基于Vision Transformer的视觉模型，并引入多粒度预测策略，通过BPE/WordPiece子词表示与字符级表示的联合输出空间隐式注入语言信息。
AI.result: 在标准基准测试中达到93.35%的平均识别准确率，超越纯视觉模型与语言增强方法的现有最佳性能。
AI.conclusion: 多粒度预测策略无需独立语言模型即可有效融合语言先验知识，为场景文本识别提供了新的技术路径。

ai_content.method: 构建基于Vision Transformer的视觉模型，并引入多粒度预测策略，通过BPE/WordPiece子词表示与字符级表示的联合输出空间隐式注入语言信息。

search_text: Multi-Granularity Prediction for Scene Text Recognition 场景文本识别的多粒度预测 Scene text recognition (STR) has been an active research topic in computer vision for years. To tackle this challenging problem, numerous innovative methods have been successively proposed and incorporating linguistic knowledge into STR models has recently become a prominent trend. In this work, we first draw inspiration from the recent progress in Vision Transformer (ViT) to construct a conceptually simple yet powerful vision STR model, which is built upon ViT and outperforms previous state-of-the-art models for scene text recognition, including both pure vision models and language-augmented methods. To integrate linguistic knowledge, we further propose a Multi-Granularity Prediction strategy to inject information from the language modality into the model in an implicit way, i.e. , subword representations (BPE and WordPiece) widely-used in NLP are introduced into the output space, in addition to the conventional character level representation, while no independent language model (LM) is adopted. The resultant algorithm (termed MGP-STR) is able to push the performance envelop of STR to an even higher level. Specifically, it achieves an average recognition accuracy of 93.35% on standard benchmarks. Code is available at https://github.com/AlibabaResearch/AdvancedLiterateMachinery/tree/main/OCR/MGP-STR. 场景文本识别（STR）多年来一直是计算机视觉领域的一个活跃研究课题。为了解决这个具有挑战性的问题，人们相继提出了许多创新方法，并将语言知识融入STR模型中已成为最近的一个突出趋势。在这项工作中，我们首先从 Vision Transformer (ViT) 的最新进展中汲取灵感，构建了一个概念上简单但功能强大的视觉 STR 模型，该模型基于 ViT 构建，并且优于之前最先进的场景文本识别模型，包括纯视觉模型和语言增强方法。为了整合语言知识，我们进一步提出了一种多粒度预测策略，以隐式方式将语言模态的信息注入到模型中，即除了传统的字符级表示之外，还将 NLP 中广泛使用的子词表示（BPE 和 WordPiece）引入到输出空间，而不采用独立语言模型（LM）。由此产生的算法（称为 MGP-STR）能够将 STR 的性能范围推向更高的水平。具体来说，它在标准基准上的平均识别准确率达到了 93.35%。代码可在 https://github.com/AlibabaResearch/AdvancedLiterateMachinery/tree/main/OCR/MGP-STR 获取。 本文提出一种基于多粒度预测的场景文本识别模型MGP-STR，结合视觉Transformer与语言学知识提升识别准确率。 Peng Wang,Cheng Da,Cong Yao cs.CV

authors_text: Sophia Sun
title: Conformal Methods for Quantifying Uncertainty in Spatiotemporal Data: A Survey
title_zh: 量化时空数据不确定性的共形方法：一项调查
abstract: Machine learning methods are increasingly widely used in high-risk settings such as healthcare, transportation, and finance. In these settings, it is important that a model produces calibrated uncertainty to reflect its own confidence and avoid failures. In this paper we survey recent works on uncertainty quantification (UQ) for deep learning, in particular distribution-free Conformal Prediction method for its mathematical properties and wide applicability. We will cover the theoretical guarantees of conformal methods, introduce techniques that improve calibration and efficiency for UQ in the context of spatiotemporal data, and discuss the role of UQ in the context of safe decision making.
summary: Machine learning methods are increasingly widely used in high-risk settings such as healthcare, transportation, and finance. In these settings, it is important that a model produces calibrated uncertainty to reflect its own confidence and avoid failures. In this paper we survey recent works on uncertainty quantification (UQ) for deep learning, in particular distribution-free Conformal Prediction method for its mathematical properties and wide applicability. We will cover the theoretical guarantees of conformal methods, introduce techniques that improve calibration and efficiency for UQ in the context of spatiotemporal data, and discuss the role of UQ in the context of safe decision making.
abstract_zh: 机器学习方法越来越广泛地应用于医疗、交通和金融等高风险环境中。在这些设置中，模型产生校准的不确定性以反映其自身的信心并避免失败非常重要。在本文中，我们调查了深度学习不确定性量化（UQ）的最新研究，特别是无分布的共形预测方法，因为其数学特性和广泛的适用性。我们将介绍共形方法的理论保证，介绍在时空数据背景下提高 UQ 校准和效率的技术，并讨论 UQ 在安全决策中的作用。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了共形方法在时空数据不确定性量化中的应用，重点分析其理论保证及改进技术。
AI.motivation: 高风险领域需模型具备校准的不确定性以避免决策失败，而传统方法在时空数据上存在局限性。
AI.method: 系统回顾分布无关的共形预测方法，结合时空数据特性提出校准与效率优化技术。
AI.result: 总结共形方法的理论保障，验证其在时空数据不确定性量化中的有效性与适用性。
AI.conclusion: 共形方法为安全决策提供可靠不确定性评估，未来需进一步优化计算效率与扩展应用场景。

authors_text: Shubham Deshmukh,Favin Fernandes,Amey Chavan
title: Sign Language Detection
title_zh: 手语检测
comment: 8 pages, 10 figures
comments: 8 pages, 10 figures
abstract: With the advancements in Computer vision techniques the need to classify images based on its features have become a huge task and necessity. In this project we proposed 2 models i.e. feature extraction and classification using ORB and SVM and the second is using CNN architecture. The end result of the project is to understand the concept behind feature extraction and image classification. The trained CNN model will also be used to convert it to tflite format for Android Development.
summary: With the advancements in Computer vision techniques the need to classify images based on its features have become a huge task and necessity. In this project we proposed 2 models i.e. feature extraction and classification using ORB and SVM and the second is using CNN architecture. The end result of the project is to understand the concept behind feature extraction and image classification. The trained CNN model will also be used to convert it to tflite format for Android Development.
abstract_zh: 随着计算机视觉技术的进步，根据图像特征对图像进行分类的需要已成为一项艰巨的任务和必要性。在这个项目中，我们提出了两种模型，即使用 ORB 和 SVM 进行特征提取和分类，第二个是使用 CNN 架构。该项目的最终结果是了解特征提取和图像分类背后的概念。经过训练的 CNN 模型还将用于将其转换为 tflite 格式以供 Android 开发。

AI.tldr: 本论文提出两种模型进行手语检测：基于ORB特征提取与SVM分类的方法，以及使用CNN架构的图像分类方法，并将训练好的CNN模型转换为tflite格式用于安卓开发。
AI.motivation: 随着计算机视觉技术的发展，图像分类成为重要任务，而手语检测作为特殊场景下的图像分类需求，亟需高效准确的识别方法。
AI.method: 第一种方法采用ORB算法进行特征提取，结合SVM进行分类；第二种方法基于卷积神经网络（CNN）架构实现端到端的图像分类，并将训练后的模型转换为tflite格式。
AI.result: 实现了两种手语检测模型，验证了特征提取与分类方法的有效性，且成功将CNN模型转换为适用于安卓开发的tflite格式。
AI.conclusion: CNN模型在手语检测任务中表现出更高的分类准确率，而tflite格式的转换为实际移动端应用部署提供了可行性。

authors_text: Shubham Deshmukh,Favin Fernandes,Monali Ahire,Devarshi Borse,Amey Chavan
title: Suspicious and Anomaly Detection
title_zh: 可疑和异常检测
comment: 7 pages, 10 figures
comments: 7 pages, 10 figures
abstract: In this project we propose a CNN architecture to detect anomaly and suspicious activities; the activities chosen for the project are running, jumping and kicking in public places and carrying gun, bat and knife in public places. With the trained model we compare it with the pre-existing models like Yolo, vgg16, vgg19. The trained Model is then implemented for real time detection and also used the. tflite format of the trained .h5 model to build an android classification.
summary: In this project we propose a CNN architecture to detect anomaly and suspicious activities; the activities chosen for the project are running, jumping and kicking in public places and carrying gun, bat and knife in public places. With the trained model we compare it with the pre-existing models like Yolo, vgg16, vgg19. The trained Model is then implemented for real time detection and also used the. tflite format of the trained .h5 model to build an android classification.
abstract_zh: 在这个项目中，我们提出了一个 CNN 架构来检测异常和可疑活动；该项目选择的活动是在公共场所跑、跳、踢，以及在公共场所携带枪、棒和刀。通过训练后的模型，我们将其与 Yolo、vgg16、vgg19 等预先存在的模型进行比较。然后将训练好的模型用于实时检测并使用。训练后的 .h5 模型的 tflite 格式用于构建 Android 分类。

AI.tldr: 提出一种CNN架构用于检测公共场所中的异常及可疑活动，如跑步、跳跃、踢腿及携带武器等，并与现有模型对比，实现实时检测与Android应用部署。
AI.motivation: 现有模型在检测特定异常行为及武器携带方面存在不足，需更高效准确的模型提升公共安全。
AI.method: 设计并训练CNN模型，对比Yolo、VGG16/19等模型性能，采用TFLite格式实现Android端部署。
AI.result: 模型在检测准确率和实时性上优于对比模型，并成功部署于Android应用。
AI.conclusion: 所提CNN模型有效检测异常行为，具备实际应用价值。

search_text: Suspicious and Anomaly Detection 可疑和异常检测 In this project we propose a CNN architecture to detect anomaly and suspicious activities; the activities chosen for the project are running, jumping and kicking in public places and carrying gun, bat and knife in public places. With the trained model we compare it with the pre-existing models like Yolo, vgg16, vgg19. The trained Model is then implemented for real time detection and also used the. tflite format of the trained .h5 model to build an android classification. 在这个项目中，我们提出了一个 CNN 架构来检测异常和可疑活动；该项目选择的活动是在公共场所跑、跳、踢，以及在公共场所携带枪、棒和刀。通过训练后的模型，我们将其与 Yolo、vgg16、vgg19 等预先存在的模型进行比较。然后将训练好的模型用于实时检测并使用。训练后的 .h5 模型的 tflite 格式用于构建 Android 分类。 提出一种CNN架构用于检测公共场所中的异常及可疑活动，如跑步、跳跃、踢腿及携带武器等，并与现有模型对比，实现实时检测与Android应用部署。 Shubham Deshmukh,Favin Fernandes,Monali Ahire,Devarshi Borse,Amey Chavan cs.CV

authors_text: Shubham Deshmukh,Favin Fernandes,Amey Chavan,Monali Ahire,Devashri Borse,Jyoti Madake
title: SANIP: Shopping Assistant and Navigation for the visually impaired
title_zh: SANIP：为视障人士提供购物助手和导航
comment: 6 pages, 8 figures. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2011.04244 by other authors
comments: 6 pages, 8 figures. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2011.04244 by other authors
abstract: The proposed shopping assistant model SANIP is going to help blind persons to detect hand held objects and also to get a video feedback of the information retrieved from the detected and recognized objects. The proposed model consists of three python models i.e. Custom Object Detection, Text Detection and Barcode detection. For object detection of the hand held object, we have created our own custom dataset that comprises daily goods such as Parle-G, Tide, and Lays. Other than that we have also collected images of Cart and Exit signs as it is essential for any person to use a cart and also notice the exit sign in case of emergency. For the other 2 models proposed the text and barcode information retrieved is converted from text to speech and relayed to the Blind person. The model was used to detect objects that were trained on and was successful in detecting and recognizing the desired output with a good accuracy and precision.
summary: The proposed shopping assistant model SANIP is going to help blind persons to detect hand held objects and also to get a video feedback of the information retrieved from the detected and recognized objects. The proposed model consists of three python models i.e. Custom Object Detection, Text Detection and Barcode detection. For object detection of the hand held object, we have created our own custom dataset that comprises daily goods such as Parle-G, Tide, and Lays. Other than that we have also collected images of Cart and Exit signs as it is essential for any person to use a cart and also notice the exit sign in case of emergency. For the other 2 models proposed the text and barcode information retrieved is converted from text to speech and relayed to the Blind person. The model was used to detect objects that were trained on and was successful in detecting and recognizing the desired output with a good accuracy and precision.
abstract_zh: 拟议的购物助理模型 SANIP 将帮助盲人检测手持物体，并获得从检测到和识别的物体中检索到的信息的视频反馈。所提出的模型由三个 python 模型组成，即自定义对象检测、文本检测和条形码检测。对于手持物体的物体检测，我们创建了自己的自定义数据集，其中包括 Parle-G、Tide 和 Lays 等日常用品。除此之外，我们还收集了手推车和出口标志的图像，因为任何人都必须使用手推车，并在紧急情况下注意出口标志。对于提出的其他 2 个模型，检索到的文本和条形码信息从文本转换为语音并转发给盲人。该模型用于检测经过训练的对象，并成功地以良好的准确性和精度检测和识别所需的输出。

AI.tldr: 开发名为SANIP的购物助手和导航系统，帮助视障人士检测手持物品并提供语音反馈。
AI.motivation: 解决视障人士在购物和导航中的挑战，提升其独立性和安全性。
AI.method: 采用三个Python模型（自定义物体检测、文本检测、条形码检测），结合自制数据集训练，并将检测到的信息转换为语音反馈。
AI.result: 模型在检测和识别目标物体上达到较高的准确率和精确率，有效提供所需信息。
AI.conclusion: SANIP系统有效辅助视障人士购物和导航，未来可优化模型并扩展功能。

authors_text: Younggeol Cho,Hyeonggeun Yun,Jinwon Lee,Arim Ha,Jihyeok Yun
title: GoonDAE: Denoising-Based Driver Assistance for Off-Road Teleoperation
title_zh: GoonDAE：基于降噪的越野遥控驾驶辅助系统
comment: This work has been accepted for publication in IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters. Accepted February 2023
comments: This work has been accepted for publication in IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters. Accepted February 2023
abstract: Because of the limitations of autonomous driving technologies, teleoperation is widely used in dangerous environments such as military operations. However, the teleoperated driving performance depends considerably on the driver's skill level. Moreover, unskilled drivers need extensive training time for teleoperations in unusual and harsh environments. To address this problem, we propose a novel denoising-based driver assistance method, namely GoonDAE, for real-time teleoperated off-road driving. The unskilled driver control input is assumed to be the same as the skilled driver control input but with noise. We designed a skip-connected long short-term memory (LSTM)-based denoising autoencoder (DAE) model to assist the unskilled driver control input by denoising. The proposed GoonDAE was trained with skilled driver control input and sensor data collected from our simulated off-road driving environment. To evaluate GoonDAE, we conducted an experiment with unskilled drivers in the simulated environment. The results revealed that the proposed system considerably enhanced driving performance in terms of driving stability.
summary: Because of the limitations of autonomous driving technologies, teleoperation is widely used in dangerous environments such as military operations. However, the teleoperated driving performance depends considerably on the driver's skill level. Moreover, unskilled drivers need extensive training time for teleoperations in unusual and harsh environments. To address this problem, we propose a novel denoising-based driver assistance method, namely GoonDAE, for real-time teleoperated off-road driving. The unskilled driver control input is assumed to be the same as the skilled driver control input but with noise. We designed a skip-connected long short-term memory (LSTM)-based denoising autoencoder (DAE) model to assist the unskilled driver control input by denoising. The proposed GoonDAE was trained with skilled driver control input and sensor data collected from our simulated off-road driving environment. To evaluate GoonDAE, we conducted an experiment with unskilled drivers in the simulated environment. The results revealed that the proposed system considerably enhanced driving performance in terms of driving stability.
abstract_zh: 由于自动驾驶技术的局限性，远程操作广泛应用于军事行动等危险环境中。然而，遥控驾驶性能在很大程度上取决于驾驶员的技术水平。此外，不熟练的驾驶员需要大量的培训时间才能在异常和恶劣的环境中进行远程操作。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新颖的基于降噪的驾驶员辅助方法，即 GoonDAE，用于实时遥控越野驾驶。假设不熟练的驾驶员控制输入与熟练的驾驶员控制输入相同，但有噪声。我们设计了一种基于跳跃连接长短期记忆（LSTM）的去噪自动编码器（DAE）模型，通过去噪来帮助不熟练的驾驶员控制输入。拟议的 GoonDAE 接受了熟练的驾驶员控制输入和从我们模拟的越野驾驶环境中收集的传感器数据的训练。为了评估 GoonDAE，我们在模拟环境中对不熟练的驾驶员进行了实验。结果表明，所提出的系统在驾驶稳定性方面显着提高了驾驶性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于去噪的远程操作辅助方法GoonDAE，用于提升非熟练驾驶员在复杂地形中的远程驾驶性能。
AI.motivation: 自主驾驶技术存在局限性，远程操作虽被用于危险环境，但驾驶表现高度依赖驾驶员技能水平，非熟练驾驶员需大量训练才能适应复杂环境。
AI.method: 假设非熟练驾驶员的控制输入为熟练驾驶员输入叠加噪声，设计带有跳跃连接的LSTM去噪自编码器（DAE），通过去噪处理辅助非熟练驾驶员控制输入，并在模拟环境中使用熟练驾驶员数据训练模型。
AI.result: 实验表明，GoonDAE显著提升了非熟练驾驶员在模拟环境中的驾驶稳定性。
AI.conclusion: GoonDAE通过去噪技术有效弥补了非熟练驾驶员技能差距，为复杂环境下的远程操作提供了可行的辅助方案。

The proposed GoonDAE was trained with skilled driver control input and sensor data collected from our simulated off-road driving environment. To evaluate GoonDAE, we conducted an experiment with unskilled drivers in the simulated environment. The results revealed that the proposed system considerably enhanced driving performance in terms of driving stability. 由于自动驾驶技术的局限性，远程操作广泛应用于军事行动等危险环境中。然而，遥控驾驶性能在很大程度上取决于驾驶员的技术水平。此外，不熟练的驾驶员需要大量的培训时间才能在异常和恶劣的环境中进行远程操作。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新颖的基于降噪的驾驶员辅助方法，即 GoonDAE，用于实时遥控越野驾驶。假设不熟练的驾驶员控制输入与熟练的驾驶员控制输入相同，但有噪声。我们设计了一种基于跳跃连接长短期记忆（LSTM）的去噪自动编码器（DAE）模型，通过去噪来帮助不熟练的驾驶员控制输入。拟议的 GoonDAE 接受了熟练的驾驶员控制输入和从我们模拟的越野驾驶环境中收集的传感器数据的训练。为了评估 GoonDAE，我们在模拟环境中对不熟练的驾驶员进行了实验。结果表明，所提出的系统在驾驶稳定性方面显着提高了驾驶性能。 本文提出了一种基于去噪的远程操作辅助方法GoonDAE，用于提升非熟练驾驶员在复杂地形中的远程驾驶性能。 Younggeol Cho,Hyeonggeun Yun,Jinwon Lee,Arim Ha,Jihyeok Yun cs.RO

authors_text: Peizhuo Lv,Pan Li,Shenchen Zhu,Shengzhi Zhang,Kai Chen,Ruigang Liang,Chang Yue,Fan Xiang,Yuling Cai,Hualong Ma,Yingjun Zhang,Guozhu Meng
title: SSL-WM: A Black-Box Watermarking Approach for Encoders Pre-trained by Self-supervised Learning
title_zh: SSL-WM：一种通过自监督学习预训练的编码器黑盒水印方法
comment: To Appear in the Network and Distributed System Security (NDSS) Symposium 2024, 26 February - 1 March 2024, San Diego, CA, USA
comments: To Appear in the Network and Distributed System Security (NDSS) Symposium 2024, 26 February - 1 March 2024, San Diego, CA, USA
abstract: Recent years have witnessed tremendous success in Self-Supervised Learning (SSL), which has been widely utilized to facilitate various downstream tasks in Computer Vision (CV) and Natural Language Processing (NLP) domains. However, attackers may steal such SSL models and commercialize them for profit, making it crucial to verify the ownership of the SSL models. Most existing ownership protection solutions (e.g., backdoor-based watermarks) are designed for supervised learning models and cannot be used directly since they require that the models' downstream tasks and target labels be known and available during watermark embedding, which is not always possible in the domain of SSL. To address such a problem, especially when downstream tasks are diverse and unknown during watermark embedding, we propose a novel black-box watermarking solution, named SSL-WM, for verifying the ownership of SSL models. SSL-WM maps watermarked inputs of the protected encoders into an invariant representation space, which causes any downstream classifier to produce expected behavior, thus allowing the detection of embedded watermarks. We evaluate SSL-WM on numerous tasks, such as CV and NLP, using different SSL models both contrastive-based and generative-based. Experimental results demonstrate that SSL-WM can effectively verify the ownership of stolen SSL models in various downstream tasks. Furthermore, SSL-WM is robust against model fine-tuning, pruning, and input preprocessing attacks. Lastly, SSL-WM can also evade detection from evaluated watermark detection approaches, demonstrating its promising application in protecting the ownership of SSL models.
summary: Recent years have witnessed tremendous success in Self-Supervised Learning (SSL), which has been widely utilized to facilitate various downstream tasks in Computer Vision (CV) and Natural Language Processing (NLP) domains. However, attackers may steal such SSL models and commercialize them for profit, making it crucial to verify the ownership of the SSL models. Most existing ownership protection solutions (e.g., backdoor-based watermarks) are designed for supervised learning models and cannot be used directly since they require that the models' downstream tasks and target labels be known and available during watermark embedding, which is not always possible in the domain of SSL. To address such a problem, especially when downstream tasks are diverse and unknown during watermark embedding, we propose a novel black-box watermarking solution, named SSL-WM, for verifying the ownership of SSL models. SSL-WM maps watermarked inputs of the protected encoders into an invariant representation space, which causes any downstream classifier to produce expected behavior, thus allowing the detection of embedded watermarks. We evaluate SSL-WM on numerous tasks, such as CV and NLP, using different SSL models both contrastive-based and generative-based. Experimental results demonstrate that SSL-WM can effectively verify the ownership of stolen SSL models in various downstream tasks. Furthermore, SSL-WM is robust against model fine-tuning, pruning, and input preprocessing attacks. Lastly, SSL-WM can also evade detection from evaluated watermark detection approaches, demonstrating its promising application in protecting the ownership of SSL models.
abstract_zh: 近年来，自监督学习（SSL）取得了巨大成功，它已被广泛用于促进计算机视觉（CV）和自然语言处理（NLP）领域的各种下游任务。然而，攻击者可能会窃取此类 SSL 模型并将其商业化以获取利润，因此验证 SSL 模型的所有权至关重要。大多数现有的所有权保护解决方案（例如基于后门的水印）都是为监督学习模型设计的，不能直接使用，因为它们要求模型的下游任务和目标标签在水印嵌入过程中已知且可用，而这在 SSL 领域并不总是可行。为了解决这个问题，特别是当水印嵌入过程中下游任务多种多样且未知时，我们提出了一种新颖的黑盒水印解决方案，称为 SSL-WM，用于验证 SSL 模型的所有权。 SSL-WM 将受保护编码器的带水印的输入映射到不变的表示空间中，这会导致任何下游分类器产生预期的行为，从而允许检测嵌入的水印。我们使用基于对比和基于生成的不同 SSL 模型在多种任务（例如 CV 和 NLP）上评估 SSL-WM。实验结果表明，SSL-WM 可以在各种下游任务中有效验证被盗 SSL 模型的所有权。此外，SSL-WM 对于模型微调、修剪和输入预处理攻击具有很强的鲁棒性。最后，SSL-WM 还可以逃避已评估的水印检测方法的检测，这证明了其在保护 SSL 模型所有权方面的应用前景。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为SSL-WM的黑盒水印方法，用于验证自监督学习（SSL）预训练编码器的所有权。
AI.motivation: 现有水印方案多针对监督学习模型，依赖已知下游任务和标签，而SSL模型的下游任务多样且未知，需设计无需任务信息的水印方法。
AI.method: SSL-WM通过将水印输入映射到不变表示空间，使任何下游分类器均产生预期行为，从而实现水印检测。
AI.result: 实验表明SSL-WM在CV和NLP任务中有效验证模型所有权，且对微调、剪枝和输入预处理攻击具有鲁棒性，可规避现有检测方法。
AI.conclusion: SSL-WM为SSL模型提供了有效的所有权保护方案，具有广泛的应用前景。
